description.pt: Permite rotacionar a visão usando as setas do teclado ou digitando um ângulo.
description.en: Allows you to rotate the view using the keyboard arrows or by typing an angle.
description.es: Le permite rotar la vista usando las flechas del teclado o escribiendo un ángulo.

code.pt:
module ScriptUpComunidade
  module FerramentaGirarVista

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :desativada      => "Ferramenta de rotação desativada.",
        :instrucoes      => "← → ↑ ↓ para girar. Ctrl alterna entre 1° e 90°. Modo atual: %{modo}. Digite ângulo + Enter. ESC para sair.",
        :modo_1          => "1°",
        :modo_90         => "90°"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :desativada      => "Rotation tool deactivated.",
        :instrucoes      => "← → ↑ ↓ to rotate. Ctrl toggles 1°/90°. Current mode: %{modo}. Type angle + Enter. ESC to exit.",
        :modo_1          => "1°",
        :modo_90         => "90°"
      },
      'es' => {
        :desativada      => "Herramienta de rotación desactivada.",
        :instrucoes      => "← → ↑ ↓ para girar. Ctrl alterna entre 1° y 90°. Modo actual: %{modo}. Escriba ángulo + Enter. ESC para salir.",
        :modo_1          => "1°",
        :modo_90         => "90°"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave, variaveis = {})
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      texto  = IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
      
      variaveis.each { |k, v| texto = texto.gsub("%{#{k}}", v.to_s) }
      texto
    end

    class Tool
      VK_LEFT    = 37 unless defined?(VK_LEFT)
      VK_UP      = 38 unless defined?(VK_UP)
      VK_RIGHT   = 39 unless defined?(VK_RIGHT)
      VK_DOWN    = 40 unless defined?(VK_DOWN)
      VK_ESCAPE  = 27 unless defined?(VK_ESCAPE)
      VK_CONTROL = 17 unless defined?(VK_CONTROL)

      BASE_ROTATE_SPEED  = 1   unless defined?(BASE_ROTATE_SPEED)
      BOOST_ROTATE_SPEED = 90  unless defined?(BOOST_ROTATE_SPEED)
      TIMER_INTERVAL     = 0.016 unless defined?(TIMER_INTERVAL)
      CURSOR_ID          = 643 unless defined?(CURSOR_ID)

      def initialize
        @rotate_left = false
        @rotate_right = false
        @rotate_up = false
        @rotate_down = false
        @use_boost = false
        @timer_id = nil
        start_rotation_timer
      end

      def activate
        update_status_text
      end

      def deactivate(view)
        stop_rotation_timer
        Sketchup.status_text = FerramentaGirarVista.obter_texto(:desativada)
      end

      def getCursor
        CURSOR_ID
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        case key
        when VK_LEFT
          if @use_boost
            rotate_view(-BOOST_ROTATE_SPEED, :roll)
          else
            @rotate_left = true
          end
        when VK_RIGHT
          if @use_boost
            rotate_view(+BOOST_ROTATE_SPEED, :roll)
          else
            @rotate_right = true
          end
        when VK_UP
          if @use_boost
            rotate_view(+BOOST_ROTATE_SPEED, :tilt)
          else
            @rotate_up = true
          end
        when VK_DOWN
          if @use_boost
            rotate_view(-BOOST_ROTATE_SPEED, :tilt)
          else
            @rotate_down = true
          end
        when VK_CONTROL
          @use_boost = !@use_boost
          update_status_text
        when VK_ESCAPE
          Sketchup.active_model.tools.pop_tool
        end
      end

      def onKeyUp(key, repeat, flags, view)
        case key
        when VK_LEFT    then @rotate_left = false
        when VK_RIGHT   then @rotate_right = false
        when VK_UP      then @rotate_up = false
        when VK_DOWN    then @rotate_down = false
        end
      end

      def onUserText(text, view)
        if text.strip == "0"
          reset_view_orientation
        else
          angle = text.to_f
          rotate_view(angle, :roll) if angle != 0
        end
      end

      def onCancel(reason, view)
        Sketchup.active_model.tools.pop_tool
      end

      private

      def update_status_text
        modo_str = @use_boost ? FerramentaGirarVista.obter_texto(:modo_90) : FerramentaGirarVista.obter_texto(:modo_1)
        Sketchup.status_text = FerramentaGirarVista.obter_texto(:instrucoes, { modo: modo_str })
      end

      def start_rotation_timer
        @timer_id = UI.start_timer(TIMER_INTERVAL, true) {
          next if @use_boost  # no modo 90°, não repetir rotação automática
          speed = BASE_ROTATE_SPEED
          rotate_view(-speed, :roll) if @rotate_left
          rotate_view(+speed, :roll) if @rotate_right
          rotate_view(+speed, :tilt) if @rotate_up
          rotate_view(-speed, :tilt) if @rotate_down
        }
      end

      def stop_rotation_timer
        UI.stop_timer(@timer_id) if @timer_id
        @timer_id = nil
      end

      def rotate_view(degrees, mode = :roll)
        return if degrees == 0
        cam = Sketchup.active_model.active_view.camera
        eye = cam.eye
        target = cam.target
        up = cam.up
        direction = target - eye
        radians = degrees.degrees

        case mode
        when :roll
          new_up = up.transform(Geom::Transformation.rotation(eye, direction, radians))
          return if invalid_camera?(direction, new_up)
          cam.set(eye, target, new_up)
        when :tilt
          axis = direction * up  # eixo lateral
          t = Geom::Transformation.rotation(eye, axis, radians)
          new_target = target.transform(t)
          new_up = up.transform(t)
          new_direction = new_target - eye
          return if invalid_camera?(new_direction, new_up)
          cam.set(eye, new_target, new_up)
        end
      end

      def invalid_camera?(direction, up)
        dot = direction.normalize.dot(up.normalize).abs
        dot > 0.999
      end

      def reset_view_orientation
        cam = Sketchup.active_model.active_view.camera
        eye = cam.eye
        target = cam.target
        cam.set(eye, target, Z_AXIS)
      end
    end

    def self.executar
      Sketchup.active_model.tools.push_tool(Tool.new)
    end

  end
end

description.pt: Ferramenta de seleção de grupo/componente ou face em níveis mais profundos de aninhamento de forma direta. Caso esteja com segmentos de arestas selecionados, você pode enviá-lo diretamente para a face profunda com dois cliques. Isso permite planejar cortes para faces internas.
description.en: This tool allows you to select groups/components or faces directly at deeper nesting levels. If you have edge segments selected, you can send them directly to the deep face with two clicks. This allows you to plan cuts for internal faces.
description.es: Esta herramienta permite seleccionar grupos/componentes o caras directamente en niveles de anidamiento más profundos. Si tiene segmentos de arista seleccionados, puede enviarlos directamente a la cara profunda con dos clics. Esto le permite planificar cortes para caras internas.

code.pt:
module ScriptUpComunidade
  module SelecaoHierarquia

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :msg_copiar      => "Deseja usar o segmento selecionado para copiar?",
        :modo_gp_comp    => "Modo: Grupo/Componente",
        :modo_face_edge  => "Modo: Face/Aresta",
        :status_gp_comp  => "Grupo/Componente",
        :status_face_ed  => "Face/Aresta",
        :prompt_status   => "Modo atual: %{mode} | Ctrl para alternar modo | Duplo clique ou Enter para entrar no contexto | Esc para voltar ao nível do modelo",
        :op_colar        => "Colar no local (desagrupado)"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :msg_copiar      => "Do you want to use the selected segment to copy?",
        :modo_gp_comp    => "Mode: Group/Component",
        :modo_face_edge  => "Mode: Face/Edge",
        :status_gp_comp  => "Group/Component",
        :status_face_ed  => "Face/Edge",
        :prompt_status   => "Current mode: %{mode} | Ctrl to toggle mode | Double click or Enter to enter context | Esc to return to model level",
        :op_colar        => "Paste in place (exploded)"
      },
      'es' => {
        :msg_copiar      => "¿Desea utilizar el segmento seleccionado para copiar?",
        :modo_gp_comp    => "Modo: Grupo/Componente",
        :modo_face_edge  => "Modo: Cara/Arista",
        :status_gp_comp  => "Grupo/Componente",
        :status_face_ed  => "Cara/Arista",
        :prompt_status   => "Modo actual: %{mode} | Ctrl para cambiar modo | Doble clic o Enter para entrar en el contexto | Esc para volver al nivel del modelo",
        :op_colar        => "Pegar en su lugar (desagrupado)"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave, variaveis = {})
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      texto  = IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
      
      variaveis.each { |k, v| texto = texto.gsub("%{#{k}}", v.to_s) }
      texto
    end

    class HoverSelectionTool
      VK_RETURN  ||= 13
      VK_CONTROL ||= 17
      VK_ESCAPE  ||= 27

      def initialize(ctrl_locked: false, post_enter_action: nil, clipboard_group: nil)
        @model = Sketchup.active_model
        @view = @model.active_view
        @selection_mode = ctrl_locked ? :face_edge : :group_component
        @ctrl_locked = ctrl_locked
        @post_enter_action = post_enter_action
        @clipboard_group = clipboard_group
        @selected_entity = nil
        @selected_instance_path = nil
        @last_mouse_x = nil
        @last_mouse_y = nil
      end

      def activate
        update_status_text
      end

      def resume(view)
        update_status_text
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        @last_mouse_x = x
        @last_mouse_y = y
        update_selection(x, y, view)
        highlight_entity(view)
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        case key
        when VK_CONTROL
          toggle_selection_mode(view) unless @ctrl_locked
        when VK_RETURN
          refresh_selection_from_last_position(view)
          enter_parent_context(view)
        when VK_ESCAPE
          exit_to_model_level
        end
      end

      def onLButtonDoubleClick(flags, x, y, view)
        refresh_selection_from_last_position(view)
        enter_parent_context(view)
      end

      def refresh_selection_from_last_position(view)
        return unless @last_mouse_x && @last_mouse_y
        update_selection(@last_mouse_x, @last_mouse_y, view)
        highlight_entity(view)
      end

      def update_selection(x, y, view)
        ph = view.pick_helper
        ph.do_pick(x, y)

        case @selection_mode
        when :group_component
          @selected_entity, @selected_instance_path = find_deepest_group_or_component(ph)
        when :face_edge
          @selected_entity, @selected_instance_path = find_deepest_face_or_edge(ph)
        end
      end

      def find_deepest_group_or_component(pick_helper)
        path = pick_helper.path_at(0)
        return nil, nil if path.nil?
        entity = path.reverse.find { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) }
        return entity, build_instance_path(path) if entity
        return nil, nil
      end

      def find_deepest_face_or_edge(pick_helper)
        path = pick_helper.path_at(0)
        return nil, nil if path.nil?
        entity = path.reverse.find { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::Face) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::Edge) }
        return entity, build_instance_path(path) if entity
        return nil, nil
      end

      def toggle_selection_mode(view = nil)
        @selection_mode = @selection_mode == :group_component ? :face_edge : :group_component
        update_status_text
        view&.invalidate
      end

      def onReturn(view)
        refresh_selection_from_last_position(view)
        enter_parent_context(view)
      end

      def enter_parent_context(view = nil)
        return unless @selected_instance_path

        target_path = target_instance_path_for_enter
        return unless target_path

        @model.active_path = target_path

        if @post_enter_action == :paste_in_place && @clipboard_group
          model = Sketchup.active_model
          target_entities = model.active_entities
          tr = @clipboard_group.transformation
          group_def = @clipboard_group.definition

          model.start_operation(SelecaoHierarquia.obter_texto(:op_colar), true)

          temp_group_instance = target_entities.add_instance(group_def, tr)
          exploded = temp_group_instance.explode
          @clipboard_group.erase!
          valid_classes = [
            Sketchup::Edge,
            Sketchup::Face,
            Sketchup::Group,
            Sketchup::ComponentInstance,
            Sketchup::ConstructionLine,
            Sketchup::ConstructionPoint,
            Sketchup::Image
          ]

          safe_selection = Array(exploded).flatten.compact.select { |e|
            valid_classes.include?(e.class) 
          }

          model.selection.clear
          model.selection.add(safe_selection) unless safe_selection.empty?
          model.commit_operation
        end

        Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil)
      end

      def onCancel(reason, view)
        exit_to_model_level
      end

      def draw(view)
        return unless @last_mouse_x && @last_mouse_y

        mode_text = @selection_mode == :group_component ? 
          SelecaoHierarquia.obter_texto(:modo_gp_comp) : 
          SelecaoHierarquia.obter_texto(:modo_face_edge)
        
        offset_x = 14
        offset_y = 18

        screen_point = Geom::Point3d.new(@last_mouse_x + offset_x, @last_mouse_y + offset_y, 0)

        view.draw_text(
          Geom::Point3d.new(screen_point.x + 1, screen_point.y + 1, 0),
          mode_text,
          color: Sketchup::Color.new(0, 0, 0),
          size: 12
        )

        view.draw_text(
          screen_point,
          mode_text,
          color: Sketchup::Color.new(230, 30, 30),
          size: 12
        )
      end

      private

      def build_instance_path(path)
        instance_entities = path.select { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) }
        return nil if instance_entities.empty?

        active_prefix = @model.active_path ? @model.active_path.to_a : []

        if !active_prefix.empty? && instance_entities.first == active_prefix.last
          instance_entities = instance_entities[1..] || []
        end

        return nil if active_prefix.empty? && instance_entities.empty?
        Sketchup::InstancePath.new(active_prefix + instance_entities)
      end

      def exit_to_model_level
        @model.active_path = nil if @model.active_path
        @model.selection.clear
        @view.invalidate
        Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil)
      end

      def target_instance_path_for_enter
        case @selection_mode
        when :group_component
          entities = @selected_instance_path.to_a.select do |e|
            e.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)
          end
          return nil if entities.size <= 1
          Sketchup::InstancePath.new(entities[0...-1])
        else
          @selected_instance_path
        end
      end

      def update_status_text
        mode_label = @selection_mode == :group_component ? 
          SelecaoHierarquia.obter_texto(:status_gp_comp) : 
          SelecaoHierarquia.obter_texto(:status_face_ed)
        
        status = SelecaoHierarquia.obter_texto(:prompt_status, { mode: mode_label })
        Sketchup::set_status_text(status, SB_PROMPT)
      end

      def highlight_entity(view)
        return unless @selected_entity
        view.model.selection.clear
        view.model.selection.add(@selected_entity)
        view.invalidate
      end
    end

    def self.executar
      model = Sketchup.active_model
      selection = model.selection

      if !selection.empty? && selection.all? { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::Edge) }
        result = UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:msg_copiar), MB_YESNO)
        if result == IDYES
          clipboard_group = model.active_entities.add_group(selection.to_a)
          clipboard_group.name = "TEMP_CLIPBOARD_GROUP"
          model.active_entities.erase_entities(selection.to_a)

          tool = HoverSelectionTool.new(ctrl_locked: true, post_enter_action: :paste_in_place, clipboard_group: clipboard_group)
          model.select_tool(tool)
          tool.activate
          return
        end
      end

      tool = HoverSelectionTool.new
      model.select_tool(tool)
      tool.activate
    end
  end
end

code.pt:
module ScriptUpComunidade
  module SubstituirMateriais

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :status_inicial    => "Selecione o material a ser substituído.",
        :status_proximo    => "Selecione outro material para substituir %{material}.",
        :status_aguarde    => "Substituindo materiais. Aguarde, por favor...",
        :op_nome           => "Substituir Materiais",
        :default_mat       => "Padrão",
        :msg_substituir    => "Substituir %{material} ...",
        :msg_por           => "Substituir %{antigo}\npor %{novo}"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :status_inicial    => "Select the material to be replaced.",
        :status_proximo    => "Select another material to replace %{material}.",
        :status_aguarde    => "Replacing materials. Please wait...",
        :op_nome           => "Replace Materials",
        :default_mat       => "Default",
        :msg_substituir    => "Replace %{material} ...",
        :msg_por           => "Replace %{antigo}\nwith %{novo}"
      },
      'es' => {
        :status_inicial    => "Seleccione el material que desea reemplazar.",
        :status_proximo    => "Seleccione otro material para reemplazar %{material}.",
        :status_aguarde    => "Reemplazando materiales. Por favor espere...",
        :op_nome           => "Reemplazar Materiales",
        :default_mat       => "Predeterminado",
        :msg_substituir    => "Reemplazar %{material} ...",
        :msg_por           => "Reemplazar %{antigo}\npor %{novo}"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave, variaveis = {})
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      texto  = IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
      
      variaveis.each { |k, v| texto = texto.gsub("%{#{k}}", v.to_s) }
      texto
    end

    class MatReplacer
      def initialize
        @picked = nil
        @m_org = nil
        @state = 0
      end

      def activate
        @picked = nil
        @m_org = nil
        @state = 0
        @pos = [0, 0, 0]
        @drawn = false
        update_ui
        @debug = nil
      end

      def update_ui
        Sketchup.set_status_text(SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:status_inicial))
      end

      def resume(view)
        update_ui
      end

      def deactivate(view)
        view.invalidate if @drawn
      end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        ph = view.pick_helper
        ph.do_pick(x, y)

        picked = if ph.picked_face
                   ph.picked_face
                 elsif ph.picked_edge
                   ph.picked_edge
                 else
                   ph.best_picked
                 end

        index = 0
        for i in 1..ph.count
          if ph.element_at(i) == picked
            index = i
            break
          end
        end

        path = ph.path_at(index)
        t = ph.transformation_at(index)

        if path.nil?
          @picked = nil
        else
          @picked = nil
          n = (picked.is_a?(Sketchup::Face)) ? picked.normal.transform(t).normalize : nil
          path.each do |e|
            next unless e.respond_to?(:material)
            if e.is_a?(Sketchup::Face)
              c = Sketchup.active_model.active_view.camera.direction
              m = (c % n > 0) ? e.back_material : e.material
              next if m.nil?
              @picked = m
            else
              next if e.material.nil?
              @picked = e.material
            end
          end
        end

        @pos = [x, y, 0]
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onLButtonUp(flags, x, y, view)
        if @state == 0
          @m_org = @picked
          @state = 1
          o_name = (@m_org.nil?) ? SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:default_mat) : @m_org.display_name
          Sketchup.set_status_text(SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:status_proximo, { material: o_name }))
        else
          return if @picked == @m_org

          model = Sketchup.active_model
          model.start_operation(SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:op_nome), true)
          Sketchup.set_status_text(SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:status_aguarde))

          model.entities.each do |e|
            if e.respond_to?(:material)
              e.material = @picked if e.material == @m_org
            end
            if e.respond_to?(:back_material)
              e.back_material = @picked if e.back_material == @m_org
            end
          end

          model.definitions.each do |d|
            next if d.image?
            d.entities.each do |e|
              if e.respond_to?(:material)
                e.material = @picked if e.material == @m_org
              end
              if e.respond_to?(:back_material)
                e.back_material = @picked if e.back_material == @m_org
              end
            end
          end

          model.commit_operation
          activate
        end
      end

      def draw(view)
        pos = @pos.dup
        pos[0] += 30
        pos[1] -= 30

        if @state == 0
          p_name = (@picked.nil?) ? SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:default_mat) : @picked.display_name
          str = SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:msg_substituir, { material: p_name })
        else
          o_name = (@m_org.nil?) ? SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:default_mat) : @m_org.display_name
          p_name = (@picked.nil?) ? SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:default_mat) : @picked.display_name
          str = SubstituirMateriais.obter_texto(:msg_por, { antigo: o_name, novo: p_name })
        end

        text_options = {
          font: "Arial",
          size: 14,
          bold: true,
          color: "black"
        }

        view.draw_text(pos, str, text_options)
        @drawn = true
      end

      def onSetCursor
        if @state == 0
          UI.set_cursor(648)
        else
          UI.set_cursor(651)
        end
        true
      end
    end

    def self.executar
      tool = MatReplacer.new
      Sketchup.active_model.tools.push_tool(tool)
    end

  end
end

description.pt: Ferramenta interativa que permite transportar grupos ou componentes do nível do modelo para dentro de outro grupo ou componente em qualquer profundidade. Possui dois modos de operação: transporte simples ou substituição do conteúdo de destino, com preservação de materiais e suporte visual dinâmico.
description.en: An interactive tool that allows you to transport groups or components from one model level into another group or component at any depth. It has two operating modes: simple transport or replacement of the target content, with material preservation and dynamic visual support.
description.es: Una herramienta interactiva que permite transportar grupos o componentes de un nivel de modelo a otro grupo o componente a cualquier profundidad. Ofrece dos modos de funcionamiento: transporte simple o reemplazo del contenido de destino, con preservación de material y soporte visual dinámico.

code.pt:
module ScriptUpComunidade
  module TeletransportadorDeGeometria

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :modo_transp    => "Transportar",
        :modo_subst     => "Substituir",
        :local_interno  => "Interno",
        :local_externo  => "Externo",
        :status_origem  => "Modo (Ctrl): %{acao} | Localização (Shift): %{local} | Clique no item que será transportado.",
        :status_destino => "Modo (Ctrl): %{acao} | Localização (Shift): %{local} | Clique no local de destino.",
        :op_nome        => "Teletransporte",
        :erro_colar     => "Erro ao colar instância no destino!"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :modo_transp    => "Transport",
        :modo_subst     => "Replace",
        :local_interno  => "Internal",
        :local_externo  => "External",
        :status_origem  => "Mode (Ctrl): %{acao} | Location (Shift): %{local} | Click on the item to be transported.",
        :status_destino => "Mode (Ctrl): %{acao} | Location (Shift): %{local} | Click on the destination location.",
        :op_nome        => "Teleport",
        :erro_colar     => "Error pasting instance at destination!"
      },
      'es' => {
        :modo_transp    => "Transportar",
        :modo_subst     => "Sustituir",
        :local_interno  => "Interno",
        :local_externo  => "Externo",
        :status_origem  => "Modo (Ctrl): %{acao} | Ubicación (Shift): %{local} | Haga clic en el elemento a transportar.",
        :status_destino => "Modo (Ctrl): %{acao} | Ubicación (Shift): %{local} | Haga clic en la ubicación de destino.",
        :op_nome        => "Teletransporte",
        :erro_colar     => "¡Error al pegar la instancia en el destino!"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave, variaveis = {})
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      texto  = IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
      
      variaveis.each { |k, v| texto = texto.gsub("%{#{k}}", v.to_s) }
      texto
    end

    class Tool
      VK_CONTROL ||= 17
      VK_SHIFT ||= 16

      def initialize
        @step = :select_source
        @mode = :transportar
        @localizacao = :externo
        @source = nil
      end

      def activate
        Sketchup.status_text = status_message
        Sketchup.active_model.selection.clear
      end

      def status_message
        acao = @mode == :transportar ? 
          TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:modo_transp) : 
          TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:modo_subst)
        
        local = @localizacao == :interno ? 
          TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:local_interno) : 
          TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:local_externo)
        
        case @step
        when :select_source
          TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:status_origem, { acao: acao, local: local })
        when :select_target
          TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:status_destino, { acao: acao, local: local })
        end
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        case key
        when VK_CONTROL
          @mode = (@mode == :transportar ? :substituir : :transportar)
        when VK_SHIFT
          @localizacao = (@localizacao == :interno ? :externo : :interno)
        end
        Sketchup.status_text = status_message
      end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        model = Sketchup.active_model
        ph = view.pick_helper
        ph.do_pick(x, y)
        path = ph.path_at(0)
        return model.selection.clear unless path
      
        entity = path.to_a.first
      
        if @step == :select_source
          if entity.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || entity.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)
            model.selection.clear
            model.selection.add(entity)
          else
            model.selection.clear
          end
        else
          entity = path.to_a.reverse.find { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) }
          if entity
            model.selection.clear
            model.selection.add(entity)
          else
            model.selection.clear
          end
        end

        Sketchup.status_text = status_message
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        model = Sketchup.active_model
        ph = view.pick_helper
        ph.do_pick(x, y)
        path = ph.path_at(0)
        return unless path

        path_array = path.to_a

        if @step == :select_source
          entity = path_array.first
          return unless entity.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || entity.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)
        else
          entity = path_array.reverse.find { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) }
          return unless entity
        end

        entity.make_unique if entity.respond_to?(:make_unique)

        instance_path = Sketchup::InstancePath.new(path_array[0..path_array.index(entity)])
        global_tr = instance_path.transformation

        if @step == :select_source
          @source = {
            entity: entity,
            definition: entity.definition,
            global_tr: global_tr
          }
          @step = :select_target
          Sketchup.status_text = status_message
        else
          perform_transfer(@source, entity, global_tr, instance_path)
          reset
        end
      end

      def perform_transfer(source_data, destination, destination_tr, destination_path)
        model = Sketchup.active_model
        model.start_operation(TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:op_nome), true)
      
        source_entity = source_data[:entity]
        source_definition = source_data[:definition]
        source_tr = source_data[:global_tr]
      
        if @localizacao == :interno
          dest_entities = destination.definition.entities
          inverse_dest_tr = destination_tr.inverse
          relative_tr = inverse_dest_tr * source_tr
        else
          dest_entities = destination.parent.entities
      
          if destination_path
            parent_path = Sketchup::InstancePath.new(destination_path.to_a[0...-1])
            inverse_parent_path_tr = parent_path.transformation.inverse
            relative_tr = inverse_parent_path_tr * source_tr
          else
            relative_tr = source_tr
          end
        end
      
        new_instance = dest_entities.add_instance(source_definition, relative_tr)
        new_instance.material = source_entity.material if source_entity.material
      
        unless new_instance && new_instance.valid?
          UI.messagebox(TeletransportadorDeGeometria.obter_texto(:erro_colar))
          model.abort_operation
          return
        end
      
        if @mode == :substituir
          if @localizacao == :interno
            keep_id = new_instance.entityID
            to_erase = dest_entities.select { |e| e.entityID != keep_id }
            dest_entities.erase_entities(to_erase)
          else
            destination.erase!
          end
        end
      
        source_entity.erase!
      
        model.commit_operation
      end      

      def reset
        @step = :select_source
        @source = nil
        Sketchup.status_text = status_message
        Sketchup.active_model.selection.clear
      end

      def deactivate(view)
        Sketchup.status_text = ""
        Sketchup.active_model.selection.clear
      end
    end

    def self.executar
      Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(Tool.new)
    end
  end
end

title.es: Hacer que los componentes sean únicos - Recursivamente

description.pt: Torna um componente único, bem como todos os componentes aninhados dentro dele.
description.en: It makes a component unique, as well as all the components nested within it.
description.es: Hace que un componente sea único, así como todos los componentes anidados en él.

code.pt:
module ScriptUpComunidade
  module TornarUnicoRecursivo

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :erro_selecao => "Selecione um componente.",
        :op_nome      => "Tornar Componentes Únicos Recursivamente"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :erro_selecao => "Please select a component.",
        :op_nome      => "Make Components Unique Recursively"
      },
      'es' => {
        :erro_selecao => "Seleccione un componente.",
        :op_nome      => "Hacer componentes únicos recursivamente"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    def self.tornar_unico_recursivamente(entidade)
      return unless entidade.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)

      # Torna o componente atual único, se necessário
      entidade.make_unique unless entidade.definition.instances.size <= 1

      # Acessa a definição atualizada após make_unique
      definicao = entidade.definition

      # Itera sobre as entidades dentro da definição
      definicao.entities.each do |ent|
        # Se for um componente, chama a função recursivamente
        tornar_unico_recursivamente(ent) if ent.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)
      end
    end

    def self.executar
      model = Sketchup.active_model
      selection = model.selection

      if selection.empty?
        UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:erro_selecao))
      else
        model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_nome), true)

        selection.each do |entidade|
          tornar_unico_recursivamente(entidade)
        end

        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

  end
end

description.pt: Promove a união de faces coplanares dos elementos selecionados, fazendo a limpeza de faces internas e soltas.
description.en: It promotes the joining of coplanar faces of the selected elements, cleaning up internal and loose faces.
description.es: Favorece la unión de caras coplanares de los elementos seleccionados, limpiando caras internas y sueltas.

code.pt:
if defined?(MySolidFix)
  MySolidFix.constants.each do |const|
    MySolidFix.send(:remove_const, const) rescue nil
  end
  Object.send(:remove_const, :MySolidFix) rescue nil
end

module ScriptUpComunidade
  module UnirFacesCoplanares

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :selecao_vazia     => "Selecione um grupo, componente ou geometria.",
        :nome_operacao     => "Limpar Faces Internas + Unir Coplanares",
        :status_faces      => "Inspecionando faces...",
        :status_arestas    => "Inspecionando arestas...",
        :status_manifold   => "Resolvendo manifold...",
        :status_analisando => "Analisando arestas...",
        :status_bordas     => "Ordenando bordas de superficie...",
        :status_buracos    => "Ordenando buracos de face...",
        :faces_removidas   => "%d faces internas removidas com precisao.",
        :arestas_removidas => "%d arestas removidas entre faces coplanares."
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :selecao_vazia     => "Please select a group, component, or geometry.",
        :nome_operacao     => "Clean Internal Faces + Merge Coplanar",
        :status_faces      => "Inspecting faces...",
        :status_arestas    => "Inspecting edges...",
        :status_manifold   => "Resolving manifold...",
        :status_analisando => "Analyzing edges...",
        :status_bordas     => "Sorting surface borders...",
        :status_buracos    => "Sorting face holes...",
        :faces_removidas   => "%d internal faces removed with precision.",
        :arestas_removidas => "%d edges removed between coplanar faces."
      },
      'es' => {
        :selecao_vazia     => "Por favor seleccione un grupo, componente o geometria.",
        :nome_operacao     => "Limpiar Caras Internas + Unir Coplanares",
        :status_faces      => "Inspeccionando caras...",
        :status_arestas    => "Inspeccionando aristas...",
        :status_manifold   => "Resolviendo manifold...",
        :status_analisando => "Analizando aristas...",
        :status_bordas     => "Ordenando bordes de superficie...",
        :status_buracos    => "Ordenando agujeros de cara...",
        :faces_removidas   => "%d caras internas eliminadas con precision.",
        :arestas_removidas => "%d aristas eliminadas entre caras coplanares."
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    def self.executar
      model     = Sketchup.active_model
      selection = model.selection

      if selection.empty?
        UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:selecao_vazia))
        return
      end

      tolerance       = 1e-6
      angle_tolerance = 1e-3

      model.start_operation(obter_texto(:nome_operacao), true)

      total_removed = 0
      total_edges   = 0

      selection.each do |ent|
        ents = case ent
               when Sketchup::Group             then ent.entities
               when Sketchup::ComponentInstance then ent.definition.entities
               when Sketchup::Face, Sketchup::Edge then ent.parent.entities
               else next
               end

        errors = MySolidFix::ErrorFinder.find_errors(ents)

        internal_faces = errors.select { |e| e.is_a?(MySolidFix::SolidErrors::InternalFace) }
        internal_faces.each do |err|
          face = err.entities[0]
          if face.valid?
            face.erase!
            total_removed += 1
          end
        end

        ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each do |edge|
          next unless edge.valid? && edge.faces.size == 2
          f1, f2 = edge.faces
          begin
            angle    = f1.normal.angle_between(f2.normal)
            coplanar = angle < angle_tolerance &&
               f2.vertices.all? { |v|
                 p = v.position
                 a, b, c, d = f1.plane
                 (a * p.x + b * p.y + c * p.z + d).abs < tolerance
               }
            if coplanar
              edge.erase!
              total_edges += 1
            end
          rescue
            next
          end
        end
      end

      model.commit_operation
      # puts obter_texto(:faces_removidas)   % total_removed
      # puts obter_texto(:arestas_removidas) % total_edges
    end

  end
end

module MySolidFix
  module Geometry

    def self.arc(center, xaxis, normal, radius, start_angle, end_angle, num_segments = 12)
      tr = Geom::Transformation.rotation(center, normal, start_angle)
      points = []
      points << center.offset(xaxis, radius).transform(tr)
      angle = (end_angle - start_angle) / num_segments
      tr = Geom::Transformation.rotation(center, normal, angle)
      1.upto(num_segments) { |i|
        points << points.last.transform(tr)
      }
      return points
    end

    def self.arc2d(center, xaxis, radius, start_angle, end_angle, num_segments = 24)
      full_angle    = end_angle - start_angle
      segment_angle = full_angle / num_segments
      t   = Geom::Transformation.axes(center, xaxis, xaxis * Z_AXIS, Z_AXIS)
      arc = []
      (0..num_segments).each { |i|
        angle = start_angle + (segment_angle * i)
        x = radius * Math.cos(angle)
        y = radius * Math.sin(angle)
        arc << Geom::Point3d.new(x, y, 0).transform!(t)
      }
      arc
    end

    def self.circle(center, normal, radius, num_segments)
      pi2   = Math::PI * 2
      xaxis = normal.axes.x
      points = self.arc(center, xaxis, normal, radius, 0.0, pi2, num_segments)
      points.pop
      return points
    end

    def self.circle2d(center, xaxis, radius, num_segments = 24)
      num_segments = num_segments.to_i
      angle = 360.degrees - (360.degrees / num_segments)
      self.arc2d(center, xaxis, radius, 0, angle, num_segments - 1)
    end

    def self.arc_segments(angle, full_circle_segments, force_even = false)
      segments = (full_circle_segments * (angle.abs / (Math::PI * 2))).to_i
      segments += 1 if force_even && segments % 2 > 0
      segments = 1 if segments < 1
      return segments
    end

    def self.mid_point(edge)
      pt1, pt2 = edge.vertices.map { |vertex| vertex.position }
      Geom.linear_combination(0.5, pt1, 0.5, pt2)
    end

  end
end

module MySolidFix

  class HeisenBug < RuntimeError; end

  class Shell

    PI2 = Math::PI * 2

    attr_reader :internal_faces, :external_faces, :reversed_faces

    def initialize(entities)
      @entities      = entities
      @shell_faces   = nil
      @internal_faces  = nil
      @external_faces  = nil
      @reversed_faces  = nil
    end

    def resolve
      @shell_faces    = Set.new
      @internal_faces = Set.new
      @external_faces = Set.new
      @reversed_faces = Set.new

      shell_front = Set.new
      find_geometry_groups(@entities) { |geometry_group|
        start_face = find_start_face(geometry_group, true)
        next if start_face.nil?
        shell_front.merge(find_shell(start_face))
      }
      faces           = @entities.grep(Sketchup::Face)
      @internal_faces = Set.new(faces).subtract(shell_front)

      temp_reversed_faces = @reversed_faces.dup

      shell_back = Set.new
      find_geometry_groups(@entities) { |geometry_group|
        start_face = find_start_face(geometry_group, false)
        next if start_face.nil?
        shell_back.merge(find_shell(start_face))
      }

      @shell_faces    = shell_front.intersection(shell_back)
      @external_faces = Set.new(faces).subtract(@internal_faces)
                                      .subtract(@shell_faces)
      @reversed_faces = @shell_faces.intersection(temp_reversed_faces)
      nil
    end

    def valid?
      if @shell_faces.nil?
        raise RuntimeError, "`resolve` must be called before calling `valid?`"
      end
      @shell_faces.size > 0 && @shell_faces.all? { |face|
        face.edges.all? { |edge|
          faces = edge.faces.select { |f| @shell_faces.include?(f) }
          faces.size > 1
        }
      }
    end

    private

    def find_geometry_groups(entities)
      num_groups = 0
      stack = entities.to_a
      until stack.empty?
        entity = stack.pop
        next unless entity.respond_to?(:all_connected)
        num_groups += 1
        geometry_group = entity.all_connected
        yield(geometry_group)
        stack = stack - geometry_group
      end
      num_groups
    end

    def get_faces(entity)
      entity.faces.reject { |face| @internal_faces.include?(face) }
    end

    def face_normal(face)
      normal = face.normal
      if @reversed_faces.include?(face)
        normal.reverse!
      end
      normal
    end

    def edge_reversed_in?(edge, face)
      reversed = edge.reversed_in?(face)
      if @reversed_faces.include?(face)
        reversed = !reversed
      end
      reversed
    end

    def reverse_face(face)
      if @reversed_faces.include?(face)
        @reversed_faces.delete(face)
      else
        @reversed_faces << face
      end
      face
    end

    def find_start_face(entities, outside)
      vertices = Set.new
      entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge) { |edge|
        vertices.merge(edge.vertices)
      }
      vertices.delete_if { |vertex| get_faces(vertex).empty? }
      return nil if vertices.empty?

      max_z_vertex = vertices.max { |a, b|
        a.position.z <=> b.position.z
      }

      edges = max_z_vertex.edges.delete_if { |edge| get_faces(edge).empty? }
      edge  = edges.min { |a, b|
        val_a = edge_normal_z_component(a)
        val_b = edge_normal_z_component(b)
        result = val_a <=> val_b
        if result.nil?
          klass_a = val_a.class.name
          klass_b = val_b.class.name
          raise HeisenBug, "A: #{a.line.inspect} (#{val_a.inspect}) #{klass_a} - B: #{b.line.inspect} (#{val_b.inspect}) #{klass_b}"
        end
        result
      }

      face = get_faces(edge).max { |a, b|
        face_normal(a).z.abs <=> face_normal(b).z.abs
      }

      if outside
        reverse_face(face) if face_normal(face).z < 0
      else
        reverse_face(face) if face_normal(face).z > 0
      end

      face
    end

    def edge_normal_z_component(edge)
      edge.line[1].z.abs
    end

    def edge_vector(edge, face)
      if edge_reversed_in?(edge, face)
        edge.end.position.vector_to(edge.start)
      else
        edge.start.position.vector_to(edge.end)
      end
    end

    def get_other_face(edge, face)
      other_face = get_faces(edge).find { |edge_face| edge_face != face }
      return nil if other_face.nil?
      if edge_reversed_in?(edge, face) == edge_reversed_in?(edge, other_face)
        reverse_face(other_face)
      end
      other_face
    end

    def find_other_shell_face(edge, face)
      return nil if get_faces(edge).size == 1
      return get_other_face(edge, face) if get_faces(edge).size == 2
      return nil if get_faces(edge).count(face) > 1

      edge_direction = edge_vector(edge, face)
      face_direction = face_normal(face)
      product        = face_direction.cross(edge_direction)
      reversed       = edge_reversed_in?(edge, face)

      minimum_angle = PI2
      shell_face    = nil

      get_faces(edge).each { |other_face|
        next if other_face == face

        other_face_direction = face_normal(other_face)
        if edge_reversed_in?(edge, other_face) == reversed
          other_face_direction.reverse!
        end

        other_product = edge_direction.cross(other_face_direction)
        angle = product.angle_between(other_product)
        if other_product.dot(face_direction) < 0
          angle = PI2 - angle
        end

        if angle < minimum_angle
          minimum_angle = angle
          shell_face    = other_face
        end
      }

      return nil if shell_face.nil?

      if edge_reversed_in?(edge, shell_face) == reversed
        reverse_face(shell_face)
      end

      shell_face
    end

    def find_shell(start_face)
      stack     = []
      processed = Set.new
      shell     = Set.new

      stack << start_face
      processed << start_face

      until stack.empty? do
        face = stack.pop
        shell << face

        face.loops.each { |loop|
          loop.edges.each { |edge|
            next if processed.include?(edge) || get_faces(edge).size < 2

            processed << edge
            other_shell_face = find_other_shell_face(edge, face)

            next if other_shell_face.nil?
            next if processed.include?(other_shell_face)

            stack << other_shell_face
            processed << other_shell_face
          }
        }
      end

      shell.to_a
    end

  end
end

module MySolidFix

  module SolidErrors

    class SolidError

      ERROR_COLOR_EDGE = Sketchup::Color.new(255, 0, 0, 255).freeze
      ERROR_COLOR_FACE = Sketchup::Color.new(255, 0, 0, 128).freeze

      def self.type_name
        self.name.split("::").last
      end

      def self.display_name
        self.name
      end

      def self.description
        ""
      end

      attr_accessor :entities

      def initialize(entities)
        raise TypeError if entities.nil?
        if entities.is_a?(Enumerable)
          @entities = entities.clone
        else
          @entities = [entities]
        end
        @fixed = false
      end

      def fix
        raise NotImplementedError
      end

      def fixed?
        @fixed ? true : false
      end

      def fixable?
        is_a?(Fixable)
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        raise NotImplementedError
      end

      def to_json(*args)
        data = {
          :id         => object_id,
          :is_fixable => fixable?
        }
        data.to_json(*args)
      end

    end

    module Fixable
    end

    module EraseToFix

      include Fixable

      def fix
        entity = @entities.find { |entity| entity.valid? }
        return false if entity.nil?
        entities = entity.parent.entities
        entities.erase_entities(@entities)
        @fixed = true
        true
      end

    end

    class HiddenFace < SolidError

      include Fixable

      def self.display_name
        "Hidden Faces"
      end

      def self.description
        "Hidden faces will not be exported to STL file, and may cause holes "\
        "in a mesh."
      end

      def fix
        face = @entities[0]
        return false if face.deleted?
        face.visible = true
        @fixed = true
        true
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_FACE
        draw_face(view, @entities[0], transformation, texture_id: texture_id)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        @entities[0].edges.each { |edge|
          draw_edge(view, edge, transformation)
        }
        nil
      end

    end

    class BorderEdge < SolidError

      def self.display_name
        "Border Edges"
      end

      def self.description
        "Border edges are connected to only one face and therefore doesn't "\
        "form a manifold. These cannot be fixed automatically and must be "\
        "fixed by hand."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        draw_edge(view, @entities[0], transformation)
        nil
      end

    end

    class InternalFaceEdge < SolidError

      def self.display_name
        "Internal Face Edges"
      end

      def self.description
        "Internal face edges are edges connected to internal faces. However, "\
        "if there are holes in the mesh it is not possible to reliably "\
        "determine which faces are internal. Fix the holes in the mesh and "\
        "then run the tool again."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        draw_edge(view, @entities[0], transformation)
        nil
      end

    end

    class InternalFace < SolidError

      include EraseToFix

      def self.display_name
        "Internal Faces"
      end

      def self.description
        "Internal faces are faces located on the inside of a mesh that should "\
        "be a solid. These are automatically fixed by erasing the internal "\
        "faces."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_FACE
        draw_face(view, @entities[0], transformation, texture_id: texture_id)
        nil
      end

    end

    class ExternalFace < SolidError

      include EraseToFix

      def self.display_name
        "External Faces"
      end

      def self.description
        "External faces are faces located on the outside of a mesh that should "\
        "be a solid. These are automatically fixed by erasing the internal "\
        "faces."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_FACE
        draw_face(view, @entities[0], transformation, texture_id: texture_id)
        nil
      end

    end

    class ReversedFace < SolidError

      include Fixable

      def self.display_name
        "Reversed Faces"
      end

      def self.description
        "Many applications will not be able to treat a mesh as a solid if the "\
        "face normal (direction) isn't all uniform. The front side of a face "\
        "must be facing outwards. These can be fixed automatically by "\
        "reversing the faces."
      end

      def fix
        face = @entities[0]
        return false if face.deleted?

        front_material = face.material
        back_material  = face.back_material

        front_mapping = uv_mapping(face, true)
        back_mapping  = uv_mapping(face, false)

        front_projection = get_projection(face, true)
        back_projection  = get_projection(face, false)

        face.reverse!

        apply_material(face, back_material,  back_mapping,  true)
        apply_material(face, front_material, front_mapping, false)

        apply_projection(face, back_projection,  true)
        apply_projection(face, front_projection, false)

        @fixed = true
        true
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_FACE
        draw_face(view, @entities[0], transformation, texture_id: texture_id)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        @entities[0].edges.each { |edge|
          draw_edge(view, edge, transformation)
        }
        nil
      end

      private

      def uv_mapping(face, front)
        material = (front) ? face.material : face.back_material
        if material && material.texture
          start_point = face.vertices.first.position

          points = [start_point]
          points << points[0].offset(face.normal.axes.x, 10)
          points << points[0].offset(face.normal.axes.y, 10)
          points << points[1].offset(face.normal.axes.y, 10)

          tw  = Sketchup.create_texture_writer
          uvh = face.get_UVHelper(true, true, tw)

          mapping = []
          points.each_with_index { |point, index|
            uvq = (front) ? uvh.get_front_UVQ(point) : uvh.get_back_UVQ(point)
            mapping << point
            mapping << uvq_to_uv(uvq)
          }

          mapping
        else
          nil
        end
      end

      def apply_material(face, material, uv_mapping, front)
        if material && uv_mapping
          face.position_material(material, uv_mapping, front)
        else
          if front
            face.material = material
          else
            face.back_material = material
          end
        end
        nil
      end

      def uvq_to_uv(uvq)
        Geom::Point3d.new(uvq.x / uvq.z, uvq.y / uvq.z, 1.0)
      end

      def apply_projection(face, projection, front)
        if projection && face.respond_to?(:set_texture_projection)
          face.set_texture_projection(projection, front)
        end
        nil
      end

      def get_projection(face, front)
        if face.respond_to?(:get_texture_projection)
          face.get_texture_projection(front)
        else
          nil
        end
      end

    end

    class StrayEdge < SolidError

      include EraseToFix

      def self.display_name
        "Stray Edges"
      end

      def self.description
        "Stray edges are not connected to any faces and doesn't form any part "\
        "of solids. These are automatically fixed by erasing the stray edges."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        draw_edge(view, @entities[0], transformation)
        nil
      end

    end

    class SurfaceBorder < SolidError

      def self.display_name
        "Surface Borders"
      end

      def self.description
        "Edges that form the border of a surface or a hole in the mesh. "\
        "These cannot be fixed automatically. Manually close the mesh and "\
        "run the tool again."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        @entities.each { |edge|
          draw_edge(view, edge, transformation)
        }
        nil
      end

    end

    class FaceHole < SolidError

      include EraseToFix

      def self.display_name
        "Face Holes"
      end

      def self.description
        "Edges that form the a hole in a face. These are fixed automatically "\
        "by erasing the hole."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        @entities.each { |edge|
          draw_edge(view, edge, transformation)
        }
        nil
      end

    end

    class NestedInstance < SolidError

      def self.display_name
        "Nested Instances"
      end

      def self.description
        "Nested instances will be exported correctly to STL file format by "\
        "the Trimble SketchUp STL exporter, but SketchUp's Solid Tools and "\
        "#{PLUGIN_NAME} doesn't treat nested instances as a solid."
      end

      def fix
        raise NotImplementedError

        return false if @entities[0].deleted?
        @entities[0].explode
        @fixed = true
        true
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        draw_instance(view, @entities[0], transformation)
        nil
      end

    end

    class ImageEntity < SolidError

      def self.display_name
        "Image Entity"
      end

      def self.description
        "Image entities isn't exported by the Trimble SketchUp STL exporter, "\
        "but it prevent SketchUp's Solid Tools from performing it's "\
        "operations on the object."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        draw_instance(view, @entities[0], transformation)
        nil
      end

    end

    class ShortEdge < SolidError

      def self.display_name
        "Short Edges"
      end

      def self.description
        "Small geometry might cause unpredictable results due to precision "\
        "errors. It's beneficial to try to avoid such small geometry. This "\
        "cannot be automatically fixed. You might want to scale the model up "\
        "by factors of 10 to work around such problems."
      end

      def draw(view, transformation = nil, texture_id: nil)
        view.drawing_color = ERROR_COLOR_EDGE
        draw_edge(view, @entities[0], transformation)
        nil
      end

    end

  end

end

module MySolidFix

  class ErrorFinder

    def self.find_errors(entities)
      raise TypeError unless entities.is_a?(Sketchup::Entities)

      errors = []

      self.time("Total analysis") {

        mesh_border_edges          = []
        hole_edges                 = []
        edges_with_internal_faces  = []

        Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::UnirFacesCoplanares.obter_texto(:status_faces)

        all_faces = entities.grep(Sketchup::Face)
        all_faces.each { |face|
          if !face.visible?
            errors << SolidErrors::HiddenFace.new(face)
          end
        }

        Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::UnirFacesCoplanares.obter_texto(:status_arestas)

        entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge) { |edge|
          num_faces = edge.faces.size
          if num_faces == 0
            errors << SolidErrors::StrayEdge.new(edge)
          elsif num_faces == 1
            face = edge.faces.first
            if face.outer_loop.edges.include?(edge)
              mesh_border_edges << edge
            else
              hole_edges << edge
            end
          elsif num_faces > 2
            edges_with_internal_faces << edge
          end
        }

        Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::UnirFacesCoplanares.obter_texto(:status_manifold)

        shell = Shell.new(entities)

        self.time("Resolving manifold") {
          shell.resolve
        }

        if shell.valid?
          shell.internal_faces.each { |face|
            errors << SolidErrors::InternalFace.new(face)
          }
          shell.external_faces.each { |face|
            errors << SolidErrors::ExternalFace.new(face)
          }
          shell.reversed_faces.each { |face|
            errors << SolidErrors::ReversedFace.new(face)
          }
        else
          Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::UnirFacesCoplanares.obter_texto(:status_analisando)

          Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::UnirFacesCoplanares.obter_texto(:status_bordas)
          self.group_connected_edges(mesh_border_edges).each { |edges|
            errors << SolidErrors::SurfaceBorder.new(edges)
          }

          Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::UnirFacesCoplanares.obter_texto(:status_buracos)
          self.group_connected_edges(hole_edges).each { |edges|
            errors << SolidErrors::FaceHole.new(edges)
          }

          edges_with_internal_faces.each { |edge|
            errors << SolidErrors::InternalFaceEdge.new(edge)
          }
        end

        self.time("Instance detection") {
          groups     = entities.grep(Sketchup::Group)
          components = entities.grep(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)
          instances  = groups + components
          instances.each { |instance|
            errors << SolidErrors::NestedInstance.new(instance)
          }
        }

        self.time("Image detection") {
          entities.grep(Sketchup::Image) { |image|
            errors << SolidErrors::ImageEntity.new(image)
          }
        }

        if false
          self.time("Short edge detection") {
            self.find_short_edges(entities) { |edge|
              errors << SolidErrors::ShortEdge.new(edge)
            }
          }
        end

      }

      Sketchup.status_text = ""

      errors
    end

    def self.find_short_edges(entities, &block)
      threshold = Settings.short_edge_threshold
      entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge) { |edge|
        if edge.length < threshold
          block.call(edge)
        end
      }
      nil
    end

    def self.fix_errors(errors, entities)
      all_errors_fixed       = true
      entities_to_be_erased  = Set.new
      remaining_errors       = []
      errors.each { |error|
        if error.is_a?(SolidErrors::EraseToFix)
          entities_to_be_erased.merge(error.entities)
        else
          remaining_errors << error
        end
      }

      stray_edges = Set.new
      entities_to_be_erased.grep(Sketchup::Face) { |face|
        face.edges.each { |edge|
          if edge.faces.all? { |f| entities_to_be_erased.include?(f) }
            stray_edges << edge
          end
        }
      }
      entities_to_be_erased.merge(stray_edges)
      entities_to_be_erased.reject! { |entity| entity.deleted? }

      model = entities.model
      begin
        model.start_operation("Repair Solid", true)
        entities.erase_entities(entities_to_be_erased.to_a)
        remaining_errors.each { |error|
          begin
            error.fix
          rescue NotImplementedError => e
            all_errors_fixed = false
          end
        }
        model.commit_operation
      rescue
        model.commit_operation
        raise
      end
      all_errors_fixed
    end

    def self.group_connected_edges(edges)
      groups = []
      stack  = edges.to_a.clone
      until stack.empty?
        cluster = []
        cluster << stack.shift

        edge     = cluster.first
        haystack = self.neighbour_edges(edge) & stack
        until haystack.empty?
          next_edge = haystack.shift

          if stack.include?(next_edge)
            cluster << next_edge
            stack.delete(next_edge)
            haystack += self.neighbour_edges(next_edge) & stack
          end
        end

        groups << cluster
      end
      groups
    end

    def self.neighbour_edges(edge)
      (edge.start.edges + edge.end.edges) - [edge]
    end

    def self.time(message, &block)
      start_time = Time.new
      block.call
      elapsed_time = Time.now - start_time
      if false
        puts "> #{message} took: #{elapsed_time}s"
      end
      nil
    end

  end

end
