module ScriptUpComunidade
  module PolyBrushSelecao

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :status_text    => "Pinte com botão esquerdo (commit no soltar). CTRL alterna modo. SHIFT+R reindexa. VCB: diâmetro + ENTER.",
        :modo_remover   => "MODO: Desfazer (CTRL alterna)",
        :modo_selecionar => "MODO: Selecionar (CTRL alterna)",
        :hud_diametro   => "Diâmetro: %{diam} mm  |  Medidas: digite valor + ENTER",
        :op_nome        => "PolyBrush Seleção"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :status_text    => "Paint with left button (commit on release). CTRL toggles mode. SHIFT+R reindexes. VCB: diameter + ENTER.",
        :modo_remover   => "MODE: Remove (CTRL toggles)",
        :modo_selecionar => "MODE: Select (CTRL toggles)",
        :hud_diametro   => "Diameter: %{diam} mm  |  Measurements: type value + ENTER",
        :op_nome        => "PolyBrush Selection"
      },
      'es' => {
        :status_text    => "Pinte con el botón izquierdo (confirmar al soltar). CTRL alterna modo. SHIFT+R reindexa. VCB: diámetro + ENTER.",
        :modo_remover   => "MODO: Deshacer (CTRL alterna)",
        :modo_selecionar => "MODO: Seleccionar (CTRL alterna)",
        :hud_diametro   => "Diámetro: %{diam} mm  |  Medidas: escriba valor + ENTER",
        :op_nome        => "Selección PolyBrush"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave, variaveis = {})
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      texto  = IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
      variaveis.each { |k, v| texto = texto.gsub("%{#{k}}", v.to_s) }
      texto
    end

    class Tool
      include Math

      def initialize
        require 'set'

        @diameter_mm = 10000.0
        @radius      = @diameter_mm.mm / 2.0
        @mode_remove = false
        @dragging    = false
        @cursor_pt   = nil
        @ctrl_prev   = false

        model    = Sketchup.active_model
        @edit_tr = model.edit_transform

        # Eixos do contexto
        @px = Geom::Vector3d.new(1,0,0).transform(@edit_tr)
        @px.length == 0 ? @px.set!(1,0,0) : @px.normalize!
        @py = Geom::Vector3d.new(0,1,0).transform(@edit_tr); @py.length == 0 ? @py.set!(0,1,0) : @py.normalize!
        @pz = Geom::Vector3d.new(0,0,1).transform(@edit_tr)
        @pz.length == 0 ? @pz.set!(0,0,1) : @pz.normalize!
        @porigin = Geom::Point3d.new(0,0,0).transform(@edit_tr)

        # Índice espacial inicial
        build_uv_cache(@radius)

        # Buffers da passada atual (arrasto)
        @stroke_face_pids = nil   
        @stroke_painted   = Set.new 
        @applied_ids      = Set.new 
        @sel_initial_face_pids = Set.new
        @sel_initial_others    = [] 
      end

      # ---------- Utils ----------
      def scale_vec(v, s) Geom::Vector3d.new(v.x*s, v.y*s, v.z*s) end

      def project_uv(p3)
        v = p3 - @porigin
        [v.dot(@px), v.dot(@py)]
      end

      def pick_on_surface(x, y, view)
        ray = view.pickray(x, y)
        hit = Sketchup.active_model.raytest(ray, true)
        pt = hit && hit[0]
        pt ||= Geom.intersect_line_plane(ray, [@porigin, @pz])
        pt ? pt.offset(@pz, 0.5.mm) : nil
      end

      def circle_points(center3d, radius_len, segments = 64)
        r = radius_len.to_f
        pts = []
        segments.times do |i|
          t  = 2.0 * PI * (i.to_f / segments)
          vx = scale_vec(@px, r * Math.cos(t))
          vy = scale_vec(@py, r * Math.sin(t))
          pts << center3d.offset(vx + vy)
        end
        pts
      end

      # ---------- Índice Espacial / Cache ----------
      def build_uv_cache(cell_size = @radius)
        ents  = Sketchup.active_model.active_entities
        @faces = ents.grep(Sketchup::Face).select(&:valid?)
        @pid_to_face = {}
        @uv_by_pid   = {}
        @grid        = {}
        @cell = [cell_size.to_f, 1.mm.to_f].max

        @faces.each do |f|
          pid = f.persistent_id
          @pid_to_face[pid] = f
          uvs = f.vertices.map { |v| project_uv(v.position) }
          @uv_by_pid[pid] = uvs
          umin, umax = uvs.map(&:first).minmax
          vmin, vmax = uvs.map(&:last ).minmax
          ix0 = (umin/@cell).floor
          ix1 = (umax/@cell).floor
          iy0 = (vmin/@cell).floor
          iy1 = (vmax/@cell).floor
          (ix0..ix1).each do |ix|
            (iy0..iy1).each do |iy|
              key = "#{ix},#{iy}"
              (@grid[key] ||= Set.new) << pid
            end
          end
        end
      end

      def candidate_pids(center3d, radius)
        uc, vc = project_uv(center3d)
        r  = radius.to_f
        cr = (r/@cell).ceil
        cix = (uc/@cell).floor
        ciy = (vc/@cell).floor
        out = Set.new
        (-cr..cr).each do |dx|
          (-cr..cr).each do |dy|
            key = "#{cix+dx},#{ciy+dy}"
            s = @grid[key]
            out.merge(s) if s
          end
        end
        out
      end

      # ---------- Passada (arrasto) em memória ----------
      def begin_stroke
        sel = Sketchup.active_model.selection
        faces = sel.grep(Sketchup::Face)
        others = sel.to_a - faces
        @sel_initial_face_pids = Set.new(faces.map(&:persistent_id))
        @sel_initial_others    = others
        @stroke_face_pids = @sel_initial_face_pids.dup
        @stroke_painted.clear
        @applied_ids.clear
      end

      def apply_brush_at(center3d)
        return unless center3d
        return unless @stroke_face_pids

        r   = @radius.to_f
        r2  = r*r
        uc, vc = project_uv(center3d)

        candidate_pids(center3d, r).each do |pid|
          next if @applied_ids.include?(pid)
          uvs = @uv_by_pid[pid]
          next unless uvs && !uvs.empty?
          inside = uvs.any? { |(u,v)| ((u-uc)**2 + (v-vc)**2) <= r2 }
          next unless inside

          if @mode_remove
            @stroke_face_pids.delete(pid)
          else
            @stroke_face_pids.add(pid)
          end

          @stroke_painted.add(pid)
          @applied_ids.add(pid)
        end
      end

      def commit_stroke
        return unless @stroke_face_pids

        faces_final = @stroke_face_pids.map { |pid|
          f = @pid_to_face[pid]
          (f && f.valid?) ? f : nil
        }.compact
        final_selection = @sel_initial_others + faces_final

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        sel   = model.selection
        model.start_operation(PolyBrushSelecao.obter_texto(:op_nome), true)
        sel.clear
        sel.add(final_selection)
        model.commit_operation

        @stroke_face_pids = nil
        @stroke_painted.clear
        @applied_ids.clear
      end

      def cancel_stroke
        @stroke_face_pids = nil
        @stroke_painted.clear
        @applied_ids.clear
      end

      # ---------- HUD ----------
      def hud_lines
        mode = @mode_remove ? PolyBrushSelecao.obter_texto(:modo_remover) : PolyBrushSelecao.obter_texto(:modo_selecionar)
        dim  = PolyBrushSelecao.obter_texto(:hud_diametro, {:diam => @diameter_mm.to_i})
        [mode, dim]
      end

      def is_ctrl_key?(key) key == 17 end 
      def ctrl_down?(flags) (flags & COPY_MODIFIER_KEY) == COPY_MODIFIER_KEY end

      # ---------- Tool API ----------
      def activate
        Sketchup.status_text = PolyBrushSelecao.obter_texto(:status_text)
      end

      def deactivate(view); view.invalidate; end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        @cursor_pt = pick_on_surface(x, y, view)
        if @dragging
          apply_brush_at(@cursor_pt)
        end
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        @dragging = true
        begin_stroke
        @cursor_pt = pick_on_surface(x, y, view)
        apply_brush_at(@cursor_pt)
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onLButtonUp(flags, x, y, view)
        @dragging = false
        commit_stroke
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        if key == 82 && (flags & SHIFT_MODIFIER_KEY) == SHIFT_MODIFIER_KEY # 'R'
          build_uv_cache(@radius)
          UI.beep
          view.invalidate
          return
        end

        if (is_ctrl_key?(key) || ctrl_down?(flags)) && !@ctrl_prev
          @mode_remove = !@mode_remove
          @ctrl_prev = true
          view.invalidate
        end
      end

      def onKeyUp(key, repeat, flags, view)
        @ctrl_prev = false unless ctrl_down?(flags)
      end

      def onCancel(reason, view)
        @dragging = false
        cancel_stroke
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onUserText(text, view)
        str = text.to_s.strip
        return if str.empty?
        len = if str =~ /[a-zA-Z]/
                begin
                  str.to_l
                rescue
                  nil
                end
              else
                (str.to_f).mm
              end

        return unless len && len > 0.0
        @diameter_mm = len.to_mm
        @radius      = len / 2.0
        build_uv_cache(@radius)
        view.invalidate
      end

      def draw(view)
        if @cursor_pt
          r = @radius.to_f
          pts = circle_points(@cursor_pt, r, 72)
          view.line_stipple  = ""
          view.line_width    = 2
          view.drawing_color = @mode_remove ? Sketchup::Color.new(220, 60, 60) : Sketchup::Color.new(60, 180, 60)
          view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, pts)

          cpts = circle_points(@cursor_pt, [r * 0.025, 2.mm.to_f].max, 24)
          view.line_width = 1
          view.drawing_color = Sketchup::Color.new(40, 40, 40)
          view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, cpts)

          scr = view.screen_coords(@cursor_pt)
          y = scr.y + 18
          hud_lines.each do |txt|
            view.draw_text(Geom::Point3d.new(scr.x + 12, y, 0), txt)
            y += 16
          end
        end

        return unless @dragging && !@stroke_painted.empty?
        view.line_width = 1
        view.drawing_color = Sketchup::Color.new(30, 150, 240)
        @stroke_painted.each do |pid|
          f = @pid_to_face[pid]
          next unless f && f.valid?
          edges = f.outer_loop.edges
          pts = []
          edges.each do |e|
            pts << e.start.position
            pts << e.end.position
          end
          view.draw(GL_LINES, pts) unless pts.empty?
        end
      end

      def getExtents
        bb = Geom::BoundingBox.new
        if @cursor_pt
          r = @radius.to_f
          xoff = scale_vec(@px, r)
          yoff = scale_vec(@py, r)
          bb.add(@cursor_pt.offset(xoff + yoff))
          bb.add(@cursor_pt.offset(xoff - yoff))
          bb.add(@cursor_pt.offset(scale_vec(@px, -r) + yoff))
          bb.add(@cursor_pt.offset(scale_vec(@px, -r) + scale_vec(@py, -r)))
        end
        bb
      end
    end

    def self.executar
      Sketchup.active_model.tools.push_tool(Tool.new)
    end

  end
end

ScriptUpComunidade::PolyBrushSelecao.executar

description.pt: Remove todos os materiais aplicados em toda a hierarquia dos elementos selecionados.
description.en: Remove all materials applied across the entire hierarchy of the selected elements.
description.es: Eliminar todos los materiales aplicados en toda la jerarquía de los elementos seleccionados.

code.pt:
# Remover TODOS os materiais do selecionado (grupo/componente) e de toda a hierarquia
# Cole no Console Ruby com um grupo ou componente selecionado.

model = Sketchup.active_model
sel = model.selection
alvos = sel.grep(Sketchup::Group) + sel.grep(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)

if alvos.empty?
  puts "Selecione um grupo ou componente."
  return
end

faces_limpas = 0
inst_processadas = 0
definicoes_unicas = 0
defs_processadas = {} # NOVO: Dicionário para evitar reprocessamento

clear_entities = nil
clear_instance = nil

clear_entities = lambda { |entities|
  # Faces: limpa frente e verso de forma direta, sem checagens redundantes
  entities.grep(Sketchup::Face).each do |f|
    if f.material
      f.material = nil
      faces_limpas += 1
    end
    if f.back_material
      f.back_material = nil
      faces_limpas += 1
    end
  end

  # Grupos e Componentes: concatenados para iterar apenas uma vez
  (entities.grep(Sketchup::Group) + entities.grep(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)).each do |inst|
    next if inst.deleted?
    inst.material = nil if inst.material
    inst_processadas += 1
    clear_instance.call(inst)
  end
}

clear_instance = lambda { |inst|
  is_group = inst.is_a?(Sketchup::Group)
  
  # Removemos o make_unique. A limpeza agora age direto na raiz da Definição.
  # Isso iguala a performance ao Material Tools.
  defn = is_group ? inst.entities.parent : inst.definition
  
  # Checa o cache: varre as entidades internas apenas na primeira vez que encontrar esta definição
  unless defs_processadas[defn]
    defs_processadas[defn] = true
    clear_entities.call(is_group ? inst.entities : defn.entities)
  end
}

model.start_operation("Remover Materiais Recursivo", true)
begin
  alvos.each do |t|
    t.material = nil if t.respond_to?(:material) && t.material
    inst_processadas += 1
    clear_instance.call(t)
  end
  model.commit_operation
rescue => e
  model.abort_operation
  puts "Erro: #{e}"
end

puts "Materiais removidos."
puts "Faces limpas: #{faces_limpas}"
puts "Instâncias processadas: #{inst_processadas}"
puts "Definições tornadas únicas: #{definicoes_unicas}"

description.pt: Régua dinâmica que acompanha a posição do cursor e mostra a medida da superfície de aresta a aresta.
description.en: A dynamic ruler that follows the cursor's position and shows the surface area measurement from edge to edge.
description.es: Una regla dinámica que sigue la posición del cursor y muestra la medida del área de la superficie de borde a borde.

code.pt:
module ScriptUpComunidade
  module MedirParedes

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :status_texto => "Unidade: %s (CTRL) | Setas ESQUERDA e DIREITA alteram a rotação.",
        :console_ativo => "[RaycastTool] Ativo. Medição parede-a-parede ignorando ocultos.",
        :console_clique => "[Raycast] Clique ignorado. Use Ctrl para unidades."
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :status_texto => "Unit: %s (CTRL) | LEFT and RIGHT arrows change rotation.",
        :console_ativo => "[RaycastTool] Active. Wall-to-wall measurement ignoring hidden objects.",
        :console_clique => "[Raycast] Click ignored. Use Ctrl for units."
      },
      'es' => {
        :status_texto => "Unidad: %s (CTRL) | Flechas IZQUIERDA y DERECHA cambian la rotación.",
        :console_ativo => "[RaycastTool] Activo. Medición de pared a pared ignorando ocultos.",
        :console_clique => "[Raycast] Clic ignorado. Use Ctrl para unidades."
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    def self.executar
      Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(Tool.new)
    end

    class Tool
      # Constantes
      EPS       = 1.mm unless defined?(EPS)
      VEC_EPS   = 1e-5 unless defined?(VEC_EPS)
      Z_AXIS    = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 1) unless defined?(Z_AXIS)
      X_AXIS    = Geom::Vector3d.new(1, 0, 0) unless defined?(X_AXIS)

      def activate
        @ip = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @preview_data = nil
        @rot_index = 0 
        @last_x = 0
        @last_y = 0

        setup_initial_unit
        Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate
        update_status_text
        puts MedirParedes.obter_texto(:console_ativo)
      end

      def deactivate(view)
        view.invalidate
      end

      def resume(view)
        update_status_text
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onCancel(reason, view)
        @preview_data = nil
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onKeyUp(key, repeat, flags, view)
        case key
        when VK_RIGHT
          @rot_index = (@rot_index + 1) % 4
          trigger_update(view)
        when VK_LEFT
          @rot_index = (@rot_index - 1) % 4
          trigger_update(view)
        when VK_CONTROL
          @unit_index = (@unit_index + 1) % 3
          trigger_update(view)
        end
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
      end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        @last_x, @last_y = x, y
        @ip.pick(view, x, y)
        @preview_data = calculate_raycast_hits(view, x, y)
        view.invalidate
      end

      def draw(view)
        @ip.draw(view) if @ip.valid?

        if @preview_data
          p_center, p_hit_pos, p_hit_neg = @preview_data
          
          pt_start = p_hit_neg ? p_hit_neg : p_center
          pt_end   = p_hit_pos ? p_hit_pos : p_center

          if pt_start != pt_end
            view.line_width = 2
            view.line_stipple = "_"
            view.drawing_color = "red" 
            view.draw(GL_LINES, pt_start, pt_end)
            view.draw_points([pt_start, pt_end], 10, 2, "red")

            total_dist = pt_start.distance(pt_end)
            text_str = format_distance(total_dist)

            screen_p1 = view.screen_coords(pt_start)
            screen_p2 = view.screen_coords(pt_end)
            
            text_pos = calculate_smart_text_pos(screen_p1, screen_p2)

            draw_highlighted_text(view, text_pos, text_str)
          end
        end
      end

      def draw_highlighted_text(view, screen_pt, text)
        options = { :color => "red", :size => 20, :bold => true, :font => "Arial" }
        begin
          view.draw_text(screen_pt, text, options)
        rescue
          view.draw_text(screen_pt, text)
        end
      end

      def calculate_smart_text_pos(sp1, sp2)
        mid_x = (sp1.x + sp2.x) / 2.0
        mid_y = (sp1.y + sp2.y) / 2.0
        
        vx = sp2.x - sp1.x
        vy = sp2.y - sp1.y
        len = Math.sqrt(vx*vx + vy*vy)
        offset_dist = 25.0

        return Geom::Point3d.new(mid_x, mid_y - offset_dist, 0) if len < 1.0

        ux = vx / len
        uy = vy / len
        perp_x = -uy
        perp_y = ux

        if perp_y > 0
          perp_x = -perp_x
          perp_y = -perp_y
        end

        final_x = mid_x + (perp_x * offset_dist) - 20
        final_y = mid_y + (perp_y * offset_dist) - 10

        Geom::Point3d.new(final_x, final_y, 0)
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        puts MedirParedes.obter_texto(:console_clique)
      end

      private

      def setup_initial_unit
        model_unit = Sketchup.active_model.options['UnitsOptions']['LengthUnit']
        case model_unit
        when 2 then @unit_index = 0 # mm
        when 3 then @unit_index = 1 # cm
        when 4 then @unit_index = 2 # m
        else        @unit_index = 1 
        end
      end

      def format_distance(dist_inch)
        val = 0.0
        suffix = ""
        case @unit_index
        when 0 then val = dist_inch.to_mm; suffix = "mm"
        when 1 then val = dist_inch.to_cm; suffix = "cm"
        when 2 then val = dist_inch.to_m;  suffix = "m"
        end
        sprintf("%.2f %s", val, suffix)
      end

      def update_status_text
        units = ["mm", "cm", "m"]
        cur_unit = units[@unit_index]
        Sketchup.set_status_text(sprintf(MedirParedes.obter_texto(:status_texto), cur_unit))
      end

      def trigger_update(view)
        update_status_text
        onMouseMove(0, @last_x, @last_y, view)
      end

      def calculate_raycast_hits(view, x, y)
        ph = view.pick_helper
        ph.do_pick(x, y)
        path = ph.path_at(0)
        return nil unless path && !path.empty?

        face = path.reverse.find { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::Face) }
        return nil unless face
        return nil unless @ip.valid?
        
        click_world = @ip.position

        insts = path.take_while { |e| e.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) }
        t_world_from_ctx = Geom::Transformation.new
        insts.each { |i| t_world_from_ctx *= i.transformation }

        normal_local = face.normal
        side_local = normal_local.cross(Z_AXIS)
        side_local = X_AXIS.clone if !side_local.valid? || side_local.length < VEC_EPS
        side_local.normalize!

        if @rot_index > 0
          angle = @rot_index * 90.degrees
          tr_rot = Geom::Transformation.rotation(Geom::Point3d.new(0,0,0), normal_local, angle)
          side_local.transform!(tr_rot)
        end

        side_world = side_local.transform(t_world_from_ctx)
        return nil if !side_world.valid? || side_world.length < VEC_EPS
        side_world.normalize!

        p2_pos = global_raycast_recursive(click_world, side_world)
        p2_neg = global_raycast_recursive(click_world, side_world.reverse)

        [click_world, p2_pos, p2_neg]
      end

      def global_raycast_recursive(start_pt_world, vec_world)
        return nil if vec_world.nil? || !vec_world.valid?
        
        current_origin = start_pt_world
        model = Sketchup.active_model

        100.times do
          origin_offset = current_origin.offset(vec_world, EPS)
          ray = [origin_offset, vec_world]
          
          result = model.raytest(ray, true) 
          
          return nil unless result 
          
          hit_point, hit_path = result

          if is_full_path_visible?(hit_path)
            return hit_point 
          else
            current_origin = hit_point
          end
        end
        
        return nil 
      end

      def is_full_path_visible?(path)
        path.each do |ent|
          return false if ent.respond_to?(:visible?) && !ent.visible?

          if ent.respond_to?(:layer)
            layer = ent.layer
            if layer.is_a?(String)
              l_obj = Sketchup.active_model.layers[layer]
              return false if l_obj && !l_obj.visible?
            elsif layer.respond_to?(:visible?)
              return false unless layer.visible?
            end
          end
        end
        true
      end

    end
  end
end

ScriptUpComunidade::MedirParedes.executar

title.es: Exportar imagen de la ventana gráfica

description.pt: Permite exportar imagens da viewport usando resoluções predefinidas ou personalizada e com controle de campo de visão (FOV).
description.en: Allows you to export images from the viewport using predefined or custom resolutions and with field of view (FOV) control.
description.es: Le permite exportar imágenes desde la ventana gráfica utilizando resoluciones predefinidas o personalizadas y con control del campo de visión (FOV).

description.pt: Contador de tempo de projeto. Ele para quando não está usando e, logo depois que começar a usar, volta a contar.
description.en: Project time counter. It stops when not in use and resumes counting as soon as it starts being used.
description.es: Contador de tiempo del proyecto. Se detiene cuando no se usa y reanuda el conteo en cuanto empieza a usarse.

description.pt: Automatiza a criação de estruturas padronizadas para arquitetura e interiores através de templates customizáveis. Ele permite organizar cenas em grupos (como Plantas ou Cortes), sincronizar câmeras e estilos em massa e gerenciar nomes de forma visual. Ideal para eliminar tarefas repetitivas e padronizar entregas técnicas no SketchUp.
description.en: Automates the creation of standardized structures for architecture and interiors through customizable templates. It allows you to organize scenes into groups (such as Plans or Sections), synchronize cameras and styles in bulk, and manage names visually. Ideal for eliminating repetitive tasks and standardizing technical deliverables in SketchUp.
description.es: Automatiza la creación de estructuras estandarizadas para arquitectura e interiores mediante plantillas personalizables. Permite organizar escenas en grupos (como planos o secciones), sincronizar cámaras y estilos en bloque y gestionar nombres visualmente. Ideal para eliminar tareas repetitivas y estandarizar los resultados técnicos en SketchUp.

    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    @dialog = nil

    def self.executar
      mostrar_painel
    end

    def self.mostrar_painel
      if @dialog && @dialog.visible?
        @dialog.bring_to_front
        return
      end

      @dialog = UI::HtmlDialog.new(
        {
          :dialog_title => obter_texto(:dialog_title),
          :preferences_key => "com.hd.scenemanager.ui",
          :scrollable => true,
          :resizable => true,
          :width => 380,
          :height => 720,
          :style => UI::HtmlDialog::STYLE_DIALOG
        }
      )

      @dialog.set_html(html_interface)
      configurar_callbacks(@dialog)
      @dialog.show
    end

    # =================================================================
    # SISTEMA DE ARQUIVOS DE TEMPLATES
    # =================================================================
    def self.caminho_arquivo_templates
      File.join(Dir.home, 'HillDantas_TemplatesCenas.json')
    end

    def self.obter_templates
      default_templates = {
        obter_texto(:arq_padrao) => {
          obter_texto(:plantas) => [obter_texto(:planta_baixa), obter_texto(:planta_cob)],
          obter_texto(:cortes) => [obter_texto(:corte_aa), obter_texto(:corte_bb)],
          obter_texto(:fachadas) => [obter_texto(:fachada_prin)],
          obter_texto(:perspectivas) => [obter_texto(:isometrica)]
        },
        obter_texto(:int_padrao) => {
          obter_texto(:plantas) => [obter_texto(:planta_layout), obter_texto(:planta_forro), obter_texto(:planta_pisos)],
          obter_texto(:detalhamento) => [obter_texto(:marcenaria_01), obter_texto(:marcenaria_02)],
          obter_texto(:vistas) => [obter_texto(:vista_int_01), obter_texto(:vista_int_02)]
        }
      }
      
      if File.exist?(caminho_arquivo_templates)
        begin
          return JSON.parse(File.read(caminho_arquivo_templates))
        rescue
          return default_templates
        end
      end
      
      default_templates
    end

    def self.salvar_templates_arquivo(hash_templates)
      File.write(caminho_arquivo_templates, hash_templates.to_json)
    end
    # =================================================================

    def self.configurar_callbacks(dialog)
      dialog.add_action_callback("carregar_dados_iniciais") do |_|
        enviar_dados_cenas()
        enviar_lista_templates()
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("carregar_cenas") do |_|
        enviar_dados_cenas 
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("salvar_template_atual") do |_, nome_template|
        templates = obter_templates()
        nome_limpo = nome_template.strip
        
        if templates.keys.size >= 10 && !templates.key?(nome_limpo)
          UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:limite_templates))
          next
        end

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        estrutura_atual = {}
        
        model.pages.each do |pagina|
          grupo = pagina.get_attribute('GerenciadorCenas', 'grupo')
          if grupo.nil? || grupo.to_s.strip.empty?
            match = pagina.name.match(/^\[(.*?)\]\s(.*)$/)
            grupo = match ? match[1] : obter_texto(:sem_grupo)
          end
          
          estrutura_atual[grupo] ||= []
          nome_cena = pagina.name.sub(/^\[.*?\]\s/, '')
          estrutura_atual[grupo] << nome_cena
        end

        templates[nome_limpo] = estrutura_atual
        salvar_templates_arquivo(templates)
        enviar_lista_templates()
        @dialog.execute_script(obter_texto(:toast_template_salvo) % nome_limpo)
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("salvar_edicao_template") do |_, nome_antigo, nome_novo, json_dados|
        templates = obter_templates()
        nome_novo_limpo = nome_novo.strip
        dados_novos = JSON.parse(json_dados)

        templates.delete(nome_antigo) if nome_antigo != nome_novo_limpo
        templates[nome_novo_limpo] = dados_novos
        
        salvar_templates_arquivo(templates)
        enviar_lista_templates()
        @dialog.execute_script(obter_texto(:toast_template_atualizado))
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("gerar_template_selecionado") do |_, nome_template|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          templates = obter_templates()
          estrutura = templates[nome_template]
          
          if estrutura
            model = Sketchup.active_model
            model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_gerar_template) % nome_template, true)
            
            cenas_criadas = 0
            estrutura.each do |grupo, nomes|
              nomes.each do |nome_cena|
                unless model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == nome_cena }
                  nova_pagina = model.pages.add(nome_cena)
                  nova_pagina.transition_time = 0.0
                  nova_pagina.set_attribute('GerenciadorCenas', 'grupo', grupo)
                  cenas_criadas += 1
                end
              end
            end
            model.commit_operation
            
            UI.start_timer(0.2, false) do
              enviar_dados_cenas()
              UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:msg_template_gerado) % [nome_template, cenas_criadas])
            end
          end
        end
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("excluir_template") do |_, nome_template|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          templates = obter_templates()
          templates.delete(nome_template)
          salvar_templates_arquivo(templates)
          enviar_lista_templates()
          @dialog.execute_script(obter_texto(:toast_template_excluido) % nome_template)
        end
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("criar_cena") do |_, grupo, nome|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          criar_cena_agrupada(grupo, nome)
          enviar_dados_cenas 
        end
      end
      
      dialog.add_action_callback("sincronizar_grupo") do |_, grupo, tipo|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          sincronizar_propriedade_grupo(grupo, tipo) 
        end
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("ativar_cena") do |_, nome_cena|
        model = Sketchup.active_model
        pagina = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == nome_cena }
        model.pages.selected_page = pagina if pagina
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("excluir_cena_confirmada") do |_, nome_cena|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          model = Sketchup.active_model
          pagina = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == nome_cena }
          if pagina
            if model.pages.selected_page == pagina
              pagina_segura = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p != pagina }
              model.pages.selected_page = pagina_segura if pagina_segura
            end
            model.pages.erase(pagina)
            UI.start_timer(0.5, false) { enviar_dados_cenas }
          end
        end
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("excluir_cenas_confirmadas") do |_, nomes_cenas|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          model = Sketchup.active_model
          paginas_para_apagar = nomes_cenas.map { |n| model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == n } }.compact
          if paginas_para_apagar.include?(model.pages.selected_page)
            pagina_segura = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| !paginas_para_apagar.include?(p) }
            model.pages.selected_page = pagina_segura if pagina_segura
          end
          paginas_para_apagar.reverse.each { |pagina| model.pages.erase(pagina) }
          UI.start_timer(0.5, false) { enviar_dados_cenas }
        end
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("mover_cenas_confirmadas") do |_, nomes_cenas, novo_grupo|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          model = Sketchup.active_model
          model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_mover_cenas), true)
          nomes_cenas.each do |nome_cena|
            pagina = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == nome_cena }
            if pagina && !novo_grupo.strip.empty?
              pagina.set_attribute('GerenciadorCenas', 'grupo', novo_grupo.strip)
            end
          end
          model.commit_operation
          UI.start_timer(0.1, false) { enviar_dados_cenas }
        end
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("renomear_cena_confirmada") do |_, nome_antigo, nome_novo|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          model = Sketchup.active_model
          pagina = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == nome_antigo }
          if pagina && !nome_novo.strip.empty?
            begin
              pagina.name = nome_novo.strip
            rescue
              UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:msg_cena_existe) % nome_novo.strip)
            end
            UI.start_timer(0.2, false) { enviar_dados_cenas }
          end
        end
      end

      dialog.add_action_callback("copiar_propriedades") do |_, source_name, target_name, tipo|
        UI.start_timer(0.0, false) do
          model = Sketchup.active_model
          source_page = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == source_name }
          target_page = model.pages.to_a.find { |p| p.name == target_name }
          if source_page && target_page
            source_page.transition_time = 0.0
            model.pages.selected_page = source_page
            UI.start_timer(0.15, false) do
              model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_colar_prop), true)
              flags = (tipo == 'camera') ? 1 : (2 | 16 | 32 | 64)
              target_page.update(flags)
              model.commit_operation
              target_page.transition_time = 0.0
              model.pages.selected_page = target_page
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end

    def self.enviar_lista_templates
      templates = obter_templates()
      @dialog.execute_script("atualizarSelectTemplates(#{templates.to_json})")
    end

    def self.enviar_dados_cenas
      model = Sketchup.active_model
      dados = {}
      
      model.pages.each do |pagina|
        grupo = pagina.get_attribute('GerenciadorCenas', 'grupo')
        if grupo.nil? || grupo.to_s.strip.empty?
          match = pagina.name.match(/^\[(.*?)\]\s(.*)$/)
          if match
            grupo = match[1]
            nome_limpo = match[2]
            pagina.set_attribute('GerenciadorCenas', 'grupo', grupo)
            pagina.name = nome_limpo rescue nil 
          else
            grupo = obter_texto(:sem_grupo)
          end
        end
     
        dados[grupo] ||= []
        dados[grupo] << pagina.name
      end
      
      @dialog.execute_script("atualizarUI(#{dados.to_json})")
    end

    def self.criar_cena_agrupada(grupo, nome_cena)
      return if grupo.empty? || nome_cena.empty?
      model = Sketchup.active_model
      model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_criar_cena), true)
      nova_pagina = model.pages.add(nome_cena)
      nova_pagina.transition_time = 0.0
      nova_pagina.set_attribute('GerenciadorCenas', 'grupo', grupo)
      model.commit_operation
    end

    def self.sincronizar_propriedade_grupo(grupo_alvo, tipo)
      model = Sketchup.active_model
      cena_atual = model.pages.selected_page
      return UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:msg_ative_cena_base)) unless cena_atual

      model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_sync_grupo) % tipo, true)
      flags = tipo == "camera" ? 1 : (2 | 16 | 32 | 64) 
      contador = 0
      model.pages.each do |pagina|
        grupo_da_pagina = pagina.get_attribute('GerenciadorCenas', 'grupo', obter_texto(:sem_grupo))
        if grupo_da_pagina == grupo_alvo && pagina != cena_atual
          pagina.update(flags)
          contador += 1
        end
      end
      model.commit_operation
      UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:msg_cenas_atualizadas) % [contador, grupo_alvo])
    end

    # --- INTERFACE HTML/CSS/JS ---
    def self.html_interface
      <<~HTML
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <head>
          <meta charset="UTF-8">
          <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
          <style>
            :root {
              --bg-body: #f4f6f8;
              --bg-panel: #ffffff;
              --bg-editor-grp: #f8f9fa;
              --text-main: #333333;
              --text-muted: #666666;
              --border: #e0e0e0;
              --primary: #0078d7;
              --primary-hover: #005a9e;
              --success: #28a745;
              --danger: #dc3545;
              --item-hover: #eef5fa;
              --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
              --modal-bg: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            }

            body.dark-mode {
              --bg-body: #1e1e1e;
              --bg-panel: #252526;
              --bg-editor-grp: #2d2d30;
              --text-main: #d4d4d4;
              --text-muted: #aaaaaa;
              --border: #3c3c3c;
              --primary: #3a96dd;
              --primary-hover: #5ab0f7;
              --success: #32c455;
              --danger: #f04757;
              --item-hover: #37373d;
              --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
              --modal-bg: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
            }

            body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif; padding: 15px;
                   background-color: var(--bg-body); color: var(--text-main); margin: 0; transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s;
            }
            
            .top-bar { display: flex;
                       justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; }
            h2 { font-size: 16px;
                 margin: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-main);
            }
            .theme-btn { background: var(--bg-panel); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-main);
                         border-radius: 50%; width: 32px; height: 32px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px var(--shadow);
                         transition: all 0.2s; }
            .theme-btn:hover { background: var(--item-hover);
            }

            .section-title { font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: var(--text-muted);
                             border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 5px; margin: 15px 0 10px 0; display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
                             align-items: center;}

            .btn { background-color: var(--primary); color: white; border: none;
                   padding: 8px 12px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: bold; transition: background 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px var(--shadow);
            }
            .btn:hover { background-color: var(--primary-hover);
            }
            .btn-success { background-color: var(--success); width: 100%;
            }
            .btn-success:hover { filter: brightness(0.9);
            }
            .btn-secondary { background-color: var(--bg-panel); color: var(--text-main); border: 1px solid var(--border);
                             box-shadow: none; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
                             gap: 5px;}
            .btn-secondary:hover { background-color: var(--item-hover);
            }

            .template-block { background: var(--bg-panel); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px;
                              border: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 5px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px var(--shadow);
            }
            .template-row-1 { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px;
            }
            .template-row-2 { display: flex; gap: 8px;
            }

            .btn-inline-add { background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--primary); color: var(--primary);
                              border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;
                              margin-right: 5px;}
            .btn-inline-add:hover { background: var(--primary); color: white;
            }
            
            .btn-sync { background-color: var(--bg-body);
                        color: var(--text-main); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 11px; margin-right: 5px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
            }
            .btn-sync:hover { background-color: var(--item-hover); border-color: var(--primary);
            }
            .btn-refresh { background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px;
                           padding: 3px 8px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-muted); transition: all 0.2s;
            }
            .btn-refresh:hover { background-color: var(--item-hover); color: var(--primary);
            }
            
            .form-group { display: flex;
                          gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
            input[type="text"], select { flex: 1;
                                         padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; background-color: var(--bg-panel); color: var(--text-main); font-family: inherit; outline: none; transition: border 0.2s;
                                         font-size: 13px;}
            input[type="text"]:focus, select:focus { border-color: var(--primary);
            }
            
            details { background: var(--bg-panel);
                      padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px var(--shadow); border: 1px solid var(--border); transition: all 0.2s;
            }
            summary { font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; outline: none; margin-bottom: 5px;
                      color: var(--text-main); font-size: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; user-select: none;
            }
            summary::-webkit-details-marker { display:none;
            }
            .summary-content { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex: 1;
            }
            .summary-arrow { color: var(--text-muted); transition: transform 0.2s;
                             margin-left: 5px;}
            details[open] .summary-arrow { transform: rotate(180deg);
            }
            
            ul { list-style-type: none;
                 padding: 0; margin: 8px 0 0 0; }
            li { display: flex;
                 align-items: center; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-main); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s; margin-bottom: 2px;
            }
            li:hover { background-color: var(--item-hover);
            }
            .scene-cb { margin-right: 10px; cursor: pointer; width: 15px; height: 15px;
                        accent-color: var(--primary); }
            .cena-nome { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
                         white-space: nowrap; }

            .actions { margin-top: 12px; display: flex;
                       border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 10px; }

            #contextMenu {
              display: none;
              position: absolute; background: var(--bg-panel); border: 1px solid var(--border); 
              box-shadow: 0 4px 12px var(--shadow); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 0; z-index: 1000;
              min-width: 190px;
            }
            .cm-item { padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 13px;
                       cursor: pointer; position: relative; color: var(--text-main); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
            }
            .cm-item:hover { background-color: var(--primary); color: white;
            }
            .cm-item.danger:hover { background-color: var(--danger); color: white;
            }
            
            .has-submenu::after { content: "▸";
                                  margin-left: auto; font-size: 16px; }
            .submenu { display: none; position: absolute;
                       left: 100%; top: -1px; background: var(--bg-panel); border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px var(--shadow); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 0;
                       min-width: 150px; }
            .has-submenu:hover .submenu { display: block;
            }
            .submenu-item { padding: 8px 16px; color: var(--text-main); font-size: 13px;
                            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;}
            .submenu-item:hover { background-color: var(--primary);
                                  color: white; }

            #menuColar { display: none; color: var(--primary); font-weight: bold;
                         border-top: 1px solid var(--border); margin-top: 4px; padding-top: 8px; }
            #menuColar:hover { background-color: var(--primary);
                               color: white; }

            /* Modais */
            .modal-overlay { display: none;
                             position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--modal-bg); z-index: 2000; align-items: center; justify-content: center; backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
            }
            .modal-box { background: var(--bg-panel); padding: 20px; border-radius: 10px; width: 85%;
                         max-width: 320px; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            }
            .modal-box h3 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 12px;
                            color: var(--text-main); }
            .modal-buttons { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 10px;
                             margin-top: 20px; }
            .btn-cancel { background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted);
                          border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
            }
            .btn-cancel:hover { background: var(--bg-body); color: var(--text-main);
            }
            .btn-confirm-modal { background: var(--primary); color: white; padding: 8px 14px;
                                 border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
            }
            .btn-danger-modal { background: var(--danger); color: white; padding: 8px 14px;
                                border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
            }
            
            .tpl-list-item { display: flex;
                             justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-main);
            }
            .tpl-list-item:last-child { border-bottom: none;
            }
            .tpl-actions { display: flex; gap: 5px;
            }
            .tpl-btn-edit { color: var(--primary); cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold;

                                  color: white; }
            .tpl-btn-delete { color: var(--danger); cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold;
                              padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; transition: 0.2s;}
            .tpl-btn-delete:hover { background: var(--danger);
                                    color: white; }

            /* EDITOR VISUAL DE TEMPLATE */
            .edit-area { max-height: 400px;
                         overflow-y: auto; padding-right: 5px; margin-top: 15px;}
            .edit-grp-block { background: var(--bg-editor-grp);
                              border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px;
            }
            .edit-grp-header { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px;
            }

            }
            .edit-scn-list { margin-left: 15px; border-left: 2px solid var(--border); padding-left: 10px;
                             margin-bottom: 8px; }
            .edit-scn-item { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center;
                             margin-bottom: 5px; }
            .edit-scn-input { flex: 1; padding: 5px !important;
                              font-size: 12px !important; }
            .btn-icon-del { background: transparent; border: none;
                            color: var(--danger); cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 4px;
            }
            .btn-icon-del:hover { background: var(--danger); color: white;
            }
            .btn-add-mini { background: transparent; border: 1px dashed var(--primary); color: var(--primary);
                            padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; width: 100%; text-align: left;
                            transition: 0.2s;}
            .btn-add-mini:hover { background: var(--primary); color: white; border-style: solid;
            }

            #toast { visibility: hidden; min-width: 200px; background-color: var(--text-main); color: var(--bg-panel);
                     text-align: center; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px; position: fixed; z-index: 3000; left: 50%; bottom: 20px; transform: translateX(-50%); font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold;
                     opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s, bottom 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px var(--shadow);
            }
            #toast.show { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; bottom: 40px;
            }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>

          <div class="top-bar">
            <h2>#{obter_texto(:html_titulo_painel)}</h2>
            <button class="theme-btn" id="btnTheme" onclick="toggleTheme()" title="#{obter_texto(:title_alt_tema)}">🌙</button>
          </div>

          <div class="template-block">
            <div class="template-row-1">
              <select id="selectTemplateAtual"></select>
              <button class="btn" style="flex: 0 0 45px; padding: 0; font-size: 18px;"
                      onclick="acionarGerarTemplate()" title="#{obter_texto(:title_gerar_template)}">⚡</button>
            </div>
            <div class="template-row-2">
              <button class="btn btn-secondary" style="flex: 1;"
                      onclick="abrirModalSalvarTemplate()">#{obter_texto(:btn_salvar_modelo)}</button>
              <button class="btn btn-secondary" style="flex: 0 0 45px; padding: 0; font-size: 16px;"
                      onclick="abrirModalGerenciarTemplates()" title="#{obter_texto(:title_gerenciar_templates)}">⚙️</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div class="section-title">#{obter_texto(:html_criar_nova_cena)}</div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <input type="text" id="grupoInput" placeholder="#{obter_texto(:placeholder_grupo)}">
            <input type="text" id="nomeInput" placeholder="#{obter_texto(:placeholder_nome)}" onkeypress="handleEnter(event)">
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="criarCena()">#{obter_texto(:btn_add_cena)}</button>

          <div class="section-title">
            #{obter_texto(:html_suas_cenas)} 
            <button class="btn-refresh" onclick="sketchup.carregar_cenas()" title="#{obter_texto(:title_atualizar)}">#{obter_texto(:btn_atualizar)}</button>
          </div>
          <div id="listaCenas">#{obter_texto(:html_carregando)}</div>

          <div id="contextMenu">
            <div class="cm-item" id="cm-agrupar" onclick="acionarMenu('agrupar_bulk')" style="font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 8px;
                 margin-bottom: 3px;">#{obter_texto(:menu_criar_grupo_sel)}</div>
            <div class="cm-item" id="cm-mover" onclick="acionarMenu('mover')">#{obter_texto(:menu_mover_grupo)}</div>
            <div class="cm-item" id="cm-renomear" onclick="acionarMenu('renomear')">#{obter_texto(:menu_renomear)}</div>
            <div class="cm-item has-submenu" id="cm-copiar">#{obter_texto(:menu_copiar_prop)}
              <div class="submenu">
                <div class="submenu-item" onclick="acionarCopiar('camera')">#{obter_texto(:menu_copiar_cam)}</div>
                <div class="submenu-item" onclick="acionarCopiar('estilo_tags')">#{obter_texto(:menu_copiar_estilo)}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="cm-item" id="menuColar" onclick="acionarColar()">#{obter_texto(:menu_colar_prop)}</div>
            <div class="cm-item danger" id="cm-excluir" onclick="acionarMenu('excluir')" style="border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
                 margin-top: 3px; padding-top: 8px;">#{obter_texto(:menu_excluir_cena)}</div>
          </div>

          <div id="modalOverlay" class="modal-overlay">
            <div class="modal-box">
              <h3 id="modalTitle">#{obter_texto(:modal_titulo_default)}</h3>
              <input type="text" id="modalInput" style="display:none; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;">
              <p id="modalText" style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 5px; display:none;"></p>
              <div id="moverContainer" style="display:none; margin-top: 10px;">
                <select id="selectGrupo" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px;"></select>
                <input type="text" id="inputNovoGrupo" placeholder="#{obter_texto(:placeholder_novo_grupo)}" style="display:none; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;">
              </div>
              <div class="modal-buttons">
                <button class="btn-cancel" onclick="fecharModal()">#{obter_texto(:btn_cancelar)}</button>
                <button id="modalBtnConfirm" class="btn-confirm-modal" onclick="confirmarModal()">#{obter_texto(:btn_ok)}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div id="modalGerenciarTemplates" class="modal-overlay">
            <div class="modal-box" style="width: 90%; max-width: 350px;">
              <h3>#{obter_texto(:html_gerenciar_templates)}</h3>
              <div id="listaGerenciarTemplates" style="max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--bg-body); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px;"></div>
              <div class="modal-buttons">
                <button class="btn-cancel" onclick="fecharModalTemplates()">#{obter_texto(:btn_fechar)}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div id="modalEditorVisual" class="modal-overlay">
            <div class="modal-box" style="width: 95%; max-width: 450px;">
              <h3>#{obter_texto(:html_editor_template)}</h3>
              <p style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: -10px; margin-bottom: 10px;">#{obter_texto(:html_edite_nomes)}</p>
              
              <label style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; color: var(--text-muted);">#{obter_texto(:html_nome_template)}</label>
              <input type="text" id="editTplName" style="font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 10px;">
              
              <div class="edit-area" id="editTplContent"></div>
              
              <button class="btn-add-mini" style="text-align: center; padding: 8px; margin-top: 10px;" onclick="adicionarGrupoVazioNoEditor()">#{obter_texto(:btn_criar_novo_grupo)}</button>

              <div class="modal-buttons">
                <button class="btn-cancel" onclick="fecharEditorVisual()">#{obter_texto(:btn_cancelar)}</button>
                <button class="btn-confirm-modal" onclick="salvarEditorVisual()">#{obter_texto(:btn_salvar_alt)}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div id="toast">#{obter_texto(:html_notificacao)}</div>

          <script>
            let objetoTemplates = {}; 
            let nomeTemplateEmEdicao = "";

            function toggleTheme() {
              const body = document.body;
              body.classList.toggle('dark-mode');
              const isDark = body.classList.contains('dark-mode');
              localStorage.setItem('hd_theme', isDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
              document.getElementById('btnTheme').textContent = isDark ? '☀️' : '🌙';
            }

            function obterIcone(grupo) {
              const nome = grupo.toLowerCase();
              if (nome.includes('planta') || nome.includes('plan')) return '📐';
              if (nome.includes('corte') || nome.includes('seção') || nome.includes('secção') || nome.includes('section')) return '✂️';
              if (nome.includes('fachada') || nome.includes('elevação') || nome.includes('elevation')) return '🏠';
              if (nome.includes('perspectiva') || nome.includes('3d') || nome.includes('vista') || nome.includes('view') || nome.includes('perspective')) return '👁️';
              if (nome.includes('marcenaria') || nome.includes('detalhe') || nome.includes('millwork') || nome.includes('detail') || nome.includes('carpintería') || nome.includes('detalle')) return '🪚';
              if (nome.includes('forro') || nome.includes('teto') || nome.includes('ceiling') || nome.includes('techo')) return '💡';
              if (nome === "#{obter_texto(:sem_grupo)}") return '📁';
              return '📂';
            }

            let cenasAlvoContextMenu = [];
            let modalAcao = "";
            let modalAlvo = "";
            let cenaCopiada = null;
            let tipoCopiado = null;
            let gruposAtuais = []; 

            window.onload = function() { 
              if (localStorage.getItem('hd_theme') === 'dark') {
                document.body.classList.add('dark-mode');
                document.getElementById('btnTheme').textContent = '☀️';
              }
              sketchup.carregar_dados_iniciais(); 
            };
            function handleEnter(e) { if(e.key === 'Enter') criarCena(); }

            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
              const menu = document.getElementById('contextMenu');
              if (!menu.contains(e.target)) { menu.style.display = 'none'; }
            });
            document.getElementById('selectGrupo').addEventListener('change', function() {
              if (this.value === 'novo') {
                document.getElementById('inputNovoGrupo').style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('inputNovoGrupo').focus();
              } else {
                document.getElementById('inputNovoGrupo').style.display = 'none';
              }
            });

            function mostrarToast(mensagem) {
              const toast = document.getElementById("toast");
              toast.textContent = mensagem;
              toast.className = "show";
              setTimeout(function(){ toast.className = toast.className.replace("show", ""); }, 2500);
            }

            function prepararNovaCenaNoGrupo(grupo) {
              const grupoAlvo = (grupo === "#{obter_texto(:sem_grupo)}") ? "" : grupo;
              document.getElementById('grupoInput').value = grupoAlvo;
              document.getElementById('nomeInput').focus();
            }

            function atualizarSelectTemplates(templatesHash) {
              objetoTemplates = templatesHash;
              const nomesTemplates = Object.keys(templatesHash);
              
              const select = document.getElementById('selectTemplateAtual');
              select.innerHTML = '';
              if (nomesTemplates.length === 0) {
                const opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_nenhum_template)}";
                select.appendChild(opt);
                return;
              }

              nomesTemplates.forEach(t => {
                const opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.value = t;
                opt.textContent = `📁 ${t}`;
                select.appendChild(opt);
              });
            }

            function acionarGerarTemplate() {
              const select = document.getElementById('selectTemplateAtual');
              if (select.value && select.value !== "#{obter_texto(:js_nenhum_template)}") {
                sketchup.gerar_template_selecionado(select.value);
              }
            }

            function abrirModalSalvarTemplate() {
              modalAcao = "salvar_template";
              document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent = "#{obter_texto(:btn_salvar_modelo)}";
              document.getElementById('modalText').style.display = 'block';
              document.getElementById('modalText').textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_estrutura_atual)}";
              document.getElementById('modalInput').style.display = 'block';
              document.getElementById('modalInput').value = '';
              document.getElementById('moverContainer').style.display = 'none';
              
              const btn = document.getElementById('modalBtnConfirm');
              btn.className = 'btn-confirm-modal';
              btn.textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_salvar_template)}";
              document.getElementById('modalOverlay').style.display = 'flex';
              document.getElementById('modalInput').focus();
            }

            function abrirModalGerenciarTemplates() {
              const container = document.getElementById('listaGerenciarTemplates');
              container.innerHTML = '';
              const nomes = Object.keys(objetoTemplates);

              if (nomes.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = `<p style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 10px;">#{obter_texto(:js_vazio)}</p>`;
              } else {
                nomes.forEach(t => {
                  const div = document.createElement('div');
                  div.className = 'tpl-list-item';
                  
                  const span = document.createElement('span');
                  span.textContent = t;
                  span.style.fontWeight = "bold";
                  
                  const actions = document.createElement('div');
                  actions.className = 'tpl-actions';

                  const btnEdit = document.createElement('span');
                  btnEdit.className = 'tpl-btn-edit';
                  btnEdit.innerHTML = "#{obter_texto(:js_editar)}";
                  btnEdit.onclick = () => {
                    fecharModalTemplates();
                    abrirEditorVisual(t);
                  };
                  
                  const btnExcluir = document.createElement('span');
                  btnExcluir.className = 'tpl-btn-delete';
                  btnExcluir.innerHTML = '🗑️';
                  btnExcluir.title = "#{obter_texto(:js_excluir_template_title)}";
                  btnExcluir.onclick = () => {
                    fecharModalTemplates();
                    modalAcao = "excluir_template";
                    modalAlvo = t;
                    document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_aviso_exclusao)}";
                    document.getElementById('modalText').style.display = 'block';
                    document.getElementById('modalText').textContent = `#{obter_texto(:js_msg_excluir_template)}`;
                    document.getElementById('modalInput').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('moverContainer').style.display = 'none';
                    const btnConf = document.getElementById('modalBtnConfirm');
                    btnConf.className = 'btn-danger-modal';
                    btnConf.textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_excluir)}";
                    document.getElementById('modalOverlay').style.display = 'flex';
                  };

                  actions.appendChild(btnEdit);
                  actions.appendChild(btnExcluir);
                  div.appendChild(span);
                  div.appendChild(actions);
                  container.appendChild(div);
                });
              }
              document.getElementById('modalGerenciarTemplates').style.display = 'flex';
            }

            function fecharModalTemplates() {
              document.getElementById('modalGerenciarTemplates').style.display = 'none';
            }

            function abrirEditorVisual(nomeTpl) {
              nomeTemplateEmEdicao = nomeTpl;
              document.getElementById('editTplName').value = nomeTpl;
              
              const estrutura = objetoTemplates[nomeTpl];
              const container = document.getElementById('editTplContent');
              container.innerHTML = '';
              for (const [grupo, cenas] of Object.entries(estrutura)) {
                if (grupo === "#{obter_texto(:sem_grupo)}") continue;
                container.appendChild(criarBlocoGrupoEditor(grupo, cenas));
              }
              
              document.getElementById('modalEditorVisual').style.display = 'flex';
            }

            function criarBlocoGrupoEditor(nomeGrupo, arrayCenas) {
              const divGrp = document.createElement('div');
              divGrp.className = 'edit-grp-block';

              const header = document.createElement('div');
              header.className = 'edit-grp-header';
              
              const inputGrp = document.createElement('input');
              inputGrp.type = 'text';
              inputGrp.className = 'edit-grp-input';
              inputGrp.value = nomeGrupo;
              inputGrp.placeholder = "#{obter_texto(:js_nome_grupo)}";

              const btnDelGrp = document.createElement('button');
              btnDelGrp.className = 'btn-icon-del';
              btnDelGrp.innerHTML = '🗑️';
              btnDelGrp.title = "#{obter_texto(:js_apagar_grupo)}";
              btnDelGrp.onclick = () => divGrp.remove();

              header.appendChild(inputGrp);
              header.appendChild(btnDelGrp);
              divGrp.appendChild(header);

              const divList = document.createElement('div');
              divList.className = 'edit-scn-list';
              arrayCenas.forEach(cena => {
                divList.appendChild(criarLinhaCenaEditor(cena));
              });
              divGrp.appendChild(divList);

              const btnAddScn = document.createElement('button');
              btnAddScn.className = 'btn-add-mini';
              btnAddScn.innerHTML = "#{obter_texto(:js_nova_cena_grupo)}";
              btnAddScn.onclick = () => {
                const novaLinha = criarLinhaCenaEditor("");
                divList.appendChild(novaLinha);
                novaLinha.querySelector('input').focus();
              };
              divGrp.appendChild(btnAddScn);

              return divGrp;
            }

            function criarLinhaCenaEditor(nomeCena) {
              const item = document.createElement('div');
              item.className = 'edit-scn-item';

              const inputScn = document.createElement('input');
              inputScn.type = 'text';
              inputScn.className = 'edit-scn-input';
              inputScn.value = nomeCena;
              inputScn.placeholder = "#{obter_texto(:js_nome_cena)}";

              const btnDelScn = document.createElement('button');
              btnDelScn.className = 'btn-icon-del';
              btnDelScn.innerHTML = '✕';
              btnDelScn.onclick = () => item.remove();
              item.appendChild(inputScn);
              item.appendChild(btnDelScn);
              return item;
            }

            function adicionarGrupoVazioNoEditor() {
              const container = document.getElementById('editTplContent');
              const novoGrp = criarBlocoGrupoEditor("", [""]);
              container.appendChild(novoGrp);
              novoGrp.querySelector('.edit-grp-input').focus();
              container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
            }

            function fecharEditorVisual() {
              document.getElementById('modalEditorVisual').style.display = 'none';
            }

            function salvarEditorVisual() {
              const nomeNovo = document.getElementById('editTplName').value.trim();
              if (!nomeNovo) {
                mostrarToast("#{obter_texto(:js_template_sem_nome)}");
                return;
              }

              const novoJSON = {};
              const blocosGrupo = document.querySelectorAll('.edit-grp-block');
              
              blocosGrupo.forEach(bloco => {
                const nomeGrp = bloco.querySelector('.edit-grp-input').value.trim();
                if (!nomeGrp) return; 
                
                if (!novoJSON[nomeGrp]) novoJSON[nomeGrp] = [];
                
                const inputsCena = bloco.querySelectorAll('.edit-scn-input');
                inputsCena.forEach(input => {
                  const val = input.value.trim();
                  if (val) novoJSON[nomeGrp].push(val);
                });
              });
              sketchup.salvar_edicao_template(nomeTemplateEmEdicao, nomeNovo, JSON.stringify(novoJSON));
              fecharEditorVisual();
            }

            function atualizarUI(dados) {
              const container = document.getElementById('listaCenas');
              container.innerHTML = '';
              gruposAtuais = Object.keys(dados);

              if (gruposAtuais.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = `<p style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px 0;">#{obter_texto(:js_nenhuma_cena)}</p>`;
                return;
              }

              for (const [grupo, cenas] of Object.entries(dados)) {
                const details = document.createElement('details');
                details.open = true;
                
                const summary = document.createElement('summary');
                const icone = obterIcone(grupo);
                
                const divContent = document.createElement('div');
                divContent.className = 'summary-content';
                if(grupo === "#{obter_texto(:sem_grupo)}") {
                  divContent.innerHTML = `${icone} #{obter_texto(:js_cenas_soltas)} <span style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; font-weight:normal;">(${cenas.length})</span>`;
                } else {
                  divContent.innerHTML = `${icone} ${grupo} <span style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; font-weight:normal;">(${cenas.length})</span>`;
                }

                const rightWrapper = document.createElement('div');
                rightWrapper.style.display = 'flex';
                rightWrapper.style.alignItems = 'center';

                if(grupo !== "#{obter_texto(:sem_grupo)}") {
                  const btnAddInline = document.createElement('button');
                  btnAddInline.className = 'btn-inline-add';
                  btnAddInline.textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_nova)}";
                  btnAddInline.title = `#{obter_texto(:js_add_nova_cena_em)}`;
                  btnAddInline.onclick = (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    prepararNovaCenaNoGrupo(grupo);
                  };
                  rightWrapper.appendChild(btnAddInline);
                }

                const arrow = document.createElement('span');
                arrow.className = 'summary-arrow';
                arrow.textContent = '▾';
                rightWrapper.appendChild(arrow);

                summary.appendChild(divContent);
                summary.appendChild(rightWrapper);
                details.appendChild(summary);

                const ul = document.createElement('ul');
                cenas.forEach(cena => {
                  const li = document.createElement('li');
                  
                  const cb = document.createElement('input');
                  cb.type = 'checkbox';
                  cb.className = 'scene-cb';
          
                  cb.value = cena;
                  cb.onclick = (e) => e.stopPropagation();
                  
                  const nomeSpan = document.createElement('span');
                  nomeSpan.className = 'cena-nome';
                  nomeSpan.textContent = cena;
                  
                  li.appendChild(cb);
                  li.appendChild(nomeSpan);
                  
                  nomeSpan.onclick = () => sketchup.ativar_cena(cena);
                 
                  li.oncontextmenu = (e) => {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const marcadas = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.scene-cb:checked')).map(el => el.value);
                    
                    if (marcadas.includes(cena) && marcadas.length > 1) {
                      cenasAlvoContextMenu = marcadas;
                      configurarMenuEmMassa(marcadas.length);
                    } else {
                      cenasAlvoContextMenu = [cena];
                      configurarMenuSimples(cena);
                    }

                    const menu = document.getElementById('contextMenu');
                    menu.style.display = 'block';
                    
                    let posX = e.pageX;
                    let posY = e.pageY;
                    if (posX + 190 > window.innerWidth) posX = window.innerWidth - 200;
                    
                    menu.style.left = posX + 'px';
                    menu.style.top = posY + 'px';
                  };
                  
                  ul.appendChild(li);
                });
                details.appendChild(ul);

                if (grupo !== "#{obter_texto(:sem_grupo)}") {
                  const actionsDiv = document.createElement('div');
                  actionsDiv.className = 'actions';
                  
                  const btnCam = document.createElement('button');
                  btnCam.className = 'btn-sync';
                  btnCam.textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_sync_cam)}";
                  btnCam.onclick = () => sketchup.sincronizar_grupo(grupo, 'camera');

                  const btnEstilo = document.createElement('button');
                  btnEstilo.className = 'btn-sync';
                  btnEstilo.textContent = "#{obter_texto(:js_sync_estilos)}";
                  btnEstilo.onclick = () => sketchup.sincronizar_grupo(grupo, 'estilo_tags');

                  actionsDiv.appendChild(btnCam);
                  actionsDiv.appendChild(btnEstilo);
                  details.appendChild(actionsDiv);
                }
                container.appendChild(details);
              }
            }

            function configurarMenuEmMassa(qtd) {
              document.getElementById('cm-agrupar').style.display = 'flex';
              document.getElementById('cm-agrupar').innerHTML = `#{obter_texto(:js_criar_grupo_qtd)}`;
              document.getElementById('cm-mover').innerHTML = `#{obter_texto(:js_mover_qtd)}`;
              document.getElementById('cm-excluir').innerHTML = `#{obter_texto(:js_excluir_qtd)}`;
              document.getElementById('cm-renomear').style.display = 'none';
              document.getElementById('cm-copiar').style.display = 'none';
              document.getElementById('menuColar').style.display = 'none';
            }

            function configurarMenuSimples(cenaAlvo) {
              document.getElementById('cm-agrupar').style.display = 'none';
              document.getElementById('cm-mover').innerHTML = "#{obter_texto(:menu_mover_grupo)}";
              document.getElementById('cm-excluir').innerHTML = "#{obter_texto(:menu_excluir_cena)}";
              document.getElementById('cm-renomear').style.display = 'flex';
              document.getElementById('cm-copiar').style.display = 'flex';
              const btnColar = document.getElementById('menuColar');
              if (cenaCopiada && cenaCopiada !== cenaAlvo) {
                btnColar.style.display = 'flex';
                const txt = (tipoCopiado === 'camera') ? "#{obter_texto(:js_camera)}" : "#{obter_texto(:js_estilo)}";
                btnColar.innerHTML = `#{obter_texto(:js_colar_de)}`;
              } else {
                btnColar.style.display = 'none';
              }
            }

            function criarCena() {
              const grupo = document.getElementById('grupoInput').value.trim();
              const nome = document.getElementById('nomeInput').value.trim();
              if (grupo && nome) {
                sketchup.criar_cena(grupo, nome);
                document.getElementById('nomeInput').value = ''; 
              }
            }

            function acionarCopiar(tipo) {
              document.getElementById('contextMenu').style.display = 'none';
              cenaCopiada = cenasAlvoContextMenu[0];
              tipoCopiado = tipo;
              const txt = (tipo === 'camera') ? "#{obter_texto(:js_camera)}" : "#{obter_texto(:js_estilos_tags)}";
              mostrarToast(`#{obter_texto(:js_copiada_de)}`);
            }

            function acionarColar() {
              document.getElementById('contextMenu').style.display = 'none';
              if (cenaCopiada && tipoCopiado && cenasAlvoContextMenu.length === 1) {
                mostrarToast(`#{obter_texto(:js_colando_em)}`);
                setTimeout(() => { sketchup.copiar_propriedades(cenaCopiada, cenasAlvoContextMenu[0], tipoCopiado); }, 100);
              }
            }

            function acionarMenu(acao) {
              document.getElementById('contextMenu').style.display = 'none';
              document.getElementById('modalInput').style.display = 'none';
              document.getElementById('modalText').style.display = 'none';
              document.getElementById('moverContainer').style.display = 'none';
              
              if (acao === 'excluir') {
                modalAcao = "excluir_cena";
                document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent = cenasAlvoContextMenu.length > 1 ? "#{obter_texto(:js_exclusao_massa)}" : "#{obter_texto(:js_aviso_exclusao)}";
                document.getElementById('modalText').style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('modalText').textContent = cenasAlvoContextMenu.length > 1 
                  ? `#{obter_texto(:js_msg_excluir_massa)}`
                  : `#{obter_texto(:js_msg_excluir_unica)}`;
                const btn = document.getElementById('modalBtnConfirm');
