"Planes Only" }, 'es' => { :titulo_janela => "Control de Tiradores de Escala", :msg_selecione => "Seleccione un grupo o componente.", :msg_apenas_um => "Seleccione solo UN objeto a la vez.", :msg_selecionado => " seleccionado.", :grupo => "Grupo", :componente => "Componente", :cabecalho => "Tiradores de Herramienta Escala", :eixo_x => "Eje X", :eixo_y => "Eje Y", :eixo_z => "Eje Z", :plano_xz => "Plano XZ", :plano_yz => "Plano YZ", :plano_xy => "Plano XY", :uniforme => "Uniforme XYZ", :detalhe_face => "2 caras", :detalhe_aresta => "4 aristas", :detalhe_quina => "8 esquinas", :btn_tudo_on => "Todo ON", :btn_tudo_off => "Todo OFF", :btn_so_eixos => "Solo Ejes", :btn_so_planos => "Solo Planos" } } def self.obter_texto(chave) locale = Sketchup.get_locale lang = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US' IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s end # ─── Bits (guard contra re-load) ──────────────────────────────────── BIT_X ||= 1 BIT_Y ||= 2 BIT_Z ||= 4 BIT_XZ ||= 8 BIT_YZ ||= 16 BIT_XY ||= 32 BIT_UNIFORM ||= 64 CORES ||= { BIT_X => [220, 50, 50], BIT_Y => [50, 180, 50], BIT_Z => [60, 120, 230], BIT_XZ => [170, 90, 220], BIT_YZ => [50, 190, 170], BIT_XY => [220, 190, 40], BIT_UNIFORM => [240, 130, 50] }.freeze TAM_FACE ||= 12 TAM_ARESTA ||= 9 TAM_QUINA ||= 11 LIMIAR_DRAG ||= 6 def self.ponto_medio(p1, p2) Geom::Point3d.new((p1.x + p2.x) * 0.5, (p1.y + p2.y) * 0.5, (p1.z + p2.z) * 0.5) end def self.centro_face(a, b, c, d) ponto_medio(ponto_medio(a, b), ponto_medio(c, d)) end def self.obter_definition(ent) return nil unless ent ent.respond_to?(:definition) ? ent.definition : nil end def self.ler_mask(ent) defn = obter_definition(ent) return 0 unless defn defn.behavior.no_scale_mask? || 0 end def self.gravar_mask(ent, mask) defn = obter_definition(ent) return unless defn defn.behavior.no_scale_mask = mask end def self.selecao_valida?(e) e.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || e.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) end def self.cantos_transformados(ent) defn = obter_definition(ent) return [] unless defn bb = defn.bounds tr = ent.transformation (0..7).map { |i| bb.corner(i).transform(tr) } end def self.posicoes_alcas(ent) c = cantos_transformados(ent) return {} if c.length < 8 { BIT_X => [centro_face(c[0], c[2], c[4], c[6]), centro_face(c[1], c[3], c[5], c[7])], BIT_Y => [centro_face(c[0], c[1], c[4], c[5]), centro_face(c[2], c[3], c[6], c[7])], BIT_Z => [centro_face(c[0], c[1], c[2], c[3]), centro_face(c[4], c[5], c[6], c[7])], BIT_XZ => [ponto_medio(c[0], c[4]), ponto_medio(c[1], c[5]), ponto_medio(c[2], c[6]), ponto_medio(c[3], c[7])], BIT_YZ => [ponto_medio(c[0], c[2]), ponto_medio(c[1], c[3]), ponto_medio(c[4], c[6]), ponto_medio(c[5], c[7])], BIT_XY => [ponto_medio(c[0], c[1]), ponto_medio(c[2], c[3]), ponto_medio(c[4], c[5]), ponto_medio(c[6], c[7])], BIT_UNIFORM => c.dup } end @entidade_atual = nil @mask_atual = 127 @bit_hover = 0 @tool_ativo = false class << self attr_accessor :entidade_atual, :mask_atual, :bit_hover, :tool_ativo end def self.tool_ativo?; @tool_ativo; end class DesenhadorAlcas def activate ConfigurarAlcasEscala.tool_ativo = true @arrastando = false @inicio_x = 0; @inicio_y = 0; @atual_x = 0; @atual_y = 0 Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate end def deactivate(view) ConfigurarAlcasEscala.tool_ativo = false view.invalidate end def suspend(view); view.invalidate; end def resume(view); view.invalidate; end def onCancel(_reason, _view); ConfigurarAlcasEscala.parar; end def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view) @inicio_x = x; @inicio_y = y; @atual_x = x; @atual_y = y @arrastando = false end def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view) if (flags & 1) == 1 dx = (x - @inicio_x).abs dy = (y - @inicio_y).abs @arrastando = true if dx > ConfigurarAlcasEscala::LIMIAR_DRAG || dy > ConfigurarAlcasEscala::LIMIAR_DRAG @atual_x = x; @atual_y = y end view.invalidate end def onLButtonUp(flags, x, y, view) modelo = Sketchup.active_model sel = modelo.selection shift = (flags & COPY_MODIFIER_MASK) == COPY_MODIFIER_MASK if @arrastando x1 = [@inicio_x, x].min; y1 = [@inicio_y, y].min x2 = [@inicio_x, x].max; y2 = [@inicio_y, y].max cruzando = (@inicio_x > x) encontrados = [] modelo.active_entities.each do |ent| next unless ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || ent.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) || ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Edge) || ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Face) next unless ent.visible? && ent.layer.visible? bb = ent.bounds pontos_tela = (0..7).map { |i| pt = bb.corner(i); sc = view.screen_coords(pt); [sc.x, sc.y] } dentro = cruzando ? pontos_tela.any? { |sx, sy| sx >= x1 && sx <= x2 && sy >= y1 && sy <= y2 } : pontos_tela.all? { |sx, sy| sx >= x1 && sx <= x2 && sy >= y1 && sy <= y2 } encontrados << ent if dentro end if shift encontrados.each { |e| sel.include?(e) ? sel.remove(e) : sel.add(e) } else sel.clear sel.add(encontrados) unless encontrados.empty? end else ph = view.pick_helper ph.do_pick(x, y) caminho = ph.path_at(0) melhor = caminho ? caminho.first : nil if melhor shift ? (sel.include?(melhor) ? sel.remove(melhor) : sel.add(melhor)) : (sel.clear; sel.add(melhor)) else sel.clear unless shift end end @arrastando = false view.invalidate end def onLButtonDoubleClick(flags, x, y, view) ph = view.pick_helper; ph.do_pick(x, y) caminho = ph.path_at(0); melhor = caminho ? caminho.first : nil if melhor && (melhor.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || melhor.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)) modelo = Sketchup.active_model modelo.selection.clear; modelo.selection.add(melhor) Sketchup.send_action("editComponent:") end end def getExtents bb = Geom::BoundingBox.new ent = ConfigurarAlcasEscala.entidade_atual bb.add(ent.bounds) if ent && ent.valid? bb end def draw(view) if @arrastando x1 = [@inicio_x, @atual_x].min; y1 = [@inicio_y, @atual_y].min x2 = [@inicio_x, @atual_x].max; y2 = [@inicio_y, @atual_y].max cruzando = (@inicio_x > @atual_x) view.drawing_color = cruzando ? Sketchup::Color.new(180, 220, 255, 30) : Sketchup::Color.new(180, 255, 180, 30) view.draw2d(GL_QUADS, [[x1, y1, 0], [x2, y1, 0], [x2, y2, 0], [x1, y2, 0]]) view.line_stipple = cruzando ? '-' : '' view.drawing_color = cruzando ? Sketchup::Color.new(80, 140, 220, 180) : Sketchup::Color.new(80, 180, 80, 180) view.draw2d(GL_LINE_STRIP, [[x1, y1, 0], [x2, y1, 0], [x2, y2, 0], [x1, y2, 0], [x1, y1, 0]]) view.line_stipple = '' end ent = ConfigurarAlcasEscala.entidade_atual return unless ent && ent.valid? mask = ConfigurarAlcasEscala.mask_atual hover = ConfigurarAlcasEscala.bit_hover c = ConfigurarAlcasEscala.cantos_transformados(ent) return if c.length < 8 view.drawing_color = Sketchup::Color.new(160, 165, 190, 90) view.draw(GL_LINES, [c[0],c[1], c[1],c[3], c[3],c[2], c[2],c[0], c[4],c[5], c[5],c[7], c[7],c[6], c[6],c[4], c[0],c[4], c[1],c[5], c[2],c[6], c[3],c[7]]) posicoes = ConfigurarAlcasEscala.posicoes_alcas(ent) posicoes.each do |bit, pontos| habilitada = (mask & bit) == 0; em_hover = (hover == bit); rgb = ConfigurarAlcasEscala::CORES[bit] tam = case bit when ConfigurarAlcasEscala::BIT_X, ConfigurarAlcasEscala::BIT_Y, ConfigurarAlcasEscala::BIT_Z then ConfigurarAlcasEscala::TAM_FACE when ConfigurarAlcasEscala::BIT_XZ, ConfigurarAlcasEscala::BIT_YZ, ConfigurarAlcasEscala::BIT_XY then ConfigurarAlcasEscala::TAM_ARESTA else ConfigurarAlcasEscala::TAM_QUINA end alfa_p = em_hover ? (habilitada ? 255 : 200) : (habilitada ? 140 : 18) alfa_b = em_hover ? 255 : (habilitada ? 190 : 35) larg = em_hover ? (habilitada ? 3 : 2) : (habilitada ? 2 : 1) cor_p = Sketchup::Color.new(rgb[0], rgb[1], rgb[2], alfa_p) cor_b = Sketchup::Color.new(rgb[0], rgb[1], rgb[2], alfa_b) pontos.each do |pt3d| tela = view.screen_coords(pt3d); sx = tela.x.to_f; sy = tela.y.to_f; h = tam * 0.5 quad = [[sx - h, sy - h, 0], [sx + h, sy - h, 0], [sx + h, sy + h, 0], [sx - h, sy + h, 0]] view.drawing_color = cor_p; view.draw2d(GL_QUADS, quad) view.line_width = larg; view.drawing_color = cor_b; view.draw2d(GL_LINE_STRIP, quad + [quad[0]]) end end end end class ObservadorSelecao < Sketchup::SelectionObserver def onSelectionBulkChange(_s); ConfigurarAlcasEscala.ao_mudar_selecao; end def onSelectionCleared(_s); ConfigurarAlcasEscala.ao_mudar_selecao; end def onSelectionAdded(_s, _e); ConfigurarAlcasEscala.ao_mudar_selecao; end def onSelectionRemoved(_s, _e); ConfigurarAlcasEscala.ao_mudar_selecao; end end def self.ao_mudar_selecao sel = Sketchup.active_model.selection if sel.length == 1 && selecao_valida?(sel.first) ent = sel.first; @entidade_atual = ent; @mask_atual = ler_mask(ent) tipo = tipo_entidade(ent) enviar_js("render(#{@mask_atual}, true, '#{tipo} #{obter_texto(:msg_selecionado)}')") elsif sel.empty? @entidade_atual = nil; @mask_atual = 127 enviar_js("render(127, false, '#{obter_texto(:msg_selecione)}')") else @entidade_atual = nil; @mask_atual = 127 enviar_js("render(127, false, '#{obter_texto(:msg_apenas_um)}')") end garantir_tool Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate end def self.tipo_entidade(ent) ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) ? obter_texto(:grupo) : obter_texto(:componente) end def self.garantir_tool return if @tool_ativo && @tool_instance @tool_instance = DesenhadorAlcas.new Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(@tool_instance) end def self.desativar_tool if @tool_instance Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil) @tool_instance = nil; @tool_ativo = false end end def self.enviar_js(script) return unless @dialog && @dialog.visible? @dialog.execute_script(script) rescue end def self.montar_html <<~HTML

#{obter_texto(:cabecalho)}

#{obter_texto(:msg_selecione)}
HTML end def self.criar_dialogo @dialog.close if @dialog rescue nil @dialog = UI::HtmlDialog.new( dialog_title: obter_texto(:titulo_janela), preferences_key: "ScaleMaskController_v6", scrollable: false, resizable: false, width: 310, height: 460, style: UI::HtmlDialog::STYLE_DIALOG ) @dialog.set_html(montar_html) @dialog.add_action_callback("alternar") do |_ctx, bit, checked| ent = @entidade_atual next unless ent && ent.valid? && selecao_valida?(ent) atual = ler_mask(ent); nova = checked ? (atual & ~bit.to_i) : (atual | bit.to_i) gravar_mask(ent, nova); @mask_atual = nova enviar_js("render(#{nova}, true, '#{tipo_entidade(ent)} #{obter_texto(:msg_selecionado)}')") Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate end @dialog.add_action_callback("definir_mask") do |_ctx, mask| ent = @entidade_atual next unless ent && ent.valid? && selecao_valida?(ent) m = mask.to_i; gravar_mask(ent, m); @mask_atual = m enviar_js("render(#{m}, true, '#{tipo_entidade(ent)} #{obter_texto(:msg_selecionado)}')") Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate end @dialog.add_action_callback("hover") { |_ctx, bit| @bit_hover = bit.to_i; Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate } @dialog.set_on_closed { limpar_tudo } end @observador ||= ObservadorSelecao.new def self.limpar_tudo modelo = Sketchup.active_model modelo.selection.remove_observer(@observador) if @observador desativar_tool @entidade_atual = nil; @mask_atual = 127; @bit_hover = 0 end def self.executar limpar_tudo criar_dialogo modelo = Sketchup.active_model modelo.selection.add_observer(@observador) garantir_tool @dialog.show UI.start_timer(0.3, false) { ao_mudar_selecao } end def self.parar @dialog.close if @dialog rescue nil limpar_tudo end end end ScriptUpComunidade::ConfigurarAlcasEscala.executar

title.pt: Estica e Puxa Sem Deformar no Eixo
title.en: Stretch and pull without deforming on the axis.
title.es: Estirar y tirar sin deformar sobre el eje.

description.pt: Estica grupos e componentes preservando proporções, furações e geometrias complexas. Inclui suporte a medidas globais via TAB. Estique a seleção ao longo de um eixo, a partir de uma seção determinada. Ou seja, as peças onde a seção não passa não serão deformadas. Você pode esticar usando pontos de referência no objeto, arrastar e digitar a distância a ser aumentada e também digitando uma medida global para a seleção, usando a tecla TAB em qualquer passo.
description.en: Stretches groups and components while preserving proportions, holes, and complex geometries. Includes support for global measurements via TAB. Stretch the selection along an axis, starting from a defined section. That is, parts where the section does not pass will not be deformed. You can stretch using reference points on the object, dragging and typing the distance to be increased, and also by typing a global measurement for the selection, using the TAB key at any step.
description.es: Estira grupos y componentes conservando proporciones, agujeros y geometrías complejas. Incluye compatibilidad con mediciones globales mediante TAB. Estire la selección a lo largo de un eje, a partir de una sección definida. Es decir, las partes por las que no pasa la sección no se deformarán. Puede estirar usando puntos de referencia en el objeto, arrastrando y escribiendo la distancia que desea aumentar, o también escribiendo una medición global para la selección, usando la tecla TAB en cualquier paso.

code.pt:
require 'sketchup.rb'

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Script: Estica e Puxa no Eixo Sem Deformar
# Versão: 2.0
# Descrição: Estica grupos e componentes preservando proporções, furacões e 
#            geometrias complexas. Inclui suporte a medidas globais via TAB.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

module EsticaEPuxaNoEixoSemDeformar
  VERSION = '2.0'

  class StretchTool
    def initialize(instance)
      @instance = instance
      @axis = 0 
      @state = 0 
      @ip = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
      @ip_base = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
      @ip_target = Sketchup::InputPoint.new

      @cut_local_pt = nil
      @base_local_pt = nil
      @direction = nil
      @done = false

      @definition = instance.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) ? instance.entities.parent : instance.definition
      update_status
    end

    def activate
      Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate
    end

    def deactivate(view)
      view.invalidate
    end

    # Calcula a medida total do objeto no eixo escolhido
    def get_current_length
      min_c = @definition.bounds.min.to_a[@axis]
      max_c = @definition.bounds.max.to_a[@axis]
      local_len = max_c - min_c
      
      vec = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 0)
      vec.x = local_len if @axis == 0
      vec.y = local_len if @axis == 1
      vec.z = local_len if @axis == 2
      
      return vec.transform(@instance.transformation).length
    end

    # Ativa a caixa de diálogo com a tecla TAB (Com apenas 1 campo)
    def onKeyUp(key, repeat, flags, view)
      if key == 9 || key == 15 # Código da tecla TAB
        if @state >= 1
          current_len = get_current_length()
          
          # Mostra apenas um campo com a medida atual já preenchida
          prompts = ["Medida Total:"]
          defaults = [current_len.to_l]
          
          input = UI.inputbox(prompts, defaults, "Esticar para Medida Exata")
          return unless input # Se o usuário cancelar, não faz nada
          
          new_len = input[0]
          delta = new_len.to_l - current_len.to_l
          
          if delta.abs > 0.001
            # Se apertou TAB antes de escolher o corte, corta no meio do objeto
            if @state == 1
              c = (@definition.bounds.min.to_a[@axis] + @definition.bounds.max.to_a[@axis]) / 2.0
              pt = Geom::Point3d.new(0, 0, 0)
              pt.x = c if @axis == 0
              pt.y = c if @axis == 1
              pt.z = c if @axis == 2
              @cut_local_pt = pt
              @direction = 1
            # Se apertou TAB depois do corte, mas antes do lado, puxa o lado positivo
            elsif @state == 2
              @direction = 1
            end
            
            perform_stretch(delta * @direction)
          end
        else
          UI.beep
          Sketchup.status_text = "Fixe o eixo primeiro (1º clique) antes de usar o TAB."
        end
      end
    end

    def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
      if @state == 0
        @ip.pick(view, x, y)
        if @ip.valid? && @ip.face
          begin
            world_normal = @ip.face.normal.transform(@ip.transformation)
            local_normal = world_normal.transform(@instance.transformation.inverse)
            
            nx = local_normal.x.abs; ny = local_normal.y.abs; nz = local_normal.z.abs
            if nx > ny && nx > nz
              @axis = 0 
            elsif ny > nx && ny > nz
              @axis = 1 
            else
              @axis = 2 
            end
            update_status
          rescue
          end
        end
      elsif @state == 1 || @state == 2
        @ip.pick(view, x, y)
      elsif @state == 3
        @ip.pick(view, x, y, @ip_base)
        if @ip.valid? && @ip_base.valid?
          tr_inv = @instance.transformation.inverse
          local_start = @ip_base.position.transform(tr_inv)
          local_target = @ip.position.transform(tr_inv)
          delta = local_target.to_a[@axis] - local_start.to_a[@axis]
          Sketchup.vcb_value = delta * @direction
        end
      end
      
      view.tooltip = @ip.tooltip if @ip.valid?
      view.invalidate
    end

    def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
      if @state == 0
        if @ip.valid?
          @state = 1 
          update_status
        end
      elsif @state == 1
        if @ip.valid?
          tr_inv = @instance.transformation.inverse
          @cut_local_pt = @ip.position.transform(tr_inv)
          @state = 2 
          update_status
        end
      elsif @state == 2
        if @ip.valid?
          tr_inv = @instance.transformation.inverse
          @base_local_pt = @ip.position.transform(tr_inv)
          @direction = @base_local_pt.to_a[@axis] > @cut_local_pt.to_a[@axis] ? 1 : -1
          @ip_base.copy!(@ip)
          @state = 3 
          update_status
        end
      elsif @state == 3
        if @ip.valid?
          perform_stretch()
        end
      end
    end

    def onUserText(text, view)
      if @state == 3
        begin
          dist = text.to_l
          perform_stretch(dist * @direction)
        rescue
          UI.beep
          Sketchup.status_text = "Valor inválido."
        end
      end
    end

    def perform_stretch(forced_delta = nil)
      return if @done 
      
      tr_inv = @instance.transformation.inverse
      if forced_delta
        delta = forced_delta
      else
        local_start = @ip_base.position.transform(tr_inv)
        local_target = @ip.position.transform(tr_inv)
        delta = local_target.to_a[@axis] - local_start.to_a[@axis]
      end

      return if delta.abs < 0.001
      @done = true

      Sketchup.active_model.start_operation("Estica e Puxa Sem Deformar v#{VERSION}", true)

      local_delta_vec = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 0)
      local_delta_vec[@axis] = delta

      plane_pt = @cut_local_pt
      plane_normal = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 0)
      plane_normal[@axis] = 1.0

      ents = @instance.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) ? @instance.entities : @instance.definition.entities

      EsticaEPuxaNoEixoSemDeformar.stretch_recursive(ents, plane_pt, plane_normal, local_delta_vec, @direction)

      Sketchup.active_model.commit_operation
      Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil)
    end

    def draw(view)
      @ip.draw(view) if @ip.valid?

      if (@state == 0 || @state == 1) && @ip.valid?
        cut_pt = @ip.position.transform(@instance.transformation.inverse)
        draw_plane(view, cut_pt)
      elsif (@state == 2 || @state == 3) && @cut_local_pt
        draw_plane(view, @cut_local_pt)
      end

      if @state == 3 && @ip_base.valid? && @ip.valid?
        view.drawing_color = "black"
        view.line_width = 2
        view.draw_line(@ip_base.position, @ip.position)
      end
    end

    def draw_plane(view, local_cut_pt)
      bounds = @definition.bounds
      min = bounds.corner(0)
      max = bounds.corner(7)
      c = local_cut_pt.to_a[@axis]

      pts = []
      if @axis == 0
        pts = [Geom::Point3d.new(c, min.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(c, max.y, min.z),
               Geom::Point3d.new(c, max.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(c, min.y, max.z)]
      elsif @axis == 1
        pts = [Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, c, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, c, min.z),
               Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, c, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, c, max.z)]
      else
        pts = [Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, min.y, c), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, min.y, c),
               Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, max.y, c), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, max.y, c)]
      end

      tr = @instance.transformation
      pts.map! { |p| p.transform(tr) }

      colors = [Sketchup::Color.new(255, 0, 0, 80), Sketchup::Color.new(0, 255, 0, 80), Sketchup::Color.new(0, 0, 255, 80)]
      edge_colors = ["red", "green", "blue"]

      view.drawing_color = colors[@axis]
      view.draw(GL_QUADS, pts)
      view.line_width = 3
      view.drawing_color = edge_colors[@axis]
      view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, pts)
    end

    def update_status
      case @state
      when 0
        eixo_nome = ["Vermelho (X)", "Verde (Y)", "Azul (Z)"][@axis]
        Sketchup.status_text = "PASSO 1 [Eixo #{eixo_nome}]: Deslize nas faces da seleção para escolher o eixo de esticamento. Clique para fixar o eixo."
      when 1
        Sketchup.status_text = "PASSO 2: Posicione o corte e CLIQUE. (Ou aperte TAB para editar medida global desejada, esticando a partir do ponto médio da seleção, ao longo do eixo)"
      when 2
        Sketchup.status_text = "PASSO 3: Clique no lado que será puxado (ou aperte TAB para editar medida global e esticar ao longo do eixo)."
      when 3
        Sketchup.status_text = "PASSO 4: Arraste e CLIQUE, DIGITE a distância, ou aperte TAB para medida total."
      end
    end
  end

  def self.stretch_recursive(entities, plane_pt, plane_normal, delta_vec, direction)
    tol = 1e-4
    moving_edges = []
    moving_vertices_fallback = []
    instances_to_move = []
    instances_to_recurse = []

    entities.each do |ent|
      if ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Edge)
        d1 = (ent.start.position - plane_pt) % plane_normal
        d2 = (ent.end.position - plane_pt) % plane_normal
        
        v1_moves = direction == 1 ? (d1 >= -tol) : (d1 <= tol)
        v2_moves = direction == 1 ? (d2 >= -tol) : (d2 <= tol)

        if v1_moves && v2_moves
          moving_edges << ent
        else
          moving_vertices_fallback << ent.start if v1_moves
          moving_vertices_fallback << ent.end if v2_moves
        end
      elsif ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || ent.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance)
        b = ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) ? ent.entities.parent.bounds : ent.definition.bounds
        corners = (0..7).map { |i| b.corner(i).transform(ent.transformation) }
        d_values = corners.map { |c| (c - plane_pt) % plane_normal }

        min_d = d_values.min
        max_d = d_values.max

        if direction == 1
          if min_d >= -tol
            instances_to_move << ent
          elsif max_d > tol
            instances_to_recurse << ent
          end
        else
          if max_d <= tol
            instances_to_move << ent
          elsif min_d < -tol
            instances_to_recurse << ent
          end
        end
      end
    end

    items_to_move = instances_to_move + moving_edges
    if items_to_move.any?
      tr = Geom::Transformation.translation(delta_vec)
      entities.transform_entities(tr, items_to_move)
    end

    handled_vertices = []
    moving_edges.each do |e| 
      handled_vertices << e.start
      handled_vertices << e.end
    end
    handled_vertices.uniq!

    pure_fallback_vertices = moving_vertices_fallback - handled_vertices
    pure_fallback_vertices.uniq!

    if pure_fallback_vertices.any?
      vecs = Array.new(pure_fallback_vertices.length, delta_vec)
      entities.transform_by_vectors(pure_fallback_vertices, vecs)
    end

    instances_to_recurse.each do |inst|
      begin
        inst.make_unique if inst.respond_to?(:make_unique)
      rescue
      end

      child_ents = inst.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) ? inst.entities : inst.definition.entities
      t_inv = inst.transformation.inverse

      p1 = plane_pt.transform(t_inv)
      p2 = (plane_pt + plane_normal).transform(t_inv)
      child_plane_normal = (p2 - p1).normalize
      child_delta_vec = delta_vec.transform(t_inv)

      stretch_recursive(child_ents, p1, child_plane_normal, child_delta_vec, direction)
    end
  end

  def self.start
    model = Sketchup.active_model
    sel = model.selection
    
    if sel.empty? || (!sel[0].is_a?(Sketchup::Group) && !sel[0].is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance))
      UI.messagebox("Por favor, selecione 1 Grupo ou Componente antes de ativar a ferramenta.")
      return
    end

    model.select_tool(StretchTool.new(sel[0]))
  end
end

code.pt:
module ScriptUpComunidade
  module SuperSuperficie3D

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :erro_selecao    => "Selecione um contorno fechado de arestas.",
        :erro_pontos     => "É necessário um contorno com pelo menos 3 pontos.",
        :op_name         => "Skin 3D (V6 Bordas Perfeitas)",
        :msg_sucesso     => "Superfície V6 gerada! Bordas completamente lisas e invioladas.",
        :label_offset    => "Deslocamento/Offset (m) [0 = Preencher]:",
        :label_densidade => "Densidade (1 = Baixa, 10 = Alta):",
        :label_suave     => "Suavização Laplaciana (Iterações):",
        :titulo_input    => "Skin 3D (Bordas Perfeitas)"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :erro_selecao    => "Select a closed loop of edges.",
        :erro_pontos     => "A contour with at least 3 points is required.",
        :op_name         => "3D Skin (V6 Perfect Edges)",
        :msg_sucesso     => "V6 Surface generated! Edges completely smooth and untouched.",
        :label_offset    => "Offset (m) [0 = Fill]:",
        :label_densidade => "Density (1 = Low, 10 = High):",
        :label_suave     => "Laplacian Smoothing (Iterations):",
        :titulo_input    => "3D Skin (Perfect Edges)"
      },
      'es' => {
        :erro_selecao    => "Seleccione un contorno cerrado de aristas.",
        :erro_pontos     => "Se requiere un contorno con al menos 3 puntos.",
        :op_name         => "Piel 3D (V6 Bordes Perfectos)",
        :msg_sucesso     => "¡Superficie V6 generada! Bordes completamente lisos e inviolados.",
        :label_offset    => "Desplazamiento/Offset (m) [0 = Llenar]:",
        :label_densidade => "Densidad (1 = Baja, 10 = Alta):",
        :label_suave     => "Suavizado Laplaciano (Iteraciones):",
        :titulo_input    => "Piel 3D (Bordes Perfectos)"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    def self.exact_boundary_z(pt, local_pts)
      local_pts.each_with_index do |p1, i|
        p2 = local_pts[(i + 1) % local_pts.size]
        
        p1_2d = Geom::Point3d.new(p1.x, p1.y, 0)
        p2_2d = Geom::Point3d.new(p2.x, p2.y, 0)
        pt_2d = Geom::Point3d.new(pt.x, pt.y, 0)

        dist_diff = (p1_2d.distance(pt_2d) + pt_2d.distance(p2_2d)) - p1_2d.distance(p2_2d)
        
        if dist_diff.abs < 1e-4
          return p1.z if p1_2d.distance(p2_2d) < 1e-5
          ratio = p1_2d.distance(pt_2d) / p1_2d.distance(p2_2d)
          return p1.z + (p2.z - p1.z) * ratio
        end
      end
      nil
    end

    def self.interpolate_z(x, y, contour_points)
      num = 0.0
      den = 0.0
      contour_points.each do |cp|
        dist = Math.hypot(cp.x - x, cp.y - y)
        return cp.z if dist < 0.001
        weight = 1.0 / (dist**2.5)
        num += weight * cp.z
        den += weight
      end
      den == 0.0 ? 0.0 : num / den
    end

    def self.laplacian_relax(ents, vertices, iterations, limit_to_2d)
      return if vertices.empty? || iterations < 1
      
      iterations.times do
        verts_to_move = []
        vectors =[]
        
        vertices.each do |v|
          next unless v.valid?
          neighbors = v.edges.map { |e| e.other_vertex(v) }.select(&:valid?)
          next if neighbors.empty?
          
          sum_x, sum_y, sum_z = 0.0, 0.0, 0.0
          neighbors.each do |n|
            pos = n.position
            sum_x += pos.x
            sum_y += pos.y
            sum_z += pos.z
          end
          
          count = neighbors.size.to_f
          avg_p = Geom::Point3d.new(sum_x / count, sum_y / count, sum_z / count)
          vec = v.position.vector_to(avg_p)
          
          vec.z = 0.0 if limit_to_2d
          
          if vec.valid? && vec.length > 0.0001
            vec.x *= 0.5
            vec.y *= 0.5
            vec.z *= 0.5
            verts_to_move << v
            vectors << vec
          end
        end
        
        ents.transform_by_vectors(verts_to_move, vectors) unless verts_to_move.empty?
      end
    end

    def self.generate(dist_val, density, iter)
      model = Sketchup.active_model
      sel = model.selection
      edges = sel.grep(Sketchup::Edge)

      if edges.empty?
        UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:erro_selecao))
        return
      end

      model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_name), true)

      v_counts = Hash.new(0)
      edges.each { |e| v_counts[e.start] += 1; v_counts[e.end] += 1 }
      
      start_vertex = v_counts.find { |v, count| count == 1 }&.first || edges.first.start
      
      ordered_points = [start_vertex.position]
      curr_v = start_vertex
      unvisited = edges.dup
      
      while unvisited.any?
        nxt_e = unvisited.find { |e| e.start == curr_v || e.end == curr_v }
        break unless nxt_e
        unvisited.delete(nxt_e)
        nxt_v = (nxt_e.start == curr_v) ? nxt_e.end : nxt_e.start
        ordered_points << nxt_v.position
        curr_v = nxt_v
      end
      ordered_points.pop if ordered_points.first.distance(ordered_points.last) < 1e-4

      if ordered_points.size < 3
        UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:erro_pontos))
        model.abort_operation
        return
      end

      normal = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 0)
      ordered_points.each_with_index do |p1, i|
        p2 = ordered_points[(i + 1) % ordered_points.size]
        normal.x += (p1.y - p2.y) * (p1.z + p2.z)
        normal.y += (p1.z - p2.z) * (p1.x + p2.x)
        normal.z += (p1.x - p2.x) * (p1.y + p2.y)
      end
      normal = normal.length < 1e-5 ? Geom::Vector3d.new(0,0,1) : normal.normalize!

      bb = Geom::BoundingBox.new
      ordered_points.each { |pt| bb.add(pt) }
      center = bb.center

      tr_to_3d = Geom::Transformation.new(center, normal)
      tr_to_local = tr_to_3d.inverse
      local_pts = ordered_points.map { |pt| pt.transform(tr_to_local) }

      edges.each { |e| e.erase! if e.valid? } if dist_val == 0.0

      local_bounds = Geom::BoundingBox.new
      local_pts.each { |p| local_bounds.add(p) }
      diag = local_bounds.diagonal
      cell_size = diag / (density * 5.0)

      dense_local_pts =[]
      local_pts.each_with_index do |p1, i|
        p2 = local_pts[(i + 1) % local_pts.size]
        dist = p1.distance(p2)
        segs =[(dist / (cell_size * 0.5)).ceil, 1].max
        vec = p2 - p1
        step = 1.0 / segs
        (0...segs).each { |s| dense_local_pts << (p1 + Geom::Vector3d.new(vec.x*step*s, vec.y*step*s, vec.z*step*s)) }
      end

      mesh_group = model.active_entities.add_group
      ents = mesh_group.entities
      flat_pts = local_pts.map { |p| Geom::Point3d.new(p.x, p.y, 0) }
      
      face = nil
      begin
        face = ents.add_face(flat_pts)
      rescue; end

      if face.nil?
        flat_pts.each_with_index do |p1, i|
          p2 = flat_pts[(i+1) % flat_pts.size]
          ents.add_line(p1, p2) rescue nil if p1.distance(p2) > 0.001
        end
        ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each(&:find_faces)
        face = ents.grep(Sketchup::Face).first
      end

      return model.abort_operation unless face

      margin = cell_size
      min_x, max_x = local_bounds.min.x - margin, local_bounds.max.x + margin
      min_y, max_y = local_bounds.min.y - margin, local_bounds.max.y + margin

      nx = ((max_x - min_x) / cell_size).ceil
      ny = ((max_y - min_y) / cell_size).ceil

      grid_group = ents.add_group
      g_ents = grid_group.entities

      (0..nx).each { |ix| x = min_x + ix*cell_size; g_ents.add_line([x, min_y, 0],[x, max_y, 0]) }
      (0..ny).each { |iy| y = min_y + iy*cell_size; g_ents.add_line([min_x, y, 0],[max_x, y, 0]) }
      
      (0...nx).each do |ix|
        (0...ny).each do |iy|
          px = min_x + ix * cell_size
          py = min_y + iy * cell_size
          g_ents.add_line([px, py, 0], [px + cell_size, py + cell_size, 0])
          g_ents.add_line([px, py + cell_size, 0],[px + cell_size, py, 0])
        end
      end

      grid_group.explode

      naked_edges = ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).select { |e| e.valid? && e.faces.empty? }
      ents.erase_entities(naked_edges) unless naked_edges.empty?

      all_edges = ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge)
      boundary_verts = all_edges.select { |e| e.faces.size == 1 }.map { |e| [e.start, e.end] }.flatten.uniq
      all_verts = all_edges.map { |e|[e.start, e.end] }.flatten.uniq
      
      internal_verts = all_verts - boundary_verts 

      laplacian_relax(ents, internal_verts, 15, true)

      verts_to_move = []
      vectors =[]
      
      all_verts.each do |v|
        if boundary_verts.include?(v)
          z = exact_boundary_z(v.position, local_pts) || interpolate_z(v.position.x, v.position.y, dense_local_pts)
        else
          z = interpolate_z(v.position.x, v.position.y, dense_local_pts)
        end
        
        vec = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, z)
        if vec.length > 0.001
          verts_to_move << v
          vectors << vec
        end
      end
      ents.transform_by_vectors(verts_to_move, vectors) unless verts_to_move.empty?

      laplacian_relax(ents, internal_verts, iter, false)

      ents.grep(Sketchup::Face).each { |f| f.reverse! if f.normal.z < 0 }

      ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each do |e|
        if e.faces.length > 1
          e.soft = true
          e.smooth = true
          e.hidden = true
        end
      end

      mesh_group.transform!(tr_to_3d)

      if dist_val != 0.0
        vec = normal.clone
        vec.length = dist_val.abs
        vec.reverse! if dist_val < 0
        mesh_group.transform!(Geom::Transformation.translation(vec))
      end

      final_ents = mesh_group.explode
      sel.clear
      sel.add(final_ents.grep(Sketchup::Face))

      model.commit_operation
      puts obter_texto(:msg_sucesso)
    end

    def self.executar
      prompts = [
        obter_texto(:label_offset), 
        obter_texto(:label_densidade), 
        obter_texto(:label_suave)
      ]
      defaults = [0.0.to_l, 3.0, 20]
      res = UI.inputbox(prompts, defaults, obter_texto(:titulo_input))
      
      if res
        dist = res[0].to_l
        density = res[1].to_f
        density = 1.0 if density < 1.0
        iters = res[2].to_i
        generate(dist, density, iters)
      end
    end

  end
end

code.pt:
# encoding: UTF-8

require 'sketchup'

module ScriptUpComunidade
module GeradorSilhuetaUltra

  IDIOMAS = {
    'pt-BR' => {
      :status_texto   => "[Gerador ULTRA] Mova o mouse sobre QUALQUER objeto. CLIQUE na face verde para gerar. (ESC para sair)",

  def self.obter_texto(chave)
    locale = Sketchup.get_locale
    lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
    IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
  end

  # ===================================================================
  # FERRAMENTA DE SELEÇÃO CONTÍNUA E MAGNÉTICA (TOOL)
  # ===================================================================
  class FerramentaSeletorSilhueta
    def initialize(config)
      @config = config
      @hovered_target = nil
      @hovered_face_name = nil
      @faces = {}
      @mapa_nomes = {
        "Top"    => :face_top,
        "Bottom" => :face_bottom,
        "Front"  => :face_front,
        "Back"   => :face_back,
        "Right"  => :face_right,
        "Left"   => :face_left
      }
      @ph = Sketchup.active_model.active_view.pick_helper
      @processing = false
    end

    def activate
      atualizar_status
    end

    def atualizar_status
      Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::GeradorSilhuetaUltra.obter_texto(:status_texto)
    end

    def setup_faces(bounds)
      min = bounds.min
      max = bounds.max

      @faces = {
        "Top"    => [Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, min.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, min.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, max.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, max.y, max.z)],
        "Bottom" => [Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, min.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, min.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, max.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, max.y, min.z)],
        "Front"  => [Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, min.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, min.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, min.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, min.y, max.z)],
        "Back"   => [Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, max.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, max.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, max.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, max.y, max.z)],
        "Right"  => [Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, min.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, max.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, max.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x, min.y, max.z)],
        "Left"   => [Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, min.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, max.y, min.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, max.y, max.z), Geom::Point3d.new(min.x, min.y, max.z)]
      }
    end

    def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
      return if @processing
      ray = view.pickray(x, y)

      still_hovering_current = false
      if @hovered_target && @hovered_target.valid?
        @faces.each do |name, pts|
          plane = Geom.fit_plane_to_points(pts)
          pt = Geom.intersect_line_plane(ray, plane)
          if pt && point_in_rect?(pt, pts)
            dir = ray[0].vector_to(pt)
            if dir.valid? && ray[1].dot(dir) > 0
              still_hovering_current = true
              break
            end
          end
        end
      end

      unless still_hovering_current
        @ph.do_pick(x, y)
        best_path = @ph.path_at(1)
        if best_path
          new_target = best_path.find { |ent| ent.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || ent.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) }
          if new_target
            @hovered_target = new_target
            setup_faces(@hovered_target.bounds)
          else
            @hovered_target = nil
          end
        else
          @hovered_target = nil
        end
      end

      if @hovered_target && @hovered_target.valid?
        best_dist = 1e9
        found_face = nil
        @faces.each do |name, pts|
          plane = Geom.fit_plane_to_points(pts)
          pt = Geom.intersect_line_plane(ray, plane)
          next unless pt

          if point_in_rect?(pt, pts)
            dir = ray[0].vector_to(pt)
            if dir.valid? && ray[1].dot(dir) > 0
              dist = ray[0].distance(pt)
              if dist < best_dist
                best_dist = dist
                found_face = name
              end
            end
          end
        end
        @hovered_face_name = found_face
      else
        @hovered_face_name = nil
      end

      view.invalidate
    end

    def draw(view)
      return if @processing || @hovered_target.nil? || !@hovered_target.valid?

      view.drawing_color = Sketchup::Color.new(100, 100, 100)
      view.line_width = 2
      @faces.each { |name, pts| view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, pts) }

      if @hovered_face_name
        view.drawing_color = Sketchup::Color.new(0, 255, 128, 120)
        view.draw(GL_QUADS, @faces[@hovered_face_name])

        centro = centro_face(@faces[@hovered_face_name])
        nome_traduzido = ScriptUpComunidade::GeradorSilhuetaUltra.obter_texto(@mapa_nomes[@hovered_face_name])
        view.draw_text(centro, ScriptUpComunidade::GeradorSilhuetaUltra.obter_texto(:clique_gerar) + nome_traduzido)
      end
    end

    def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
      if @hovered_target && @hovered_face_name
        @processing = true
        target = @hovered_target
        face_name = @hovered_face_name

        ScriptUpComunidade::GeradorSilhuetaUltra.processar_uma_face(target, @config, face_name)

        @processing = false
        atualizar_status
        view.invalidate
      end
    end

    def onCancel(reason, view)
      Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil)
      UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::GeradorSilhuetaUltra.obter_texto(:fim_modo))
    end

    def centro_face(pts)
      x = pts.map(&:x).sum / 4.0
      y = pts.map(&:y).sum / 4.0
      z = pts.map(&:z).sum / 4.0
      Geom::Point3d.new(x, y, z)
    end

    def point_in_rect?(pt, pts)
      min_x, max_x = pts.map(&:x).min, pts.map(&:x).max
      min_y, max_y = pts.map(&:y).min, pts.map(&:y).max
      min_z, max_z = pts.map(&:z).min, pts.map(&:z).max
      tol = 0.001

      (pt.x >= min_x - tol && pt.x <= max_x + tol) &&
      (pt.y >= min_y - tol && pt.y <= max_y + tol) &&
      (pt.z >= min_z - tol && pt.z <= max_z + tol)
    end
  end


  # ===================================================================
  # INICIALIZAÇÃO E ENTRADA DE DADOS
  # ===================================================================
  def self.executar
    prompts = [
      obter_texto(:prompt_res),
      obter_texto(:prompt_limpar),
      obter_texto(:prompt_modo),
      obter_texto(:prompt_tex)
    ]

    defaults = [60, obter_texto(:sim), obter_texto(:modo_3), obter_texto(:sim)]

    list = [
      "",
      "#{obter_texto(:sim)}|#{obter_texto(:nao)}",
      "#{obter_texto(:modo_0)}|#{obter_texto(:modo_1)}|#{obter_texto(:modo_2)}|#{obter_texto(:modo_3)}",
      "#{obter_texto(:sim)}|#{obter_texto(:nao)}"
    ]

    input = UI.inputbox(prompts, defaults, list, obter_texto(:titulo_janela))
    return unless input

    config = {
      grid_res: (input[0].to_i < 30 ? 30 : input[0].to_i),
      limpar_internas: (input[1] == obter_texto(:sim)),
      modo_suavizacao: input[2].split(" - ")[0].to_i,
      texturizar: (input[3] == obter_texto(:sim))
    }

    Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(FerramentaSeletorSilhueta.new(config))
  end


  # ===================================================================
  # PROCESSAMENTO DA SILHUETA (1 FACE POR VEZ)
  # ===================================================================
  def self.processar_uma_face(target_entity, config, chosen_face_name)
    model = Sketchup.active_model
    view = model.active_view

    old_cam = view.camera
    saved_cam_data = {
      eye: old_cam.eye, target: old_cam.target, up: old_cam.up,
      persp: old_cam.perspective?, fov: old_cam.fov
    }

    global_hidden_states = {}
    model.active_entities.each { |ent| global_hidden_states[ent] = ent.hidden? if ent.respond_to?(:hidden?) }

    model.start_operation("#{obter_texto(:op_gerar)} #{chosen_face_name}", true)

    main_group = model.active_entities.add_group
    main_group.name = "SILHUETA_#{chosen_face_name}_#{Time.now.to_i}"

    begin
      bounds = target_entity.bounds
      min, max = bounds.min, bounds.max
      raio_offset = bounds.diagonal * 1.2

      all_configs = [
        { name: "Top",    u: 0, v: 1, f: 2, val: max.z, ray: [0,0,-1], off: raio_offset,  up: [0,1,0] },
        { name: "Bottom", u: 0, v: 1, f: 2, val: min.z, ray: [0,0,1],  off: -raio_offset, up: [0,1,0] },
        { name: "Front",  u: 0, v: 2, f: 1, val: min.y, ray: [0,1,0],  off: -raio_offset, up: [0,0,1] },
        { name: "Back",   u: 0, v: 2, f: 1, val: max.y, ray: [0,-1,0], off: raio_offset,  up: [0,0,1] },
        { name: "Right",  u: 1, v: 2, f: 0, val: max.x, ray: [-1,0,0], off: raio_offset,  up: [0,0,1] },
        { name: "Left",   u: 1, v: 2, f: 0, val: min.x, ray: [1,0,0],  off: -raio_offset, up: [0,0,1] }
      ]

      cfg = all_configs.find { |c| c[:name] == chosen_face_name }
      raise "Config not found" unless cfg

      model.active_entities.each { |ent| ent.hidden = (ent != target_entity) if ent.respond_to?(:hidden?) }
      target_entity.hidden = false
      main_group.hidden = true

      tex_data = nil
      if config[:texturizar]
        tex_data = capturar_textura(view, target_entity, cfg)
      end

      temp_group = main_group.entities.add_group
      f_ents = temp_group.entities
      passo_medio = gerar_grade_adaptativa(model, f_ents, target_entity, cfg, config[:grid_res])

      reparar_faces(f_ents)
      apagar_linhas_sem_face(f_ents)
      if config[:limpar_internas]
        limpar_arestas_coplanares(f_ents)
        limpar_ilhas_menores(f_ents)
      end

      if config[:modo_suavizacao] > 0 && config[:limpar_internas]
        epsilon = passo_medio * 0.45
        processar_contornos(f_ents, config[:modo_suavizacao], epsilon)
      end

      faces_finais = f_ents.grep(Sketchup::Face)
      if faces_finais.empty?
        main_group.entities.erase_entities(temp_group)
      else
        ray_vec = Geom::Vector3d.new(cfg[:ray])
        faces_finais.each { |f| f.reverse! if f.normal.valid? && f.normal.dot(ray_vec) > 0 }

        if config[:texturizar] && tex_data && File.exist?(tex_data[:path])
          mat = model.materials.add("Tex_#{cfg[:name]}_#{Time.now.to_i}")
          mat.texture = tex_data[:path]

          center = tex_data[:center]
          r_vec = tex_data[:right]
          u_vec = tex_data[:up]
          w = tex_data[:cam_w]
          h = tex_data[:cam_h]

          plane_center = center.clone
          plane_center[cfg[:f]] = cfg[:val]

          pt_bl = plane_center.offset(r_vec, -w/2.0).offset(u_vec, -h/2.0)
          pt_br = plane_center.offset(r_vec,  w/2.0).offset(u_vec, -h/2.0)
          pt_tl = plane_center.offset(r_vec, -w/2.0).offset(u_vec,  h/2.0)

          uv_bl = Geom::Point3d.new(0, 0, 0)
          uv_br = Geom::Point3d.new(1, 0, 0)
          uv_tl = Geom::Point3d.new(0, 1, 0)

          faces_finais.each do |f|
            f.material = mat
            f.back_material = mat
            begin
              f.position_material(mat, [pt_bl, uv_bl, pt_br, uv_br, pt_tl, uv_tl], true)
              f.position_material(mat, [pt_bl, uv_bl, pt_br, uv_br, pt_tl, uv_tl], false)
            rescue
            end
          end
        end
        temp_group.explode
      end

    rescue => e
      UI.messagebox("#{obter_texto(:erro_proc)}\n\n#{obter_texto(:erro_label)} #{e.message}")
    ensure
      global_hidden_states.each { |ent, state| ent.hidden = state if ent.valid? }
      main_group.hidden = false if main_group && main_group.valid?
      restaurar_camera(view, saved_cam_data)
      model.commit_operation
    end
  end

  # ===================================================================
  # FUNÇÕES FOTOGRÁFICAS
  # ===================================================================
  def self.capturar_textura(view, target, cfg)
    center = target.bounds.center
    cam = Sketchup::Camera.new
    cam.perspective = false
    eye = center.offset(Geom::Vector3d.new(cfg[:ray]).reverse, 1000)
    cam.set(eye, center, cfg[:up])
    view.camera = cam
    view.zoom(target)

    dir = Sketchup.temp_dir
    path = File.join(dir, "snap_su_#{cfg[:name]}_#{Time.now.to_i}.png")

    begin
      view.write_image({ filename: path, width: view.vpwidth, height: view.vpheight, antialias: true, transparent: true })
    rescue
      view.write_image(path, view.vpwidth, view.vpheight, true)
    end

    cam_look = Geom::Vector3d.new(cfg[:ray])
    cam_up = Geom::Vector3d.new(cfg[:up])
    cam_right = cam_look.cross(cam_up)
    cam_h = view.camera.height
    cam_w = cam_h * (view.vpwidth.to_f / view.vpheight.to_f)

    { path: path, center: center, right: cam_right, up: cam_up, cam_w: cam_w, cam_h: cam_h }
  end

  def self.restaurar_camera(view, data)
    cam = Sketchup::Camera.new(data[:eye], data[:target], data[:up])
    cam.perspective = data[:persp]
    cam.fov = data[:fov] if data[:persp]
    view.camera = cam
  end

  # ===================================================================
  # ALGORITMO ADAPTATIVO
  # ===================================================================
  def self.calc_steps(min, max, res, cfg)
    min_u, max_u = min[cfg[:u]], max[cfg[:u]]
    min_v, max_v = min[cfg[:v]], max[cfg[:v]]
    margem = [(max_u - min_u), (max_v - min_v)].max * 0.05
    real_min_u, real_max_u = min_u - margem, max_u + margem
    real_min_v, real_max_v = min_v - margem, max_v + margem
    step_u = (real_max_u - real_min_u) / res.to_f
    step_v = (real_max_v - real_min_v) / res.to_f
    return step_u, step_v, real_min_u, real_min_v
  end

  def self.cria_pt(u, v, val, cfg)
    c = [0,0,0]; c[cfg[:u]] = u; c[cfg[:v]] = v; c[cfg[:f]] = val
    Geom::Point3d.new(c)
  end

  def self.raio_atinge_alvo?(model, origem, direcao, alvo)
    ponto_atual = origem
    25.times do
      hit = model.raytest([ponto_atual, direcao], false)
      return false unless hit
      ponto_colisao, path = hit
      return true if path.include?(alvo)
      ponto_atual = ponto_colisao.offset(direcao, 0.5.mm)
    end
    return false
  end

  def self.gerar_grade_adaptativa(model, entities, target, cfg, grid_res)
    bounds = target.bounds
    min, max = bounds.min, bounds.max
    res_base = 30
    multiplier = (grid_res / res_base.to_f).ceil
    multiplier = 1 if multiplier < 1
    res_fine = res_base * multiplier
    step_u, step_v, min_u, min_v = calc_steps(min, max, res_fine, cfg)
    coarse_hits = Array.new(res_base + 1) { Array.new(res_base + 1) }

    (0..res_base).each do |ci|
      (0..res_base).each do |cj|
        orig = cria_pt(min_u + (ci*multiplier * step_u), min_v + (cj*multiplier * step_v), cfg[:val] + cfg[:off], cfg)
        coarse_hits[ci][cj] = raio_atinge_alvo?(model, orig, cfg[:ray], target)
      end
    end

    coarse_cell_status = Array.new(res_base) { Array.new(res_base) }
    mixed_expanded = Array.new(res_base) { Array.new(res_base, false) }

    (0...res_base).each do |ci|
      (0...res_base).each do |cj|
        bl, br = coarse_hits[ci][cj], coarse_hits[ci+1][cj]
        tr, tl = coarse_hits[ci+1][cj+1], coarse_hits[ci][cj+1]
        if bl && br && tr && tl
          coarse_cell_status[ci][cj] = :all_true
        elsif !bl && !br && !tr && !tl
          coarse_cell_status[ci][cj] = :all_false
        else
          coarse_cell_status[ci][cj] = :mixed
          (-1..1).each { |di| (-1..1).each { |dj| ni, nj = ci+di, cj+dj; mixed_expanded[ni][nj] = true if ni>=0&&ni<res_base&&nj>=0&&nj<res_base } }
        end
      end
    end

    fine_hits = Array.new(res_fine + 1) { Array.new(res_fine + 1) }
    (0..res_fine).each do |i|
      (0..res_fine).each do |j|
        c_col, c_row = i / multiplier, j / multiplier
        cell_i = c_col >= res_base ? res_base - 1 : c_col
        cell_j = c_row >= res_base ? res_base - 1 : c_row

        if mixed_expanded[cell_i][cell_j]
          if i % multiplier == 0 && j % multiplier == 0
            fine_hits[i][j] = coarse_hits[c_col][c_row]
          else
            orig = cria_pt(min_u + (i * step_u), min_v + (j * step_v), cfg[:val] + cfg[:off], cfg)
            fine_hits[i][j] = raio_atinge_alvo?(model, orig, cfg[:ray], target)
          end
        else
          fine_hits[i][j] = (coarse_cell_status[cell_i][cell_j] == :all_true)
        end
      end
    end

    (0...res_fine).each do |i|
      (0...res_fine).each do |j|
        bl, br, tr, tl = fine_hits[i][j], fine_hits[i+1][j], fine_hits[i+1][j+1], fine_hits[i][j+1]
        desenhar_celula_ms(entities, min_u+(i*step_u), min_v+(j*step_v), step_u, step_v, cfg, [bl, br, tr, tl]) if bl||br||tr||tl
      end
    end
    (step_u + step_v) / 2.0
  end

  def self.desenhar_celula_ms(ent, u, v, su, sv, cfg, st)
    bl, br, tr, tl = st
    val = 0; val|=1 if bl; val|=2 if br; val|=4 if tr; val|=8 if tl
    z = cfg[:val]
    p0 = cria_pt(u,      v,      z, cfg)
    p1 = cria_pt(u+su,   v,      z, cfg)
    p2 = cria_pt(u+su,   v+sv,   z, cfg)
    p3 = cria_pt(u,      v+sv,   z, cfg)
    m0 = cria_pt(u+su/2.0, v,      z, cfg)
    m1 = cria_pt(u+su,   v+sv/2.0, z, cfg)
    m2 = cria_pt(u+su/2.0, v+sv,   z, cfg)
    m3 = cria_pt(u,      v+sv/2.0, z, cfg)
    begin
      case val
      when 1  then ent.add_face(p0, m0, m3)
      when 2  then ent.add_face(p1, m1, m0)
      when 3  then ent.add_face(p0, p1, m1, m3)
      when 4  then ent.add_face(p2, m2, m1)
      when 5  then ent.add_face(p0, m0, m3); ent.add_face(p2, m2, m1)
      when 6  then ent.add_face(p1, p2, m2, m0)
      when 7  then ent.add_face(p0, p1, p2, m2, m3)
      when 8  then ent.add_face(p3, m3, m2)
      when 9  then ent.add_face(p0, m0, m2, p3)
      when 10 then ent.add_face(p1, m1, m0); ent.add_face(p3, m3, m2)
      when 11 then ent.add_face(p3, p0, p1, m1, m2)
      when 12 then ent.add_face(p3, p2, m1, m3)
      when 13 then ent.add_face(p0, m0, m1, p2, p3)
      when 14 then ent.add_face(p1, p2, p3, m3, m0)
      when 15 then ent.add_face(p0, p1, p2, p3)
      end
    rescue; end
  end

  # ===================================================================
  # ALGORITMOS DE VETORIZAÇÃO (DOUGLAS-PEUCKER) E SUAVIZAÇÃO
  # ===================================================================
  def self.processar_contornos(entities, modo, epsilon)
    faces = entities.grep(Sketchup::Face)
    return if faces.empty?

    dados_faces = []
    faces.each do |face|
      face_loops = []
      pts = face.outer_loop.vertices.map(&:position)
      pts = otimizar_loop(pts, epsilon, modo)
      face_loops << pts if pts.length >= 3

      face.loops.each do |loop|
        next if loop == face.outer_loop
        pts_b = loop.vertices.map(&:position)
        pts_b = otimizar_loop(pts_b, epsilon, modo)
        face_loops << pts_b if pts_b.length >= 3
      end
      dados_faces << face_loops unless face_loops.empty?
    end

    entities.erase_entities(entities.to_a)

    dados_faces.each do |loops|
      begin
        nova_face = entities.add_face(loops[0])
        if loops.length > 1 && nova_face
          loops[1..-1].each do |b_pts|
            buraco = entities.add_face(b_pts)
            entities.erase_entities(buraco) if buraco && buraco.valid?
          end
        end
      rescue; end
    end
  end

  def self.otimizar_loop(pts, epsilon, modo)
    pts = simplificar_loop_fechado(pts, epsilon)
    if modo == 2
      pts = suavizar_taubin_1d(pts, 3)
    elsif modo == 3
      pts = suavizar_taubin_1d(pts, 8)
      pts = aplicar_chaikin(pts, 1)
    end
    limpar_pontos_sobrepostos(pts)
  end

  def self.simplificar_loop_fechado(pts, epsilon)
    return pts if pts.length < 4
    idx_max = 0; max_d = 0.0
    (1...pts.length).each { |i| d = pts[0].distance(pts[i]); if d > max_d; max_d = d; idx_max = i; end }
    caminho1, caminho2 = pts[0..idx_max], pts[idx_max..-1] + [pts[0]]
    simp1, simp2 = douglas_peucker(caminho1, epsilon), douglas_peucker(caminho2, epsilon)
    simp1[0...-1] + simp2[0...-1]
  end

  def self.douglas_peucker(pts, epsilon)
    return pts if pts.length < 3
    dmax = 0.0; index = 0; fim = pts.length - 1
    (1...fim).each { |i| d = distancia_ponto_segmento(pts[i], pts[0], pts[fim]); if d > dmax; dmax = d; index = i; end }
    if dmax > epsilon
      res1, res2 = douglas_peucker(pts[0..index], epsilon), douglas_peucker(pts[index..fim], epsilon)
      return res1[0...-1] + res2
    else
      return [pts[0], pts[fim]]
    end
  end

  def self.distancia_ponto_segmento(pt, p1, p2)
    v = p1.vector_to(p2); return pt.distance(p1) unless v && v.valid?
    w = p1.vector_to(pt); c1 = w.dot(v); return pt.distance(p1) if c1 <= 0
    c2 = v.dot(v); return pt.distance(p2) if c2 <= c1
    b = c1 / c2; p_proj = Geom::Point3d.new(p1.x + b*v.x, p1.y + b*v.y, p1.z + b*v.z)
    pt.distance(p_proj)
  end

  def self.suavizar_taubin_1d(pts, iteracoes)
    lambda_v, mu_v = 0.5, -0.45
    iteracoes.times do
      num = pts.length; temp = Array.new(num)
      (0...num).each do |i|
        p_prev, p_curr, p_next = pts[(i-1)%num], pts[i], pts[(i+1)%num]
        dx = (p_prev.x+p_next.x)/2.0-p_curr.x
        dy = (p_prev.y+p_next.y)/2.0-p_curr.y
        dz = (p_prev.z+p_next.z)/2.0-p_curr.z
        temp[i] = Geom::Point3d.new(p_curr.x+lambda_v*dx, p_curr.y+lambda_v*dy, p_curr.z+lambda_v*dz)
      end
      pts_new = Array.new(num)
      (0...num).each do |i|
        p_prev, p_curr, p_next = temp[(i-1)%num], temp[i], temp[(i+1)%num]
        dx = (p_prev.x+p_next.x)/2.0-p_curr.x
        dy = (p_prev.y+p_next.y)/2.0-p_curr.y
        dz = (p_prev.z+p_next.z)/2.0-p_curr.z
        pts_new[i] = Geom::Point3d.new(p_curr.x+mu_v*dx, p_curr.y+mu_v*dy, p_curr.z+mu_v*dz)
      end
      pts = pts_new
    end
    pts
  end

  def self.aplicar_chaikin(pts, iteracoes)
    return pts if pts.length < 3
    iteracoes.times do
      novos_pts = []; num = pts.length
      (0...num).each do |i|
        p1, p2 = pts[i], pts[(i + 1) % num]
        novos_pts << Geom::Point3d.new(p1.x*0.75+p2.x*0.25, p1.y*0.75+p2.y*0.25, p1.z*0.75+p2.z*0.25)
        novos_pts << Geom::Point3d.new(p1.x*0.25+p2.x*0.75, p1.y*0.25+p2.y*0.75, p1.z*0.25+p2.z*0.75)
      end
      pts = novos_pts
    end
    pts
  end

  def self.limpar_pontos_sobrepostos(pts)
    return pts if pts.length < 3
    limpos = [pts[0]]
    pts[1..-1].each { |p| limpos << p if p.distance(limpos.last) > 0.01 }
    limpos.pop if limpos.length > 2 && limpos.last.distance(limpos.first) <= 0.01
    limpos
  end

  # ===================================================================
  # LIMPEZA FINAL
  # ===================================================================
  def self.reparar_faces(ent)
    ent.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each { |e| e.find_faces if e.valid? && e.faces.empty? }
  end

  def self.apagar_linhas_sem_face(ent)
    2.times do
      l = ent.grep(Sketchup::Edge).select { |e| e.valid? && e.faces.empty? }
      break if l.empty?
      ent.erase_entities(l)
    end
  end

  def self.limpar_arestas_coplanares(ent)
    edges = []
    ent.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each do |e|
      next unless e.valid?
      edges << e if e.faces.length == 2 && e.faces[0].normal.parallel?(e.faces[1].normal)
    end
    ent.erase_entities(edges) unless edges.empty?
  end

  def self.limpar_ilhas_menores(ent)
    faces = ent.grep(Sketchup::Face).select(&:valid?)
    return if faces.length < 2
    m = faces.map { |f| [f, f.area] }.sort_by { |p| p[1] }
    m.pop
    to_del = m.map { |p| p[0] }
    ent.erase_entities(to_del) unless to_del.empty?
  end

end
end

description.pt:
Permite criar um plano de corte (Section Plane) dinâmico que fica permanentemente travado na lente da câmera. Ele simula o efeito de ""Near Clipping Plane"" (Plano de Corte Próximo), permitindo que você enxergue o interior de ambientes pequenos ou atravesse paredes sem precisar ocultar objetos manualmente.\n

Como Usar\n
1- Clique em Ativar Corte.\n
2- Arraste o slider de Afastamento para definir a profundidade do corte.\n
3- Navegue normalmente pelo modelo; as paredes e objetos à frente da lente sumirão conforme a distância configurada.\n
4 - Ao fechar a janela ou clicar em Desativar, o plano de corte é removido automaticamente, restaurando a cena original.
description.en:
Allows you to create a dynamic section plane that is permanently locked onto the camera lens. It simulates the "Near Clipping Plane" effect, allowing you to see inside small rooms or through walls without having to manually hide objects.

How to Use:

1. Click on Activate Clipping.

2. Drag the Depth slider to define the depth of the clipping.

3. Navigate normally through the model; walls and objects in front of the lens will disappear according to the configured distance.

4. When you close the window or click Deactivate, the clipping plane is automatically removed, restoring the original scene.
description.es:
Permite crear un plano de sección dinámico que se fija permanentemente en la lente de la cámara. Simula el efecto "Cerca del plano de recorte", lo que permite ver el interior de habitaciones pequeñas o a través de paredes sin tener que ocultar objetos manualmente.

Cómo usar:

1. Haga clic en "Activar recorte".

2. Arrastre el control deslizante de profundidad para definir la profundidad del recorte.

3. Navegue normalmente por el modelo; las paredes y los objetos frente a la lente desaparecerán según la distancia configurada.

4. Al cerrar la ventana o hacer clic en "Desactivar", el plano de recorte se elimina automáticamente, restaurando la escena original.

description.pt:
Crie textos 3D perfeitamente alinhados a qualquer curva ou linha no SketchUp com precisão e controle total.\n
Com este script, você gera letras distribuídas automaticamente ao longo de caminhos, mantendo a leitura ideal e evitando distorções comuns.\n
A ferramenta oferece pré-visualização em tempo real, permitindo ajustar parâmetros de tipografia (fonte, altura, extrusão, negrito, itálico) e espaçamento (entre letras, palavras e offsets) antes da aplicação final.\n
Defina o posicionamento exato no início, centro ou fim da curva, inverta o sentido do texto com um clique e aplique materiais e cores automaticamente para um acabamento profissional instantâneo.
description.en:
Create perfectly aligned 3D text on any curve or line in SketchUp with precision and complete control.
With this script, you generate letters automatically distributed along paths, maintaining ideal readability and avoiding common distortions.
The tool offers real-time preview, allowing you to adjust typography parameters (font, height, extrusion, bold, italic) and spacing (between letters, words, and offsets) before final application.
Define the exact positioning at the beginning, center, or end of the curve, reverse the text direction with a click, and automatically apply materials and colors for an instant professional finish.
description.es:
Crea texto 3D perfectamente alineado en cualquier curva o línea en SketchUp con precisión y control total.
Con este script, generas letras distribuidas automáticamente a lo largo de los trazados, manteniendo una legibilidad ideal y evitando distorsiones comunes.
La herramienta ofrece una vista previa en tiempo real, lo que te permite ajustar los parámetros tipográficos (fuente, altura, extrusión, negrita, cursiva) y el espaciado (entre letras, palabras y desplazamientos) antes de la aplicación final.
Define la posición exacta al principio, centro o final de la curva, invierte la dirección del texto con un clic y aplica automáticamente materiales y colores para un acabado profesional al instante.
