    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # MODULO DE UTILIDADES GEOMETRICAS
    # ==========================================================
    module RoofUtils

      # Retorna hash com cantos do retangulo 3-pontos no plano Z=base.
      # Layout: c0=origem, c1=c0+v_len, c2=c1+v_perp*w, c3=c0+v_perp*w
      # v_perp sempre aponta na direcao real da largura (sinal correto).
      def calcular_cantos_3pt(pt0, pt1, pt_width)
        vx  = pt1.x - pt0.x
        vy  = pt1.y - pt0.y
        len = Math.sqrt(vx*vx + vy*vy)
        return nil if len < 1e-6

        v_len  = Geom::Vector3d.new(vx/len, vy/len, 0)
        perp_x = -vy/len
        perp_y =  vx/len

        dx           = pt_width.x - pt0.x
        dy           = pt_width.y - pt0.y
        width_signed = dx*perp_x + dy*perp_y
        return nil if width_signed.abs < 1e-6

        sign   = width_signed >= 0 ? 1.0 : -1.0
        v_perp = Geom::Vector3d.new(perp_x * sign, perp_y * sign, 0)
        w      = width_signed.abs
        z      = pt0.z

        { corners: [
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt0.x,               pt0.y,               z),
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt1.x,               pt1.y,               z),
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt1.x + v_perp.x*w,  pt1.y + v_perp.y*w,  z),
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt0.x + v_perp.x*w,  pt0.y + v_perp.y*w,  z)
          ],
          v_len:  v_len,
          v_perp: v_perp,
          length: len,
          width:  w }
      end

      # Adiciona face removendo pontos duplicados consecutivos.
      def add_face_safe(ents, *pts)
        pts     = pts.flatten
        cleaned = [pts[0]]
        pts[1..].each { |p| cleaned << p if cleaned.last.distance(p) > 1e-6 }
        cleaned.pop if cleaned.length > 2 && cleaned.last.distance(cleaned.first) < 1e-6
        return nil if cleaned.length < 3
        begin; ents.add_face(cleaned); rescue; nil; end
      end

      # Adiciona face e orienta a normal para FORA do centro do solido.
      def add_face_outward(ents, pts, center)
        f = add_face_safe(ents, pts)
        return unless f
        outward = center.vector_to(f.bounds.center)
        f.reverse! if outward.valid? && f.normal.dot(outward) < 0
        f
      end

      # Adiciona face e garante normal apontando para BAIXO (base do telhado).
      def add_base_face(ents, pts)
        f = add_face_safe(ents, pts)
        return unless f
        f.reverse! if f.normal.z > 0
        f
      end

      # Remove arestas coplanares resultantes da criacao das faces.
      def finalizar_solido(group)
        coplanar = group.entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge).select do |e|
          e.faces.length == 2 &&
            e.faces[0].normal.angle_between(e.faces[1].normal) < 0.01
        end
        group.entities.erase_entities(coplanar) unless coplanar.empty?
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # FERRAMENTA BASE -- RETANGULO 3 PONTOS
    # Gerencia os 3 cliques e o preview; subclasses implementam
    # draw_roof_preview / criar_telhado.
    # ==========================================================
    class Base3PtRoofTool
      include RoofUtils

      def initialize(inclinacao)
        @inclinacao = inclinacao / 100.0
        @ip1        = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @ip2        = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @ip3        = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @pt1        = nil  # origem (fixo apos 1 clique)
        @pt2        = nil  # fim do 1 lado (fixo apos 2 clique)
        @estado     = 0    # 0=aguarda pt1 | 1=aguarda pt2 | 2=aguarda pt3
      end

      def activate;  update_status; end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        case @estado
        when 0 then @ip1.pick(view, x, y)
        when 1 then @ip2.pick(view, x, y, @ip1)
        when 2 then @ip3.pick(view, x, y, @ip2)
        end
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        case @estado
        when 0
          @ip1.pick(view, x, y)
          if @ip1.valid?
            @pt1 = @ip1.position; @estado = 1
          end
        when 1
          @ip2.pick(view, x, y, @ip1)
          if @ip2.valid? && @ip2.position.distance(@pt1) > 1e-4
            @pt2 = @ip2.position; @estado = 2
          end
        when 2
          @ip3.pick(view, x, y, @ip2)
          if @ip3.valid?
            rect = calcular_cantos_3pt(@pt1, @pt2, @ip3.position)
            criar_telhado(rect) if rect && rect[:width] > 1e-4
            Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil)
          end
        end
        update_status
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        on_key(key, view); view.invalidate
      end

      def draw(view)
        case @estado
        when 0
          @ip1.draw(view)
        when 1
          @ip2.draw(view)
          if @pt1
            view.line_width = 2; view.drawing_color = '#2563eb'
            view.draw(GL_LINES, [@pt1, @ip2.position])
          end
        when 2
          @ip3.draw(view)
          rect = calcular_cantos_3pt(@pt1, @pt2, @ip3.position)
          if rect
            view.line_width = 2; view.drawing_color = '#2563eb'
            view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, rect[:corners])
            draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
          end
        end
      end

      # Hooks para subclasses
      def on_key(key, view);          end
      def update_status;              end
      def draw_roof_preview(v, rect); end
      def criar_telhado(rect);        end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TELHADO DUAS AGUAS (Gable)
    # ==========================================================
    class TelhadoDuasAguasTool < Base3PtRoofTool

      def initialize(inclinacao)
        super
        @eixo = 0  # 0=cumeeira paralela a v_len | 1=paralela a v_perp
      end

      def update_status
        chaves = %i[status_duas_aguas_p1 status_duas_aguas_p2 status_duas_aguas_p3]
        Sketchup.set_status_text(RoofMaster.obter_texto(chaves[@estado]))
      end

      def on_key(key, view)
        @eixo ^= 1 if [VK_UP, VK_DOWN, VK_LEFT, VK_RIGHT].include?(key)
      end

      # eixo=0 -> cume no meio da LARGURA (entre c0-c3 e c1-c2)
      # eixo=1 -> cume no meio do COMPRIMENTO (entre c0-c1 e c3-c2)
      def calcular_cume(rect)
        c = rect[:corners]
        if @eixo == 0
          h   = (rect[:width]  / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          cm1 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[0].x+c[3].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[3].y)/2.0, c[0].z+h)
          cm2 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[1].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[1].y+c[2].y)/2.0, c[1].z+h)
        else
          h   = (rect[:length] / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          cm1 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[0].x+c[1].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[1].y)/2.0, c[0].z+h)
          cm2 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[3].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[3].y+c[2].y)/2.0, c[3].z+h)
        end
        [cm1, cm2]
      end

      def draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
        cm1, cm2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        view.draw(GL_LINES, [cm1, cm2])
        if @eixo == 0
          view.draw(GL_LINES, [c[0], cm1, c[3], cm1, c[1], cm2, c[2], cm2])
        else
          view.draw(GL_LINES, [c[0], cm1, c[1], cm1, c[3], cm2, c[2], cm2])
        end
      end

      def criar_telhado(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        cm1, cm2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        center   = Geom::Point3d.new(
          (c[0].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[2].y)/2.0,
          c[0].z + (cm1.z - c[0].z) / 2.0
        )

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_duas_aguas), true)
        grp = model.active_entities.add_group
        grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_duas_aguas)
        ents = grp.entities

        add_base_face(ents, c)

        if @eixo == 0
          # Rampas nos lados da largura; triangulos nas extremidades do comprimento
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], cm2, cm1], center)  # rampa frente
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], cm1, cm2, c[2]], center)  # rampa costas
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], cm1, c[3]],      center)  # triangulo esq
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], c[2], cm2],      center)  # triangulo dir
        else
          # Rampas nos lados do comprimento; triangulos nas extremidades da largura
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[3], cm2, cm1], center)  # rampa esq
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], cm1, cm2, c[2]], center)  # rampa dir
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], cm1],      center)  # triangulo frente
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], c[2], cm2],      center)  # triangulo costas
        end

        finalizar_solido(grp)
        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TELHADO MEIA AGUA (Shed)
    # ==========================================================
    class TelhadoUmaAguaTool < Base3PtRoofTool

      def initialize(inclinacao)
        super
        @lado = 0  # 0=c2,c3 sobem | 1=c1,c2 sobem | 2=c0,c1 sobem | 3=c0,c3 sobem
      end

      def update_status
        chaves = %i[status_meia_agua_p1 status_meia_agua_p2 status_meia_agua_p3]
        Sketchup.set_status_text(RoofMaster.obter_texto(chaves[@estado]))
      end

      def on_key(key, view)
        @lado = 0 if key == VK_UP
        @lado = 1 if key == VK_RIGHT
        @lado = 2 if key == VK_DOWN
        @lado = 3 if key == VK_LEFT
      end

      def calcular_topo(rect)
        c = rect[:corners]
        t = c.map { |p| Geom::Point3d.new(p.x, p.y, p.z) }
        case @lado
        when 0; h = rect[:width]  * @inclinacao; t[2].z += h; t[3].z += h
        when 1; h = rect[:length] * @inclinacao; t[1].z += h; t[2].z += h
        when 2; h = rect[:width]  * @inclinacao; t[0].z += h; t[1].z += h
        when 3; h = rect[:length] * @inclinacao; t[0].z += h; t[3].z += h
        end
        t
      end

      def draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
        t = calcular_topo(rect)
        b = rect[:corners]
        view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, t)
        4.times { |i| view.draw(GL_LINES, [b[i], t[i]]) }
      end

      def criar_telhado(rect)
        c    = rect[:corners]
        tops = calcular_topo(rect)
        all  = c + tops
        center = Geom::Point3d.new(
          all.sum(&:x)/8.0, all.sum(&:y)/8.0, all.sum(&:z)/8.0
        )

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_meia_agua), true)
        grp = model.active_entities.add_group
        grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_meia_agua)
        ents = grp.entities

        add_base_face(ents, c)
        ft = add_face_safe(ents, tops)
        ft.reverse! if ft && ft.normal.z < 0

        4.times do |i|
          j    = (i + 1) % 4
          pts  = [c[i], c[j], tops[j], tops[i]]
          uniq = pts.chunk_while { |a, b| a.distance(b) < 1e-6 }.map(&:first)
          add_face_outward(ents, uniq, center) if uniq.length >= 3
        end

        finalizar_solido(grp)
        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TELHADO QUATRO AGUAS (Hip)
    # ==========================================================
    class TelhadoQuatroAguasTool < Base3PtRoofTool

      def update_status
        chaves = %i[status_quatro_aguas_p1 status_quatro_aguas_p2 status_quatro_aguas_p3]
        Sketchup.set_status_text(RoofMaster.obter_texto(chaves[@estado]))
      end

      # length >= width -> cume paralelo a v_len; ap1 perto c0/c3, ap2 perto c1/c2
      # width  >  length -> cume paralelo a v_perp; ap1 perto c0/c1, ap2 perto c3/c2
      def calcular_cume(rect)
        c      = rect[:corners]
        length = rect[:length]
        width  = rect[:width]
        v_len  = rect[:v_len]
        v_perp = rect[:v_perp]
        cx     = (c[0].x + c[2].x) / 2.0
        cy     = (c[0].y + c[2].y) / 2.0
        z      = c[0].z

        if length >= width
          h    = (width  / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          half = (length - width) / 2.0
          ap1  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx - v_len.x*half,  cy - v_len.y*half,  z+h)
          ap2  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx + v_len.x*half,  cy + v_len.y*half,  z+h)
        else
          h    = (length / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          half = (width  - length) / 2.0
          ap1  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx - v_perp.x*half, cy - v_perp.y*half, z+h)
          ap2  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx + v_perp.x*half, cy + v_perp.y*half, z+h)
        end
        [ap1, ap2]
      end

      def draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
        ap1, ap2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        view.draw(GL_LINES, [ap1, ap2])
        c.each { |pt| view.draw(GL_LINES, [pt, ap1]); view.draw(GL_LINES, [pt, ap2]) }
      end

      def criar_telhado(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        length   = rect[:length]
        width    = rect[:width]
        ap1, ap2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        center   = Geom::Point3d.new(
          (c[0].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[2].y)/2.0,
          c[0].z + (ap1.z - c[0].z) / 2.0
        )

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_quatro_aguas), true)
        grp = model.active_entities.add_group
        grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_quatro_aguas)
        ents = grp.entities

        add_base_face(ents, c)

        if length >= width
          # ap1 perto c0, ap2 perto c1
          # Frente/costas = trapezios; laterais = triangulos
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], ap2, ap1], center)  # frente  (v_perp-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], ap1, ap2, c[2]], center)  # costas  (v_perp+)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], ap1, c[3]],      center)  # lateral esq (v_len-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], c[2], ap2],      center)  # lateral dir (v_len+)
        else
          # ap1 perto c0/c1, ap2 perto c3/c2
          # Frente/costas = triangulos; laterais = trapezios
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], ap1],      center)  # frente  (v_len-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], ap2, c[2]],      center)  # costas  (v_len+)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], ap1, ap2, c[3]], center)  # lateral esq (v_perp-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], c[2], ap2, ap1], center)  # lateral dir (v_perp+)
        end

        finalizar_solido(grp)
        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TRAMA DO TELHADO
    # ==========================================================
    class TramaTool
      COLOR_FACE_HL = Sketchup::Color.new(0, 0, 255, 60)
      COLOR_EDGE_HL = Sketchup::Color.new(255, 0, 0)

      def initialize
        @model          = Sketchup.active_model
        @state          = 0
        @selected_face  = nil
        @face_trans     = nil
        @ref_edge       = nil
        @edge_vector    = nil
        @edge_length    = 0.0
        @user_spacing   = 50.cm
        @user_height    = 20.cm
        @user_thickness = 5.cm
        @real_spacing   = 0.0
        @divisions      = 1
        @ip             = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
      end

      def activate;   update_status; end
      def enableVCB?; true; end

      def calculate_divisions
        return unless @edge_length > 0 && @user_spacing > 0
        @divisions    = [(@edge_length / @user_spacing.to_f).round, 1].max
        @real_spacing = @edge_length / @divisions.to_f
      end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        @ip.pick(view, x, y)
        view.tooltip = @ip.tooltip if @ip.valid?
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        case @state
        when 0
          if @ip.valid? && @ip.face
            @selected_face = @ip.face
            @face_trans    = @ip.transformation
            @state         = 1
            @model.selection.clear
          else
            UI.beep
          end
        when 1
          clicked = @ip.edge
          if clicked && @selected_face.edges.include?(clicked)
            @ref_edge    = clicked
            ps           = clicked.start.position.transform(@face_trans)
            pe           = clicked.end.position.transform(@face_trans)
            vec          = pe - ps
            @edge_length = vec.length
            @edge_vector = vec.normalize
            calculate_divisions
            if show_options_dialog
              create_thick_geometry
              reset_tool
            end
          else
            UI.beep
            Sketchup.status_text = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:error_select_edge)
          end
        end
        update_status
        view.invalidate
      end

      def show_options_dialog
        prompts  = [
          RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_spacing),
          RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_height),
          RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_thick)
        ]
        defaults = [@user_spacing, @user_height, @user_thickness]
        input    = UI.inputbox(prompts, defaults, RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_title))
        return false unless input
        @user_spacing, @user_height, @user_thickness = input
        calculate_divisions
        true
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        reset_tool if key == 27
        view.invalidate
      end

      def create_thick_geometry
        @model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_trama), true)
        ents = @model.active_entities

        # Face temporaria para interseccao
        tmp_grp  = ents.add_group
        g_pts    = @selected_face.outer_loop.vertices.map { |v| v.position.transform(@face_trans) }
        tmp_face = tmp_grp.entities.add_face(g_pts)
        orig_n   = @selected_face.normal.transform(@face_trans)
        tmp_face.reverse! if tmp_face.normal.dot(orig_n) < 0

        face_normal   = tmp_face.normal
        cut_direction = (@edge_vector * face_normal).normalize
        diag          = tmp_face.bounds.diagonal * 5.0

        vec_up   = face_normal.clone;         vec_up.length   = diag
        vec_down = face_normal.reverse.clone; vec_down.length = diag
        vec_fwd  = cut_direction.clone;       vec_fwd.length  = diag
        vec_back = cut_direction.reverse;     vec_back.length = diag

        # Laminas de corte
        blade_grp    = ents.add_group
        p_start_edge = @ref_edge.start.position.transform(@face_trans)

        (1..@divisions - 1).each do |i|
          ctr = p_start_edge.offset(@edge_vector, @real_spacing * i)
          blade_grp.entities.add_face(
            ctr + vec_back + vec_up,
            ctr + vec_fwd  + vec_up,
            ctr + vec_fwd  + vec_down,
            ctr + vec_back + vec_down
          )
        end

        lines_grp = ents.add_group
        blade_grp.entities.intersect_with(
          true, blade_grp.transformation,
          lines_grp.entities, lines_grp.transformation.inverse,
          true, tmp_face
        )
        blade_grp.erase!
        tmp_grp.erase!

        if lines_grp.entities.count == 0
          lines_grp.erase!
          UI.messagebox(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:error_invalid_geom))
          @model.commit_operation
          return
        end

        final_grp      = ents.add_group
        final_grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_trama_master)
        half_thick     = @user_thickness / 2.0

        lines_grp.entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each do |edge|
          v_line = edge.start.position.vector_to(edge.end.position)
          next unless v_line.valid?

          v_off        = (v_line * face_normal).normalize
          v_off.length = half_thick
          ps, pe       = edge.start.position, edge.end.position

          beam_grp      = final_grp.entities.add_group
          beam_grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_trama_viga)
          bf = beam_grp.entities.add_face(
            ps + v_off, ps - v_off, pe - v_off, pe + v_off
          )
          if bf
            bf.reverse! if bf.normal.dot(face_normal) < 0
            bf.pushpull(@user_height)
          end
        end

        lines_grp.erase!
        @model.selection.clear
        @model.selection.add(final_grp)
        @model.commit_operation
      end

      def reset_tool
        @state = 0; @selected_face = nil; @face_trans = nil; @ref_edge = nil
        update_status
      end

      def draw(view)
        @ip.draw(view) if @ip.valid?

        if @selected_face&.valid?
          pts = @selected_face.outer_loop.vertices.map { |v| v.position.transform(@face_trans) }
          view.drawing_color = COLOR_FACE_HL
          view.draw(GL_POLYGON, pts)
        end

        if @state == 1
          curr = @ip.edge
          if curr && @selected_face&.edges&.include?(curr)
            p1 = curr.start.position.transform(@face_trans)
            p2 = curr.end.position.transform(@face_trans)
            view.line_width    = 5
            view.drawing_color = COLOR_EDGE_HL
            view.draw(GL_LINES, p1, p2)
            divs = [(p1.distance(p2) / @user_spacing.to_f).round, 1].max
            view.draw_text(@ip.position,
              RoofMaster.obter_texto(:draw_divisions) % { divs: divs })
          end
        end
      end

      def update_status
        Sketchup.status_text = RoofMaster.obter_texto(
          @state == 0 ? :status_trama_face : :status_trama_edge
        )
        Sketchup.vcb_value = @user_spacing
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # EXECUCAO PRINCIPAL
    # ==========================================================
    def self.executar
      if @dialog&.visible?
        @dialog.bring_to_front
        return
      end

      @dialog = UI::HtmlDialog.new(
        dialog_title: obter_texto(:html_title),
        scrollable:   false,
        resizable:    true,
        width:        360,
        height:       610,
        style:        UI::HtmlDialog::STYLE_DIALOG
      )

      @dialog.set_html(build_html)

      @dialog.add_action_callback('execute_tool') do |_ctx, type, slope|
        inc   = slope.to_f
        model = Sketchup.active_model
        case type
        when 'meia'   then model.select_tool(TelhadoUmaAguaTool.new(inc))
        when 'duas'   then model.select_tool(TelhadoDuasAguasTool.new(inc))
        when 'quatro' then model.select_tool(TelhadoQuatroAguasTool.new(inc))
        when 'trama'  then model.select_tool(TramaTool.new)
        end
      end

      @dialog.show
    end

    # HTML em metodo proprio para melhor legibilidade
    def self.build_html
      lang = Sketchup.get_locale.split('-')[0]
      <<~HTML
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="#{lang}">
        <head>
          <meta charset="UTF-8">
          <style>
            :root {
              --primary: #2563eb;
              --bg:      #f8f9fa;
              --card:    #ffffff;
              --text:    #1f2937;
              --border:  #e5e7eb;
            }
            *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
            html, body {
              width: 100%; height: 100%;
              margin: 0; padding: 0;
              font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
              background: var(--bg); color: var(--text);
              user-select: none;
            }
            body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }

            .header {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a8a, var(--primary));
              color: white; padding: 16px; text-align: center;
              font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 2.5vw, 1.3rem);
              font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
              box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
            }

            .content {
              flex: 1 1 auto; overflow-y: auto;
              padding: clamp(10px, 3%, 20px);
              display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0;
            }

            .input-box {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              background: var(--card);
              padding: clamp(10px,2%,18px) clamp(12px,3%,20px);
              border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
              box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
              display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
              margin-bottom: clamp(10px,2%,18px);
            }
            .input-box label { font-weight: 600; font-size: clamp(0.8rem,2vw,0.95rem); }
            .input-wrapper {
              display: flex; align-items: center;
              background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
              border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px 12px;
            }
            .input-wrapper input {
              width: 50px; border: none; background: transparent;
              font-size: clamp(0.95rem,2vw,1.1rem); font-weight: 600;
              text-align: center; outline: none; color: var(--primary);
            }
            .input-wrapper span { font-weight: 600; color: #6b7280; margin-left: 4px; }

            .hint {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              font-size: clamp(0.65rem,1.8vw,0.75rem); color: #6b7280;
              text-align: center; margin-bottom: clamp(8px,2%,14px);
              padding: 5px 10px; background: #eff6ff;
              border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            }

            .grid {
              flex: 1 1 auto;
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
              gap: clamp(8px,2%,14px);
              align-content: start;
            }

            .card {
              background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
              border-radius: 12px; padding: clamp(10px,2%,16px);
              cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center;
              gap: clamp(10px,3%,18px); transition: all .2s ease;
            }
            .card:hover {
              transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--primary);
              box-shadow: 0 8px 15px -3px rgba(37,99,235,.15);
            }

            .icon {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              width: clamp(36px,8%,48px); height: clamp(36px,8%,48px);
              background: #eff6ff; border-radius: 10px;
              display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
              color: var(--primary);
            }
            .icon svg { width: 60%; height: 60%; }

            .info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; }
            .title {
              font-weight: 600; font-size: clamp(0.85rem,2vw,1.05rem);
              margin-bottom: 3px; white-space: nowrap;
              overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
            }
            .desc { font-size: clamp(0.7rem,1.6vw,0.8rem); color: #6b7280; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <div class="header">#{obter_texto(:html_select_tool)}</div>
          <div class="content">

            <div class="input-box">
              <label>#{obter_texto(:html_slope_label)}</label>
              <div class="input-wrapper">
                <input type="number" id="slope" value="35" min="5" max="200">
                <span>#{obter_texto(:html_slope_unit)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="hint">📌 #{obter_texto(:html_hint)}</div>

            <div class="grid">

              <div class="card" onclick="go('meia')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <polygon points="4 20 20 20 20 8 4 16"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_meia_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_meia_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card" onclick="go('duas')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <path d="M3 20h18M12 4L3 14h18L12 4z"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_duas_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_duas_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card" onclick="go('quatro')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <path d="M2 20h20L18 8H6L2 20z"/>
                    <path d="M6 8L12 3L18 8"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_quatro_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_quatro_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card" onclick="go('trama')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/>
                    <line x1="3"  y1="9"  x2="21" y2="9"/>
                    <line x1="3"  y1="15" x2="21" y2="15"/>
                    <line x1="9"  y1="3"  x2="9"  y2="21"/>
                    <line x1="15" y1="3"  x2="15" y2="21"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_trama_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_trama_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>

          <script>
            function go(type) {
              sketchup.execute_tool(type, document.getElementById('slope').value);
            }
          </script>
        </body>
        </html>
      HTML
    end

  end # module RoofMaster
end   # module ScriptUpComunidade

ScriptUpComunidade::RoofMaster.executar

description.pt:
Esta ferramenta otimiza o desempenho de modelos 3D reduzindo a contagem de polígonos de grupos ou componentes selecionados através do algoritmo de colapso de arestas (QEM). O script resolve problemas de lentidão e arquivos pesados na arquitetura e modelagem, simplificando a geometria enquanto tenta manter o formato original e os mapeamentos de textura.

Principais Funcionalidades:
- Apresenta uma interface interativa em HTML com um controle deslizante para definir a porcentagem de redução desejada.
- Oferece uma ferramenta de pré-visualização em tempo real (usando OpenGL) que exibe a nova malha simplificada antes da aplicação final.
- Preserva dados essenciais da modelagem original, incluindo materiais aplicados (frontais e traseiros) e coordenadas UV de texturas durante o processo de triangulação e redução.
- Possui configurações avançadas para proteger contornos abertos (bordas livres) e preservar arestas vivas com base em um limite de ângulo configurável.
- Reconstrói a malha no SketchUp garantindo triângulos puros e aplica suavização automática (soft/smooth) em arestas coplanares para um acabamento visual limpo.
description.en:
This tool optimizes the performance of 3D models by reducing the polygon count of selected groups or components through the Edge Collapse Algorithm (QEM). The script solves problems of slowness and large files in architecture and modeling, simplifying the geometry while attempting to maintain the original shape and texture mappings.

Key Features:
- Presents an interactive HTML interface with a slider to set the desired reduction percentage.
- Offers a real-time preview tool (using OpenGL) that displays the new simplified mesh before final application.
- Preserves essential data from the original model, including applied materials (front and back) and UV coordinates of textures during the triangulation and reduction process.
- Has advanced settings to protect open contours (free edges) and preserve sharp edges based on a configurable angle limit.
- Reconstructs the mesh in SketchUp ensuring pure triangles and applies automatic smoothing to coplanar edges for a clean visual finish.
description.es:
Esta herramienta optimiza el rendimiento de los modelos 3D reduciendo el número de polígonos de grupos o componentes seleccionados mediante el Algoritmo de Colapso de Aristas (QEM). El script resuelve problemas de lentitud y archivos grandes en arquitectura y modelado, simplificando la geometría a la vez que intenta mantener la forma y las texturas originales.

Características principales:
- Presenta una interfaz HTML interactiva con un control deslizante para ajustar el porcentaje de reducción deseado.

- Ofrece una herramienta de previsualización en tiempo real (mediante OpenGL) que muestra la nueva malla simplificada antes de su aplicación final.

- Conserva los datos esenciales del modelo original, incluidos los materiales aplicados (frontal y posterior) y las coordenadas UV de las texturas durante el proceso de triangulación y reducción.

- Cuenta con ajustes avanzados para proteger los contornos abiertos (aristas libres) y preservar las aristas definidas según un límite angular configurable.

- Reconstruye la malla en SketchUp, asegurando triángulos puros y aplicando suavizado automático a las aristas coplanares para un acabado visual impecable.

# encoding: UTF-8
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Redutor de Malha (Mesh Reducer) v2 — QEM Edge Collapse adaptado
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

module ScriptUpComunidade
  module RedutorDeMalha

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :titulo => "Redutor de Malha",
        :clique_grupo => "Clique em um grupo ou componente",
        :clique_objeto => "Clique em um objeto para começar",
        :grupo => "Grupo",

        :calculando => "Calculando",
        :reconstruindo => "Reconstruindo",
        :analisando_hierarquia => "Analisando hierarquia...",

        :erro => "Erro: ",
        :faces => "faces",
        :visualizacao => "Visualização",

        :objetos => "objetos",

        :proteger_arestas => "Proteger arestas vivas",
        :penaliza_angulos => "Penaliza ângulos agudos",
        :angulo_limite => "Ângulo limite",
        :suavizar_resultado => "Suavizar resultado",
        :auto_smooth => "Auto-smooth < 25°",
        :btn_cancelar => "Cancelar",
        :btn_visualizar => "Visualizar",
        :btn_aplicar => "Aplicar",
        :btn_desligar => "Desligar",
        :js_processando => "Processando",
        :js_atualizando => "Atualizando...",
        :js_gerando => "Gerando...",

      },
      'en-US' => {
        :titulo => "Mesh Reducer",
        :clique_grupo => "Click on a group or component",
        :clique_objeto => "Click on an object to start",
        :grupo => "Group",
        :aguarde_carregamento => "Wait for loading...",
        :calculando => "Calculating",
        :reconstruindo => "Rebuilding",
        :analisando_hierarquia => "Analyzing hierarchy...",
        :carregando => "Loading",
        :nenhuma_face => "No faces found.",
        :erro => "Error: ",
        :faces => "faces",
        :visualizacao => "Preview",
        :aplicado => "Applied!",
        :pronto => "Ready",
        :decimando => "Decimating",
        :objetos => "objects",
        :original => "Original",
        :resultado => "Result",
        :economia => "Savings",
        :reducao => "Reduction",
        :preservar_bordas => "Preserve free edges",
        :mantem_contornos => "Keeps open contours",
        :proteger_arestas => "Protect hard edges",
        :penaliza_angulos => "Penalizes sharp angles",
        :angulo_limite => "Angle limit",
        :suavizar_resultado => "Smooth result",
        :auto_smooth => "Auto-smooth < 25°",
        :btn_cancelar => "Cancel",
        :btn_visualizar => "Preview",
        :btn_aplicar => "Apply",
        :btn_desligar => "Turn Off",
        :js_processando => "Processing",
        :js_atualizando => "Updating...",
        :js_gerando => "Generating...",
