    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    @dialog = nil

    # ==================================================
    # 1. MÓDULOS DE GEOMETRIA E UTILITÁRIOS
    # ==================================================
    module GeoMath
      def self.circle_points(center, normal, radius, segs)
        pts =[]
        step = 2 * Math::PI / segs
        xa = normal.parallel?(Z_AXIS) ? X_AXIS : normal.axes.x
        ya = normal.parallel?(Z_AXIS) ? Y_AXIS : normal.axes.y
        (0..segs).each do |i|
          ang = step * i
          v = Geom::Vector3d.linear_combination(Math.cos(ang)*radius, xa, Math.sin(ang)*radius, ya)
          pts << center + v
        end
        pts
      end
    end

    module Subdivider
      def self.bary(a, b, c, u, v)
        w = 1.0 - u - v
        Geom::Point3d.new(a.x*u + b.x*v + c.x*w, a.y*u + b.y*v + c.y*w, a.z*u + b.z*v + c.z*w)
      end

      def self.add_oriented_face(entities, points, ref_normal)
        f = entities.add_face(points)
        return nil unless f
        f.reverse! if f.normal.dot(ref_normal) < 0
        f.edges.each { |e| if e.faces.length > 1; e.soft = true; e.smooth = true; end }
        f
      end

      def self.execute(n_subdivs)
        model = Sketchup.active_model; sel = model.selection
        faces = sel.grep(Sketchup::Face)
        return UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_sel_faces)) if faces.empty?
        if n_subdivs > 6; return unless UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_heavy), MB_YESNO) == IDYES; end

        model.start_operation(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:op_subdiv), true)
        tri_faces =[]
        faces.each do |f| 
           mesh = f.mesh; norm = f.normal.clone; pts = mesh.points
           f.erase!
           mesh.polygons.each { |poly| 
             idx = poly.map{|i| i.abs-1}
             new_f = add_oriented_face(model.active_entities, [pts[idx[0]], pts[idx[1]], pts[idx[2]]], norm)
             tri_faces << new_f if new_f
           }
        end
        
        tri_data = tri_faces.map { |f| { :pts => f.vertices.map(&:position), :normal => f.normal.clone } }
        tri_faces.each { |f| f.erase! if f.valid? }

        n = n_subdivs
        tri_data.each do |data|
          pA, pB, pC = data[:pts]; norm = data[:normal]
          (0...n).each do |i|
            (0...(n-i)).each do |j|
              a = bary(pA, pB, pC, i.to_f/n, j.to_f/n)
              b = bary(pA, pB, pC, (i+1).to_f/n, j.to_f/n)
              c = bary(pA, pB, pC, i.to_f/n, (j+1).to_f/n)
              add_oriented_face(model.active_entities,[a, b, c], norm)
              if (i + j + 1) < n
                d = bary(pA, pB, pC, (i+1).to_f/n, (j+1).to_f/n)
                add_oriented_face(model.active_entities,[b, d, c], norm)
              end
            end
          end
        end
        model.commit_operation
      end

      def self.execute_grid(spacing_str)
        model = Sketchup.active_model; sel = model.selection
        return UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_sel_geom)) if sel.empty?

        spacing = spacing_str.to_s.gsub(',', '.').gsub(/[^\d.]/, '').to_f.m
        return UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_spacing)) if spacing <= 0.001

        model.start_operation(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:op_grid_sub), true)
        begin
          bb = Geom::BoundingBox.new
          sel.each { |e| bb.add(e.bounds) }
          min = bb.min; max = bb.max; margin = 10.cm 
          z_bottom = min.z - margin; z_top = max.z + margin

          steps_x = ((max.x - min.x) / spacing).to_i
          (1..steps_x).each do |i|
            x_pos = min.x + (spacing * i)
            perform_cut(model, Geom::Point3d.new(x_pos, min.y - margin, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(x_pos, max.y + margin, 0), z_bottom, z_top)
          end

          steps_y = ((max.y - min.y) / spacing).to_i
          (1..steps_y).each do |i|
            y_pos = min.y + (spacing * i)
            perform_cut(model, Geom::Point3d.new(min.x - margin, y_pos, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(max.x + margin, y_pos, 0), z_bottom, z_top)
          end

          model.commit_operation
          model.active_view.invalidate
        rescue => e
          model.abort_operation
          puts e.message
        end
      end

      def self.perform_cut(model, p1, p2, z_min, z_max)
        ents = model.active_entities; kg = ents.add_group
        kg.entities.add_face([p1.x, p1.y, z_min],[p2.x, p2.y, z_min],[p2.x, p2.y, z_max],[p1.x, p1.y, z_max])
        trans = Geom::Transformation.new
        ents.intersect_with(true, trans, ents, trans, false, [kg])
        kg.erase!
      end
    end

    module Solidifier
      def self.execute(thickness_str)
        model = Sketchup.active_model; sel = model.selection
        if sel.empty? || !(sel.first.is_a?(Sketchup::Group) || sel.first.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance))
          return UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_sel_open))
        end
        begin; thickness = thickness_str.to_l; rescue; return; end
        
        entity = sel.first
        ents = entity.is_a?(Sketchup::ComponentInstance) ? entity.definition.entities : entity.entities
        trans = entity.transformation
        
        model.start_operation(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:op_solid), true)
        edges = ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).select { |e| e.faces.length == 1 }
        if edges.empty?
          model.abort_operation
          return UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_closed))
        end
        
        min_z = 1e9
        edges.each { |e| e.vertices.each { |v| 
          w_pos = v.position.transform(trans)
          min_z = w_pos.z if w_pos.z < min_z 
        }}
        base_z = min_z - thickness
        
        pool = edges.dup; curr_edge = pool.shift; pool.unshift(curr_edge)
        while !pool.empty?
          loop_verts =[]; start_edge = pool.shift; v_curr = start_edge.end
          loop_verts << start_edge.start.position; loop_verts << start_edge.end.position
          
          found_next = true
          while found_next
            found_next = false
            idx = pool.index { |e| e.start == v_curr || e.end == v_curr }
            if idx
              next_edge = pool.delete_at(idx)
              v_curr = (next_edge.start == v_curr) ? next_edge.end : next_edge.start
              loop_verts << v_curr.position
              found_next = true
            end
            break if v_curr == start_edge.start
          end
          create_walls_and_floor(ents, loop_verts, base_z, trans) if loop_verts.size >= 3
        end
        model.commit_operation
      end

      def self.create_walls_and_floor(entities, vertices, base_z, trans)
        inverse = trans.inverse; base_pts_local =[]; pts = vertices.dup
        pts.pop if pts.first == pts.last
        pts.each_with_index do |pt_local, i|
          pt_world = pt_local.transform(trans)
          pt_base_world = Geom::Point3d.new(pt_world.x, pt_world.y, base_z)
          pt_base_local = pt_base_world.transform(inverse)
          base_pts_local << pt_base_local
          next_pt_local = pts[(i+1) % pts.size]
          next_pt_world = next_pt_local.transform(trans)
          next_pt_base_world = Geom::Point3d.new(next_pt_world.x, next_pt_world.y, base_z)
          next_pt_base_local = next_pt_base_world.transform(inverse)
          entities.add_face(pt_local, next_pt_local, next_pt_base_local, pt_base_local)
        end
        base_face = entities.add_face(base_pts_local.reverse)
        base_face.reverse! if base_face && base_face.normal.z > 0
      end
    end

    class CurveSmoother
      def self.process(entities, iterations=0)
        edges = entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge); return if edges.empty?
        chains = organize(edges); entities.erase_entities(edges)
        chains.each { |pts| 
          smoothed_pts = iterations > 0 ? smooth(pts, iterations) : pts
          entities.add_curve(smoothed_pts) if smoothed_pts.size > 1 
        }
      end
      def self.organize(edges)
        chains =[]; pool = edges.dup
        while !pool.empty?
          chain =[pool.first.start.position, pool.first.end.position]
          curr = pool.shift.end
          loop do
            idx = pool.index { |e| e.start == curr || e.end == curr }
            break unless idx
            e = pool.delete_at(idx)
            curr = (e.start == curr) ? e.end : e.start
            chain << curr.position
          end
          chains << chain
        end
        chains
      end
      def self.smooth(pts, iterations=1)
        return pts if pts.size < 3
        result = pts.dup
        iterations.times do
          new_pts =[result.first]
          (1...result.size-1).each do |i|
            prev_pt, curr_pt, next_pt = result[i-1], result[i], result[i+1]
            smoothed = Geom::Point3d.new(
              (prev_pt.x + 2*curr_pt.x + next_pt.x) / 4.0,
              (prev_pt.y + 2*curr_pt.y + next_pt.y) / 4.0,
              (prev_pt.z + 2*curr_pt.z + next_pt.z) / 4.0
            )
            new_pts << smoothed
          end
          new_pts << result.last
          result = new_pts
        end
        result
      end
    end

    # ==================================================
    # 2. GERADOR DE SUPERFÍCIES (SKIN 3D INTEGRADO)
    # ==================================================
    module Skin3D
      def self.exact_boundary_z(pt, local_pts)
        local_pts.each_with_index do |p1, i|
          p2 = local_pts[(i + 1) % local_pts.size]
          p1_2d = Geom::Point3d.new(p1.x, p1.y, 0)
          p2_2d = Geom::Point3d.new(p2.x, p2.y, 0)
          pt_2d = Geom::Point3d.new(pt.x, pt.y, 0)
          dist_diff = (p1_2d.distance(pt_2d) + pt_2d.distance(p2_2d)) - p1_2d.distance(p2_2d)
          if dist_diff.abs < 1e-4
            return p1.z if p1_2d.distance(p2_2d) < 1e-5
            ratio = p1_2d.distance(pt_2d) / p1_2d.distance(p2_2d)
            return p1.z + (p2.z - p1.z) * ratio
          end
        end
        nil
      end

      def self.interpolate_z(x, y, contour_points)
        num = 0.0; den = 0.0
        contour_points.each do |cp|
          dist = Math.hypot(cp.x - x, cp.y - y)
          return cp.z if dist < 0.001
          weight = 1.0 / (dist**2.5)
          num += weight * cp.z
          den += weight
        end
        den == 0.0 ? 0.0 : num / den
      end

      def self.laplacian_relax(ents, vertices, iterations, limit_to_2d)
        return if vertices.empty? || iterations < 1
        iterations.times do
          verts_to_move = []; vectors =[]
          vertices.each do |v|
            next unless v.valid?
            neighbors = v.edges.map { |e| e.other_vertex(v) }.select(&:valid?)
            next if neighbors.empty?
            sum_x, sum_y, sum_z = 0.0, 0.0, 0.0
            neighbors.each { |n| pos = n.position; sum_x += pos.x; sum_y += pos.y; sum_z += pos.z }
            avg_p = Geom::Point3d.new(sum_x / neighbors.size, sum_y / neighbors.size, sum_z / neighbors.size)
            vec = v.position.vector_to(avg_p)
            vec.z = 0.0 if limit_to_2d
            if vec.valid? && vec.length > 0.0001
              vec.x *= 0.5; vec.y *= 0.5; vec.z *= 0.5
              verts_to_move << v; vectors << vec
            end
          end
          ents.transform_by_vectors(verts_to_move, vectors) unless verts_to_move.empty?
        end
      end

      def self.generate(dist_val, density, iter)
        model = Sketchup.active_model; sel = model.selection
        edges = sel.grep(Sketchup::Edge)
        return UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_sel_loop)) if edges.empty?

        model.start_operation(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:op_skin), true)

        v_counts = Hash.new(0)
        edges.each { |e| v_counts[e.start] += 1; v_counts[e.end] += 1 }
        start_vertex = v_counts.find { |_, count| count == 1 }&.first || edges.first.start
        
        ordered_points = [start_vertex.position]; curr_v = start_vertex
        unvisited = edges.dup
        
        while unvisited.any?
          nxt_e = unvisited.find { |e| e.start == curr_v || e.end == curr_v }
          break unless nxt_e
          unvisited.delete(nxt_e)
          nxt_v = (nxt_e.start == curr_v) ? nxt_e.end : nxt_e.start
          ordered_points << nxt_v.position
          curr_v = nxt_v
        end
        ordered_points.pop if ordered_points.first.distance(ordered_points.last) < 1e-4

        if ordered_points.size < 3
          UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_min_points))
          return model.abort_operation
        end

        normal = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 0)
        ordered_points.each_with_index do |p1, i|
          p2 = ordered_points[(i + 1) % ordered_points.size]
          normal.x += (p1.y - p2.y) * (p1.z + p2.z)
          normal.y += (p1.z - p2.z) * (p1.x + p2.x)
          normal.z += (p1.x - p2.x) * (p1.y + p2.y)
        end
        normal = normal.length < 1e-5 ? Geom::Vector3d.new(0,0,1) : normal.normalize!

        bb = Geom::BoundingBox.new
        ordered_points.each { |pt| bb.add(pt) }
        tr_to_3d = Geom::Transformation.new(bb.center, normal)
        tr_to_local = tr_to_3d.inverse
        local_pts = ordered_points.map { |pt| pt.transform(tr_to_local) }

        edges.each { |e| e.erase! if e.valid? } if dist_val == 0.0

        local_bounds = Geom::BoundingBox.new
        local_pts.each { |p| local_bounds.add(p) }
        cell_size = local_bounds.diagonal / (density * 5.0)

        dense_local_pts =[]
        local_pts.each_with_index do |p1, i|
          p2 = local_pts[(i + 1) % local_pts.size]
          segs =[(p1.distance(p2) / (cell_size * 0.5)).ceil, 1].max
          vec = p2 - p1; step = 1.0 / segs
          (0...segs).each { |s| dense_local_pts << (p1 + Geom::Vector3d.new(vec.x*step*s, vec.y*step*s, vec.z*step*s)) }
        end

        mesh_group = model.active_entities.add_group
        ents = mesh_group.entities
        flat_pts = local_pts.map { |p| Geom::Point3d.new(p.x, p.y, 0) }
        
        face = ents.add_face(flat_pts) rescue nil
        if face.nil?
          flat_pts.each_with_index { |p1, i| ents.add_line(p1, flat_pts[(i+1)%flat_pts.size]) rescue nil }
          ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each(&:find_faces)
          face = ents.grep(Sketchup::Face).first
        end

        return model.abort_operation unless face

        margin = cell_size
        min_x, max_x = local_bounds.min.x - margin, local_bounds.max.x + margin
        min_y, max_y = local_bounds.min.y - margin, local_bounds.max.y + margin
        nx, ny = ((max_x - min_x) / cell_size).ceil, ((max_y - min_y) / cell_size).ceil

        grid_group = ents.add_group
        g_ents = grid_group.entities
        (0..nx).each { |ix| x = min_x + ix*cell_size; g_ents.add_line([x, min_y, 0],[x, max_y, 0]) }
        (0..ny).each { |iy| y = min_y + iy*cell_size; g_ents.add_line([min_x, y, 0],[max_x, y, 0]) }
        
        (0...nx).each do |ix|
          (0...ny).each do |iy|
            px, py = min_x + ix * cell_size, min_y + iy * cell_size
            g_ents.add_line([px, py, 0],[px + cell_size, py + cell_size, 0])
            g_ents.add_line([px, py + cell_size, 0],[px + cell_size, py, 0])
          end
        end
        grid_group.explode

        naked_edges = ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).select { |e| e.valid? && e.faces.empty? }
        ents.erase_entities(naked_edges) unless naked_edges.empty?

        all_edges = ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge)
        boundary_verts = all_edges.select { |e| e.faces.size == 1 }.map { |e|[e.start, e.end] }.flatten.uniq
        all_verts = all_edges.map { |e|[e.start, e.end] }.flatten.uniq
        internal_verts = all_verts - boundary_verts 

        laplacian_relax(ents, internal_verts, 15, true)

        verts_to_move = []; vectors =[]
        all_verts.each do |v|
          z = boundary_verts.include?(v) ? exact_boundary_z(v.position, local_pts) : nil
          z ||= interpolate_z(v.position.x, v.position.y, dense_local_pts)
          vec = Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, z)
          if vec.length > 0.001
            verts_to_move << v; vectors << vec
          end
        end
        ents.transform_by_vectors(verts_to_move, vectors) unless verts_to_move.empty?

        laplacian_relax(ents, internal_verts, iter, false)
        ents.grep(Sketchup::Face).each { |f| f.reverse! if f.normal.z < 0 }
        ents.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each { |e| if e.faces.length > 1; e.soft = true; e.smooth = true; e.hidden = true; end }

        mesh_group.transform!(tr_to_3d)

        if dist_val != 0.0
          vec = normal.clone; vec.length = dist_val.abs; vec.reverse! if dist_val < 0
          mesh_group.transform!(Geom::Transformation.translation(vec))
        end

        sel.clear; sel.add(mesh_group.explode.grep(Sketchup::Face))
        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

    # ==================================================
    # 3. MÉTODOS GERAIS (TERRENO, RELAX, ETC)
    # ==================================================
    def self.execute_flatten_tool(h_str)
      mod = Sketchup.active_model; sel = mod.selection
      return UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:err_sel_group)) if sel.empty?
      begin; dist = h_str.to_l; rescue; return; end
      mod.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_flat), true)
      cp = sel.first.copy; cp.transform!(Geom::Transformation.translation([0,0,dist]))
      verts =[]; cp.explode.each{|e|verts+=e.vertices if e.is_a?(Sketchup::Face)}; verts.uniq!
      if !verts.empty?
        avg = verts.map{|v|v.position.z}.reduce(:+)/verts.size
        mod.active_entities.transform_by_vectors(verts, verts.map{|v|[0,0,avg-v.position.z]})
      end
      mod.commit_operation
    end

    def self.execute_contour_tool(s_str, smooth)
      mod = Sketchup.active_model; sel = mod.selection
      return UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:err_sel_group)) if sel.empty?
      begin; sp = s_str.to_l; rescue; return; end
      mod.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_contour), true)
      bb = sel[0].bounds; z = bb.min.z
      cut = mod.entities.add_group
      cut.entities.add_face(GeoMath.circle_points(bb.center, Z_AXIS, bb.max.distance(bb.min)*1.5, 8))
      res = mod.entities.add_group; res.name = "Contour"
      while z <= bb.max.z
        cut.transform!(Geom::Transformation.new([0,0,z-cut.bounds.min.z]))
        cut.entities.intersect_with(true, cut.transformation, res, res.transformation, true, sel[0])
        z += sp
      end
      cut.erase!; CurveSmoother.process(res.entities, smooth ? 1:0); res.entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each(&:find_faces)
      mod.commit_operation
    end

    def self.apply_noise(amp_str)
      model = Sketchup.active_model; sel = model.selection
      return UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:err_sel_geom)) if sel.empty?
      amplitude = amp_str.to_f.m 
      return if amplitude.abs < 0.0001
      model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_noise), true)
      verts = Set.new
      sel.each { |e| 
        verts.merge(e.vertices) if e.is_a?(Sketchup::Face)
        verts.merge(e.definition.entities.grep(Sketchup::Vertex)) if e.respond_to?(:definition)
      }
      m_verts = []; m_vecs =[]
      verts.each do |v|
        next if v.edges.any? { |e| e.faces.length < 2 }
        factor = (rand - 0.5) * 2.0
        m_verts << v; m_vecs << Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, factor * amplitude)
      end
      if m_verts.any?
        ctx = m_verts[0].parent.entities rescue model.active_entities
        ctx.transform_by_vectors(m_verts, m_vecs)
      end
      model.commit_operation
    end

    def self.create_terrain(data)
      model = Sketchup.active_model; sel = model.selection
      return UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:err_sel_base)) if sel.empty?
      grid_val = data["grid"].to_s.gsub(',', '.').gsub(/[^\d.]/, '').to_f
      thick_val = data["thick"].to_s.gsub(',', '.').gsub(/[^\d.]/, '').to_f
      solid_mode = data["solid"]
      return UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:err_grid_inv)) if grid_val <= 0.001
      step = grid_val.m; base_thick = thick_val.m
      model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_terrain), true)
      ents = sel.grep(Sketchup::Drawingelement)
      temp = model.active_entities.add_group(ents)
      bb = temp.bounds
      min_x, max_x, min_y, max_y = bb.min.x, bb.max.x, bb.min.y, bb.max.y
      ray_z = bb.max.z + 1.m; flr_z = bb.min.z; bs_z = flr_z - base_thick
      sx = ((max_x - min_x) / step).ceil
      sy = ((max_y - min_y) / step).ceil
      mesh = Geom::PolygonMesh.new(sx*sy, sx*sy*2)
      g_idx = Array.new(sx+1) { Array.new(sy+1) }
      b_idx = Array.new(sx+1) { Array.new(sy+1) } if solid_mode
      (0..sx).each do |i|
        cx = min_x + (i * step)
        (0..sy).each do |j|
          cy = min_y + (j * step)
          res = model.raytest([Geom::Point3d.new(cx, cy, ray_z),[0,0,-1]], false)
          pt = (res && res[1].include?(temp)) ? res[0] : Geom::Point3d.new(cx, cy, flr_z)
          g_idx[i][j] = mesh.add_point(pt)
          b_idx[i][j] = mesh.add_point(Geom::Point3d.new(cx, cy, bs_z)) if solid_mode
        end
      end
      (0...sx).each { |i| (0...sy).each { |j| 
        mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[i][j], g_idx[i+1][j], g_idx[i+1][j+1])
        mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[i][j], g_idx[i+1][j+1], g_idx[i][j+1])
      }}
      if solid_mode
        (0...sx).each { |i| (0...sy).each { |j| mesh.add_polygon(b_idx[i][j], b_idx[i][j+1], b_idx[i+1][j+1]); mesh.add_polygon(b_idx[i][j], b_idx[i+1][j+1], b_idx[i+1][j]) } }
        (0...sx).each { |i| mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[i][0], b_idx[i][0], b_idx[i+1][0]); mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[i][0], b_idx[i+1][0], g_idx[i][0]); mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[i][sy], g_idx[i+1][sy], b_idx[i+1][sy]); mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[i][sy], b_idx[i+1][sy], b_idx[i][sy]) }
        (0...sy).each { |j| mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[0][j], g_idx[0][j+1], b_idx[0][j+1]); mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[0][j], b_idx[0][j+1], b_idx[0][j]); mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[sx][j], b_idx[sx][j], b_idx[sx][j+1]); mesh.add_polygon(g_idx[sx][j], b_idx[sx][j+1], g_idx[sx][j+1]) }
      end
      fin = model.active_entities.add_group
      fin.name = "Terreno_Gerado"
      fin.entities.fill_from_mesh(mesh, true, 0)
      temp.explode
      sel.clear; sel.add(fin)
      model.commit_operation
    end

    def self.apply_smoothing(mode)
      model = Sketchup.active_model; model.start_operation(obter_texto(:op_visual), true)
      proc =[]
      model.selection.each do |e|
        if e.is_a?(Sketchup::Face) then proc.concat(e.edges)
        elsif e.respond_to?(:definition) then proc.concat(e.definition.entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge))
        end
      end
      proc.uniq.each { |e| e.soft = e.smooth = mode }
      model.commit_operation
    end

    def self.apply_relaxation(z_only = false)
      model = Sketchup.active_model; sel = model.selection
      return UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:err_sel_geom)) if sel.empty?
      model.start_operation(z_only ? obter_texto(:op_relax_z) : obter_texto(:op_relax_3d), true)
      verts = Set.new
      sel.each { |e| 
        verts.merge(e.vertices) if e.is_a?(Sketchup::Face)
        verts.merge(e.definition.entities.grep(Sketchup::Vertex)) if e.respond_to?(:definition)
      }
      m_verts = []; m_vecs =[]
      verts.each do |v|
        next if v.edges.any? { |e| e.faces.length < 2 } 
        nb = v.edges.map { |e| e.other_vertex(v).position }
        next if nb.empty?
        
        if z_only
          avg_z = nb.map(&:z).reduce(:+) / nb.size.to_f
          z_diff = avg_z - v.position.z
          if z_diff.abs > 0.0001
            m_verts << v; m_vecs << Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, z_diff * 0.5)
          end
        else
          avg = Geom::Point3d.new(0,0,0)
          nb.each { |p| avg = avg + p.to_a }
          target = Geom::Point3d.new(avg.x/nb.size, avg.y/nb.size, avg.z/nb.size)
          vec = v.position.vector_to(target)
          if vec.length > 0.0001
            vec.length = vec.length * 0.5
            m_verts << v; m_vecs << vec
          end
        end
      end
      if m_verts.any?
        ctx = m_verts[0].parent.entities rescue model.active_entities
        ctx.transform_by_vectors(m_verts, m_vecs)
      end
      model.commit_operation
    end

    # ==================================================
    # 4. FERRAMENTA DE INCLINAÇÃO
    # ==================================================
    class SlopeTool
      def initialize
        @model = Sketchup.active_model; @view = @model.active_view; @data =[]
        selection = @model.selection; faces = selection.grep(Sketchup::Face)
        if faces.empty?
          UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.obter_texto(:err_sel_faces))
          @model.select_tool(nil); return
        end
        faces.each do |face|
          center = face.bounds.center; normal = face.normal
          angle = normal.angle_between(Z_AXIS)
          angle = Math::PI - angle if angle > (Math::PI / 2.0)
          if (angle - (Math::PI / 2.0)).abs < 0.001
            @data << { :point => center, :text => "90°", :color => "red" }
          else
            pct = Math.tan(angle) * 100.0
            col = pct < 8.33 ? "#4CAF50" : (pct < 30 ? "#FF9800" : "#F44336")
            @data << { :point => center, :text => sprintf("%.1f%%", pct), :color => col }
          end
        end
        @view.invalidate
      end
      def draw(view)
        @data.each do |item|
          view.drawing_color = item[:color]
          view.draw_points([item[:point]], 10, 2, 2)
          pt2d = view.screen_coords(item[:point])
          view.draw_text(Geom::Point3d.new(pt2d.x+12, pt2d.y, 0), item[:text], :color => item[:color], :size => 10, :bold => true)
        end
      end
      def deactivate(view); view.invalidate; end
    end

    # ==================================================
    # 5. INTERFACE HTML (GUI COM BOTÕES COLORIDOS)
    # ==================================================
    def self.executar
      @dialog&.close
      
      dlg_opts = {
        :dialog_title => obter_texto(:dialog_title),
        :preferences_key => "SandboxPlusPro_Merged_v6",
        :scrollable => true,
        :resizable => true,
        :width => 340,
        :height => 650,
        :style => UI::HtmlDialog::STYLE_DIALOG
      }

      @dialog = UI::HtmlDialog.new(dlg_opts)
      @dialog.set_html(html_code)
      
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_terrain") { |_, p| create_terrain(JSON.parse(p)) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_skin") { |_, p| req = JSON.parse(p); Skin3D.generate(req['offset'].to_f.m, req['density'].to_f, req['iters'].to_i) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_noise") { |_, a| apply_noise(a) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_relax") { |_, z| apply_relaxation(z) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_subdiv") { |_, n| Subdivider.execute(n.to_i) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_grid_sub") { |_, s| Subdivider.execute_grid(s) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_solid") { |_, t| Solidifier.execute(t) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_flat") { |_, h| execute_flatten_tool(h) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_contour") { |_, p| req = JSON.parse(p); execute_contour_tool(req['space'], req['smooth']) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_smooth") { |_, m| apply_smoothing(m) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("do_slope") { |_, _| Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(SlopeTool.new) }
      @dialog.add_action_callback("clear_slope") { |_, _| Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil) }
      
      @dialog.show
    end

    def self.html_code
      <<~HTML
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <head>
          <meta charset="utf-8">
          <style>
            :root { --bg: #1e1e1e; --panel: #2d2d30; --hover: #3e3e42; --text: #cccccc; --border: #3e3e42; }
            body { font-family: "Segoe UI", Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif; background-color: var(--bg); color: var(--text); margin: 0; padding: 10px; user-select: none; }
            
            /* Accordion Styles */
            .accordion { background-color: var(--panel); color: #fff; cursor: pointer; padding: 12px 15px; width: 100%; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); text-align: left; outline: none; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; transition: 0.2s; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; margin-top: 5px;}
            .accordion:hover { background-color: var(--hover); }
            .accordion:after { content: '\\002B'; font-weight: bold; }
            .active { background-color: var(--hover); border-bottom: none; }
            .active:after { content: '\\2212'; }
            .panel { padding: 15px; background-color: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-top: none; display: none; margin-bottom: 5px; border-radius: 0 0 4px 4px; }
            
            /* Form Elements */
            .input-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 12px; }
            input[type="text"], input[type="number"] { width: 60px; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: #fff; padding: 5px; border-radius: 3px; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; outline: none; }
            input:focus { border-color: #777; }
            input[type="checkbox"] { cursor: pointer; }
            
            /* Colored Buttons */
            .btn { width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: none; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; transition: 0.2s; margin-top: 5px; color: #fff; text-transform: uppercase;}
            .btn-group { display: flex; gap: 5px; margin-top: 5px; }
            .btn-group .btn { margin-top: 0; }
            
            .btn-green { background-color: #27ae60; } .btn-green:hover { background-color: #2ecc71; }
            .btn-blue { background-color: #2980b9; } .btn-blue:hover { background-color: #3498db; }
            .btn-purple { background-color: #8e44ad; } .btn-purple:hover { background-color: #9b59b6; }
            .btn-orange { background-color: #d35400; } .btn-orange:hover { background-color: #e67e22; }
            .btn-teal { background-color: #16a085; } .btn-teal:hover { background-color: #1abc9c; }
            .btn-gray { background-color: #555; } .btn-gray:hover { background-color: #777; }

            .divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 15px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>

          <!-- SEÇÃO 1: SUPERFÍCIES E TERRENOS -->
          <button class="accordion active">#{obter_texto(:sec_surfaces)}</button>
          <div class="panel" style="display: block;">
            <div style="color:#aaa; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:10px;">#{obter_texto(:lbl_skin)}</div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_offset)}</label><input type="text" id="sk_off" value="0.0"></div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_density)}</label><input type="number" id="sk_den" value="3.0" step="0.5"></div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_smooth_iter)}</label><input type="number" id="sk_ite" value="20"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-green" onclick="runSkin()">#{obter_texto(:btn_skin)}</button>

            <div class="divider"></div>

            <div style="color:#aaa; font-size:11px; margin-bottom:10px;">#{obter_texto(:lbl_drape)}</div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_grid_size)}</label><input type="text" id="tr_grid" value="1.0"></div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_solid_gen)}</label><input type="checkbox" id="tr_sol" onchange="toggleSolid()"></div>
            <div class="input-row" id="div_tr_thk" style="display:none;"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_base_thk)}</label><input type="text" id="tr_thk" value="1.0"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-blue" onclick="runTerrain()">#{obter_texto(:btn_terrain)}</button>
          </div>

          <!-- SEÇÃO 2: MODIFICAÇÃO DE MALHA -->
          <button class="accordion">#{obter_texto(:sec_mesh)}</button>
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_noise_amp)}</label><input type="text" id="nz_amp" value="0.2"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sketchup.do_noise(document.getElementById('nz_amp').value)">#{obter_texto(:btn_noise)}</button>
            
            <div class="btn-group" style="margin-top: 10px;">
              <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sketchup.do_relax(false)">#{obter_texto(:btn_relax_3d)}</button>
              <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sketchup.do_relax(true)">#{obter_texto(:btn_relax_z)}</button>
            </div>

            <div class="divider"></div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_sub_lvl)}</label><input type="number" id="sb_lvl" value="2" min="1" max="5"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sketchup.do_subdiv(document.getElementById('sb_lvl').value)">#{obter_texto(:btn_subdiv)}</button>
            
            <div class="input-row" style="margin-top:10px;"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_grid_spc)}</label><input type="text" id="sb_grd" value="1.0"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="sketchup.do_grid_sub(document.getElementById('sb_grd').value)">#{obter_texto(:btn_grid_sub)}</button>
          </div>

          <!-- SEÇÃO 3: FERRAMENTAS ESPECIAIS -->
          <button class="accordion">#{obter_texto(:sec_tools)}</button>
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_edge_thk)}</label><input type="text" id="sl_thk" value="1m"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-orange" onclick="sketchup.do_solid(document.getElementById('sl_thk').value)">#{obter_texto(:btn_solid)}</button>

            <div class="divider"></div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_z_copy)}</label><input type="text" id="fl_h" value="20m"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-orange" onclick="sketchup.do_flat(document.getElementById('fl_h').value)">#{obter_texto(:btn_flat)}</button>

            <div class="divider"></div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_contour_step)}</label><input type="text" id="ct_sp" value="1m"></div>
            <div class="input-row"><label>#{obter_texto(:lbl_smooth_curves)}</label><input type="checkbox" id="ct_sm" checked></div>
            <button class="btn btn-orange" onclick="runContour()">#{obter_texto(:btn_contour)}</button>
          </div>

          <!-- SEÇÃO 4: ANÁLISE E VISUAL -->
          <button class="accordion">#{obter_texto(:sec_visual)}</button>
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="btn-group">
              <button class="btn btn-teal" onclick="sketchup.do_slope()">#{obter_texto(:btn_slope)}</button>
              <button class="btn btn-gray" onclick="sketchup.clear_slope()">#{obter_texto(:btn_clear_slope)}</button>
            </div>
            <div class="divider"></div>
            <div class="btn-group">
              <button class="btn btn-teal" onclick="sketchup.do_smooth(true)">#{obter_texto(:btn_smooth_geom)}</button>
              <button class="btn btn-gray" onclick="sketchup.do_smooth(false)">#{obter_texto(:btn_facet_geom)}</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <script>
            // Accordion Logic
            var acc = document.getElementsByClassName("accordion");
            for (var i = 0; i < acc.length; i++) {
              acc[i].addEventListener("click", function() {
                this.classList.toggle("active");
                var panel = this.nextElementSibling;
                panel.style.display = panel.style.display === "block" ? "none" : "block";
              });
            }

            // UI Logic
            function toggleSolid() {
              document.getElementById('div_tr_thk').style.display = document.getElementById('tr_sol').checked ? 'flex' : 'none';
            }

            // Callback Wrappers
            function runSkin() {
              sketchup.do_skin(JSON.stringify({ 
                offset: document.getElementById('sk_off').value, 
                density: document.getElementById('sk_den').value, 
                iters: document.getElementById('sk_ite').value 
              }));
            }

            function runTerrain() {
              sketchup.do_terrain(JSON.stringify({
                grid: document.getElementById('tr_grid').value,
                solid: document.getElementById('tr_sol').checked,
                thick: document.getElementById('tr_thk').value
              }));
            }

            function runContour() {
              sketchup.do_contour(JSON.stringify({
                space: document.getElementById('ct_sp').value,
                smooth: document.getElementById('ct_sm').checked
              }));
            }
          </script>
        </body>
        </html>
      HTML
    end
  end
end

# Inicia a execução imediatamente ao ser colado no Console Ruby
ScriptUpComunidade::SandboxPlusPro.executar

description.pt:
O script resolve a complexidade de criar e exportar animações e passeios virtuais diretamente no SketchUp. Ele permite organizar diferentes visões de câmera em uma linha do tempo interativa e exportar vídeos mp4 em diversos formatos (como retrato, paisagem ou personalizado) através da integração com o FFmpeg, facilitando a apresentação de projetos 3D.

Principais Funcionalidades:
- Gerenciamento de Linha do Tempo (Timeline) interativa, permitindo adicionar visões de câmera, ajustar o tempo, e aplicar transições suaves (Easing) ou repetição (Loop).
- Exportação de vídeo automatizada usando o FFmpeg, com suporte a resoluções predefinidas (Paisagem 16:9, Retrato 9:16, Quadrado 1:1, etc.) e personalizadas.
- Sistema de backup e compartilhamento que permite importar e exportar projetos inteiros ou linhas do tempo individuais no formato JSON.
- Preparação inteligente de ambiente (no Windows) que oculta automaticamente janelas sobrepostas durante a gravação para garantir uma captura de tela limpa.
description.en:
This script solves the complexity of creating and exporting animations and virtual tours directly in SketchUp. It allows you to organize different camera views in an interactive timeline and export MP4 videos in various formats (such as portrait, landscape, or custom) through integration with FFmpeg, facilitating the presentation of 3D projects.

Key Features:
- Interactive Timeline Management, allowing you to add camera views, adjust timing, and apply smooth (Easing) or loop transitions.
- Automated video export using FFmpeg, supporting predefined (Landscape 16:9, Portrait 9:16, Square 1:1, etc.) and custom resolutions.
- Backup and sharing system that allows you to import and export entire projects or individual timelines in JSON format.
- Intelligent environment preparation (on Windows) that automatically hides overlapping windows during recording to ensure a clean screen capture.
description.es:
Este script simplifica la creación y exportación de animaciones y recorridos virtuales directamente en SketchUp. Permite organizar diferentes vistas de cámara en una línea de tiempo interactiva y exportar vídeos MP4 en diversos formatos (como vertical, horizontal o personalizado) mediante la integración con FFmpeg, facilitando la presentación de proyectos 3D.

Características principales:
- Gestión interactiva de la línea de tiempo, que permite añadir vistas de cámara, ajustar la sincronización y aplicar transiciones suaves (Easing) o en bucle.

- Exportación automática de vídeo mediante FFmpeg, compatible con resoluciones predefinidas (Horizontal 16:9, Vertical 9:16, Cuadrado 1:1, etc.) y personalizadas.

- Sistema de copia de seguridad y uso compartido que permite importar y exportar proyectos completos o líneas de tiempo individuales en formato JSON.

- Preparación inteligente del entorno (en Windows) que oculta automáticamente las ventanas superpuestas durante la grabación para garantizar una captura de pantalla nítida.

self.obter_texto(chave) locale = Sketchup.get_locale lang = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US' IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s end # --- Script de Instalação do FFmpeg (Mantido) --- FFMPEG_INSTALL_SCRIPT ||= <<~'RUBY' require 'sketchup' require 'open-uri' require 'fileutils' require 'tmpdir' URL_WIN ||= 'https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases/download/latest/ffmpeg-master-latest-win64-gpl.zip' URL_MAC ||= 'https://evermeet.cx/ffmpeg/getrelease/zip' win = Sketchup.platform == :platform_win major = Sketchup.version.to_s[/^\d+/].to_i sketchup_year = 2000 + major plugins_dir = Sketchup.find_support_file('Plugins') if !plugins_dir || plugins_dir.empty? || !Dir.exist?(plugins_dir) if win base = ENV['APPDATA'].to_s plugins_dir = File.join(base, 'SketchUp', "SketchUp #{sketchup_year}", 'SketchUp', 'Plugins') else plugins_dir = File.expand_path("~/Library/Application Support/SketchUp #{sketchup_year}/SketchUp/Plugins") end end target_dir = File.join(plugins_dir, 'ScriptUp', 'ffmpeg') target_exe = File.join(target_dir, win ? 'ffmpeg.exe' : 'ffmpeg') url = win ? URL_WIN : URL_MAC default_zip_name = win ? 'ffmpeg-win64-gpl-latest.zip' : 'ffmpeg-macos-release.zip' proceed = true unless plugins_dir && !plugins_dir.empty? UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_plugins_erro)) proceed = false end if proceed msg = "#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_instalar_em)}\n#{target_dir}\n\n#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_origem)}\n#{url}\n\n#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_continuar)}" if UI.messagebox(msg, MB_YESNO) != IDYES UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_cancelada)) proceed = false end end if proceed && File.exist?(target_exe) overwrite = UI.messagebox("#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_ja_existe)}\n#{target_exe}\n\n#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_sobrescrever)}", MB_YESNO) if overwrite != IDYES UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_cancelada)) proceed = false end end if proceed Dir.mktmpdir('ffmpeg_dl_') do |tmp| zip_path = File.join(tmp, default_zip_name) extract_dir = File.join(tmp, 'unzipped') begin URI.open(url, 'rb') do |io| File.open(zip_path, 'wb') { |f| IO.copy_stream(io, f) } end Dir.mkdir(extract_dir) if win ps = 'powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command' cmd = "#{ps} \"Expand-Archive -LiteralPath '#{zip_path}' -DestinationPath '#{extract_dir}' -Force\"" ok = system(cmd) raise ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_falha_expand) unless ok else ok = system("unzip -o -q '#{zip_path}' -d '#{extract_dir}'") raise ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_falha_unzip) unless ok end pattern = win ? '**/ffmpeg.exe' : '**/ffmpeg' bin = Dir.glob(File.join(extract_dir, pattern)).find { |p| File.file?(p) } raise ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_exe_nao_encontrado) unless bin FileUtils.mkdir_p(target_dir) unless Dir.exist?(target_dir) FileUtils.cp(bin, target_exe) unless win FileUtils.chmod(0o755, target_exe) system("xattr -d com.apple.quarantine '#{target_exe}' 2>/dev/null") end UI.messagebox("#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_sucesso)}\n#{target_exe}") puts "OK: #{target_exe}" rescue => e UI.messagebox("#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_falhou)} #{e.message}\n#{ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:ffmpeg_abrindo_nav)}") UI.openURL(url) end end end RUBY # --- Módulo WindowUtils --- module WindowUtils extend Fiddle::Importer dlload 'user32.dll' if Sketchup.platform == :platform_win if Sketchup.platform == :platform_win typealias 'HWND', 'void*' extern 'HWND GetActiveWindow()' extern 'HWND GetForegroundWindow()' extern 'HWND GetWindow(HWND, int)' extern 'int GetWindowRect(HWND, void*)' extern 'HWND GetParent(HWND)' extern 'int ShowWindow(HWND, int)' extern 'int SetWindowPos(HWND, HWND, int, int, int, int, unsigned int)' extern 'int IsWindowVisible(HWND)' extern 'unsigned long GetWindowThreadProcessId(HWND, void*)' extern 'HWND GetDesktopWindow()' GW_CHILD = 5 unless defined?(GW_CHILD) GW_HWNDNEXT = 2 unless defined?(GW_HWNDNEXT) SW_HIDE = 0 unless defined?(SW_HIDE) SW_SHOW = 5 unless defined?(SW_SHOW) SWP_NOMOVE = 0x0002 unless defined?(SWP_NOMOVE) SWP_NOSIZE = 0x0001 unless defined?(SWP_NOSIZE) Rect = struct ['long left', 'long top', 'long right', 'long bottom'] unless defined?(Rect) @hidden_windows = [] @topmost_hwnd = nil end def self.get_viewport_rect_deep(view) return nil unless Sketchup.platform == :platform_win hwnd = GetForegroundWindow() return nil if hwnd.nil? || hwnd == 0 vw = view.vpwidth vh = view.vpheight found = find_recursive(hwnd, vw, vh) return found if found parent = GetParent(hwnd) if parent && parent != 0 found = find_recursive(parent, vw, vh) return found if found end nil end def self.find_recursive(parent_hwnd, target_w, target_h) child = GetWindow(parent_hwnd, GW_CHILD) while child && child.to_i != 0 rect = Rect.malloc if GetWindowRect(child, rect) != 0 w = rect.right - rect.left h = rect.bottom - rect.top match = check_match(w, h, target_w, target_h, rect) return match if match end found_in_child = find_recursive(child, target_w, target_h) return found_in_child if found_in_child child = GetWindow(child, GW_HWNDNEXT) end nil end def self.check_match(w, h, target_w, target_h, rect) tol = 30 [1.0, 1.25, 1.5, 2.0].each do |scale| if (w - target_w * scale).abs <= tol && (h - target_h * scale).abs <= tol return { :x => rect.left, :y => rect.top, :w => w, :h => h, :scale => scale } end end nil end # Prepara o ambiente para gravação: esconde janelas sobrepostas e coloca SketchUp no topo def self.prepare_for_recording(rec_rect) return unless Sketchup.platform == :platform_win @hidden_windows = [] @topmost_hwnd = nil begin su_hwnd = GetForegroundWindow() return unless su_hwnd && su_hwnd.to_i != 0 # Obter PID do SketchUp pid_buf = Fiddle::Pointer.malloc(4) GetWindowThreadProcessId(su_hwnd, pid_buf) su_pid = pid_buf[0, 4].unpack('L')[0] # Colocar janela principal do SketchUp como TOPMOST SetWindowPos(su_hwnd, Fiddle::Pointer.new(-1), 0, 0, 0, 0, SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOSIZE) @topmost_hwnd = su_hwnd # Enumerar todas as janelas top-level e esconder as do mesmo processo que sobrepõem a área de gravação desktop = GetDesktopWindow() child = GetWindow(desktop, GW_CHILD) while child && child.to_i != 0 if child.to_i != su_hwnd.to_i && IsWindowVisible(child) != 0 pid_buf2 = Fiddle::Pointer.malloc(4) GetWindowThreadProcessId(child, pid_buf2) child_pid = pid_buf2[0, 4].unpack('L')[0] if child_pid == su_pid win_rect = Rect.malloc if GetWindowRect(child, win_rect) != 0 if rects_overlap?(win_rect, rec_rect) ShowWindow(child, SW_HIDE) @hidden_windows << child end end end end child = GetWindow(child, GW_HWNDNEXT) end rescue => e puts "WindowUtils.prepare_for_recording: #{e.message}" end end # Restaura janelas escondidas e remove TOPMOST def self.restore_after_recording return unless Sketchup.platform == :platform_win begin @hidden_windows.each { |hwnd| ShowWindow(hwnd, SW_SHOW) } @hidden_windows = [] if @topmost_hwnd SetWindowPos(@topmost_hwnd, Fiddle::Pointer.new(-2), 0, 0, 0, 0, SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOSIZE) @topmost_hwnd = nil end rescue => e puts "WindowUtils.restore_after_recording: #{e.message}" end end def self.rects_overlap?(win_rect, rec_rect) !(win_rect.right <= rec_rect[:x] || win_rect.left >= rec_rect[:x] + rec_rect[:w] || win_rect.bottom <= rec_rect[:y] || win_rect.top >= rec_rect[:y] + rec_rect[:h]) end end # --- Módulo ScreenCapture (GDI32) --- # Captures the SketchUp viewport via Win32 GDI and produces a BMP thumbnail # encoded as Base64, suitable for embedding in an HTML tag. # # Uses Fiddle::Importer (Ruby stdlib) to call gdi32.dll and user32.dll functions. # Also declares PrintWindow from user32.dll as a fallback for occluded windows. # # Fiddle type mapping reference (from fiddle/types.rb Win32Types): # HANDLE / HDC / HWND / HBITMAP -> void* (pointer-sized, correct for 32/64-bit) # DWORD -> unsigned long # BOOL -> int # UINT -> unsigned int # # The extern signatures below use 'void*' directly for all handle types # (HDC, HBITMAP, HGDIOBJ) so we do not need to include Fiddle::Win32Types # or add custom typealiases beyond what WindowUtils already defines. module ScreenCapture extend Fiddle::Importer if Sketchup.platform == :platform_win dlload 'gdi32.dll', 'user32.dll' # --- user32.dll functions --- # HDC GetDC(HWND hWnd) # hWnd=NULL(0) returns DC for entire screen extern 'void* GetDC(void*)' # int ReleaseDC(HWND hWnd, HDC hDC) extern 'int ReleaseDC(void*, void*)' # BOOL PrintWindow(HWND hwnd, HDC hdcBlt, UINT nFlags) # Asks the window to paint itself into the given DC. # Works even when the window is partially occluded (unlike BitBlt from screen DC). extern 'int PrintWindow(void*, void*, unsigned int)' # --- gdi32.dll functions --- # HDC CreateCompatibleDC(HDC hdc) extern 'void* CreateCompatibleDC(void*)' # HBITMAP CreateCompatibleBitmap(HDC hdc, int cx, int cy) extern 'void* CreateCompatibleBitmap(void*, int, int)' # HGDIOBJ SelectObject(HDC hdc, HGDIOBJ h) extern 'void* SelectObject(void*, void*)' # BOOL BitBlt(HDC hdc, int x, int y, int cx, int cy, # HDC hdcSrc, int x1, int y1, DWORD rop) extern 'int BitBlt(void*, int, int, int, int, void*, int, int, unsigned long)' # BOOL StretchBlt(HDC hdcDest, int xDest, int yDest, int wDest, int hDest, # HDC hdcSrc, int xSrc, int ySrc, int wSrc, int hSrc, DWORD rop) extern 'int StretchBlt(void*, int, int, int, int, void*, int, int, int, int, unsigned long)' # int SetStretchBltMode(HDC hdc, int mode) extern 'int SetStretchBltMode(void*, int)' # int GetDIBits(HDC hdc, HBITMAP hbm, UINT start, UINT cLines, # LPVOID lpvBits, LPBITMAPINFO lpbmi, UINT usage) # lpvBits and lpbmi are both void* (raw pointers to caller-allocated buffers) extern 'int GetDIBits(void*, void*, unsigned int, unsigned int, void*, void*, unsigned int)' # BOOL DeleteDC(HDC hdc) extern 'int DeleteDC(void*)' # BOOL DeleteObject(HGDIOBJ ho) extern 'int DeleteObject(void*)' # --- Raster-operation and mode constants --- SRCCOPY = 0x00CC0020 unless defined?(SRCCOPY) HALFTONE = 4 unless defined?(HALFTONE) # SetStretchBltMode mode for high-quality shrinking DIB_RGB_COLORS = 0 unless defined?(DIB_RGB_COLORS) # GetDIBits color table usage # --- PrintWindow flags --- PW_CLIENTONLY = 0x00000001 unless defined?(PW_CLIENTONLY) # capture client area only (no title bar) PW_RENDERFULLCONTENT = 0x00000002 unless defined?(PW_RENDERFULLCONTENT) # Win 8.1+: captures DirectX/DWM content end # Build a 40-byte BITMAPINFOHEADER as a packed binary string. # # The BITMAPINFOHEADER struct layout (40 bytes total): # DWORD biSize (4 bytes, unsigned 32-bit LE) = 40 # LONG biWidth (4 bytes, signed 32-bit LE) # LONG biHeight (4 bytes, signed 32-bit LE) negative = top-down DIB # WORD biPlanes (2 bytes, unsigned 16-bit LE) = 1 # WORD biBitCount (2 bytes, unsigned 16-bit LE) = 24 for RGB # DWORD biCompression (4 bytes, unsigned 32-bit LE) = 0 (BI_RGB) # DWORD biSizeImage (4 bytes, unsigned 32-bit LE) # LONG biXPelsPerMeter (4 bytes, signed 32-bit LE) = 0 # LONG biYPelsPerMeter (4 bytes, signed 32-bit LE) = 0 # DWORD biClrUsed (4 bytes, unsigned 32-bit LE) = 0 # DWORD biClrImportant (4 bytes, unsigned 32-bit LE) = 0 # # Pack template: 'L<' = uint32 LE, 'l<' = int32 LE, 'S<' = uint16 LE # Combined: 'L< l< l< S< S< L< L< l< l< L< L<' (spaces for clarity) # # Using negative biHeight produces a top-down DIB, which means: # - Row 0 in memory is the top row of the image # - No vertical flip is needed when writing the BMP file # - The BMP file header must also use the negative height to match def self.pack_bitmapinfoheader(width, height, image_size) [ 40, # biSize width, # biWidth -height, # biHeight (negative = top-down) 1, # biPlanes 24, # biBitCount (24-bit RGB) 0, # biCompression (BI_RGB = uncompressed) image_size, # biSizeImage 0, # biXPelsPerMeter 0, # biYPelsPerMeter 0, # biClrUsed 0 # biClrImportant ].pack('L e puts "ScreenCapture error: #{e.message}" puts e.backtrace.first(5).join("\n") nil end end module TourPlugin class AreaSelectorTool def initialize(callback) @callback = callback @start_x = nil; @start_y = nil; @current_x = nil; @current_y = nil @drawing = false end def activate Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate Sketchup.status_text = ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:status_clicar_arrastar) end def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view) @start_x = x; @start_y = y; @current_x = x; @current_y = y @drawing = true end def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view) if @drawing @current_x = x; @current_y = y view.invalidate end end def onLButtonUp(flags, x, y, view) return unless @drawing @drawing = false x1 = [@start_x, @current_x].min y1 = [@start_y, @current_y].min x2 = [@start_x, @current_x].max y2 = [@start_y, @current_y].max width = x2 - x1 height = y2 - y1 if width < 50 || height < 50 UI.messagebox(ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(:area_pequena)) Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil) return end @callback.call({ :x => x1, :y => y1, :w => width, :h => height }) Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil) end def draw(view) return unless @drawing && @start_x && @current_x points = [ Geom::Point3d.new(@start_x, @start_y, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(@current_x, @start_y, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(@current_x, @current_y, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(@start_x, @current_y, 0) ] view.line_width = 3 view.drawing_color = 'red' view.draw2d(GL_LINE_LOOP, points) end end class ExportPreviewTool def initialize(target_w, target_h) @target_w = target_w @target_h = target_h end def activate Sketchup.active_model.active_view.invalidate end def deactivate(view) view.invalidate end def draw(view) vw = view.vpwidth vh = view.vpheight ew = [@target_w, vw].min eh = [@target_h, vh].min ox = (vw - ew) / 2 oy = (vh - eh) / 2 # Escurecer áreas fora da gravação (letterbox/pillarbox) view.drawing_color = Sketchup::Color.new(0, 0, 0, 120) if oy > 0 view.draw2d(GL_QUADS, [ Geom::Point3d.new(0, 0, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(vw, 0, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(vw, oy, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(0, oy, 0) ]) view.draw2d(GL_QUADS, [ Geom::Point3d.new(0, oy + eh, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(vw, oy + eh, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(vw, vh, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(0, vh, 0) ]) end if ox > 0 view.draw2d(GL_QUADS, [ Geom::Point3d.new(0, oy, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(ox, oy, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(ox, oy + eh, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(0, oy + eh, 0) ]) view.draw2d(GL_QUADS, [ Geom::Point3d.new(ox + ew, oy, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(vw, oy, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(vw, oy + eh, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(ox + ew, oy + eh, 0) ]) end # Borda branca ao redor da área de gravação view.line_width = 2 view.drawing_color = Sketchup::Color.new(255, 255, 255, 200) view.draw2d(GL_LINE_LOOP, [ Geom::Point3d.new(ox, oy, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(ox + ew, oy, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(ox + ew, oy + eh, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(ox, oy + eh, 0) ]) end end module CameraTimeline def self.obter_texto(chave) ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.obter_texto(chave) end module GlobalKey extend Fiddle::Importer if Sketchup.platform == :platform_win dlload 'user32.dll' extern 'short GetAsyncKeyState(int)' else dlload '/System/Library/Frameworks/ApplicationServices.framework/ApplicationServices' extern 'bool CGEventSourceKeyState(int, int)' end DEFAULT_HOTKEY = (Sketchup.platform == :platform_win ? 0x6B : 69) unless defined?(DEFAULT_HOTKEY) @key_code = Sketchup.read_default("TourVirtual", "Hotkey", DEFAULT_HOTKEY).to_i @ctrl = Sketchup.read_default("TourVirtual", "HotkeyCtrl", false) @alt = Sketchup.read_default("TourVirtual", "HotkeyAlt", false) @shift = Sketchup.read_default("TourVirtual", "HotkeyShift", false) # Windows virtual key codes for modifiers VK_CONTROL = 0x11 unless defined?(VK_CONTROL) VK_MENU = 0x12 unless defined?(VK_MENU) VK_SHIFT = 0x10 unless defined?(VK_SHIFT) # macOS key codes for modifiers MAC_CTRL = 59 unless defined?(MAC_CTRL) MAC_SHIFT = 56 unless defined?(MAC_SHIFT) MAC_ALT = 58 unless defined?(MAC_ALT) def self.set_hotkey(code, ctrl, alt, shift) @key_code = code.to_i @ctrl = ctrl @alt = alt @shift = shift end def self.key_code; @key_code; end def self.ctrl; @ctrl; end def self.alt; @alt; end def self.shift; @shift; end def self.key_pressed?(code) if Sketchup.platform == :platform_win GetAsyncKeyState(code) & 0x8000 != 0 else CGEventSourceKeyState(0, code) end end def self.space_pressed? return false unless key_pressed?(@key_code) if Sketchup.platform == :platform_win return false if @ctrl && !key_pressed?(VK_CONTROL) return false if @alt && !key_pressed?(VK_MENU) return false if @shift && !key_pressed?(VK_SHIFT) else return false if @ctrl && !key_pressed?(MAC_CTRL) return false if @alt && !key_pressed?(MAC_ALT) return false if @shift && !key_pressed?(MAC_SHIFT) end true end end def self.start_space_timer return if defined?(@space_timer) && @space_timer @space_down = false @space_timer = UI.start_timer(0.1, true) do if GlobalKey.space_pressed? unless @space_down @space_down = true @dialog.execute_script('triggerSpaceFromRuby()') end else @space_down = false end end end def self.stop_space_timer if defined?(@space_timer) && @space_timer UI.stop_timer(@space_timer) @space_timer = nil end end def self.capture_thumbnail view = Sketchup.active_model.active_view # Tentar screen capture instantâneo via GDI32 (Windows) result = ScreenCapture.capture_viewport(view, 96, 60) rescue nil return result if result && result.length > 0 # Fallback: write_image (lento, mas funciona em qualquer plataforma) path = File.join(Dir.tmpdir, "thumb_#{Time.now.to_i}.jpg") view.write_image(path, 96, 60, false, 0.5) encoded = Base64.strict_encode64(File.binread(path)) File.delete(path) if File.exist?(path) encoded end # --- Lógica de Exportação --- def self.calcular_rect_gravacao(export_width, export_height) view = Sketchup.active_model.active_view viewport_global = WindowUtils.get_viewport_rect_deep(view) unless viewport_global viewport_global = { :x => 0, :y => 0, :w => view.vpwidth, :h => view.vpheight, :scale => 1.0 } end vp_w = viewport_global[:w] vp_h = viewport_global[:h] final_w = [export_width.to_i, vp_w].min final_h = [export_height.to_i, vp_h].min offset_x = viewport_global[:x] + ((vp_w - final_w) / 2).to_i offset_y = viewport_global[:y] + ((vp_h - final_h) / 2).to_i final_w -= 1 if final_w.odd? final_h -= 1 if final_h.odd? { :x => offset_x, :y => offset_y, :w => final_w, :h => final_h } end def self.iniciar_processo_exportacao(json_data, use_easing, start_index_from_js, export_width, export_height, filename) effective_index = start_index_from_js.to_i rect = calcular_rect_gravacao(export_width, export_height) executar_gravacao_ffmpeg(json_data, use_easing, rect, effective_index, filename) end def self.iniciar_processo_exportacao_projeto(all_timelines_json, use_easing, active_tl_index, start_vision_index, export_width, export_height, filename) timelines = JSON.parse(all_timelines_json, symbolize_names: true) rect = calcular_rect_gravacao(export_width, export_height) start_tl = active_tl_index.to_i start_vision = start_vision_index.to_i # Calcular duração total a partir do ponto de início total_time = 0.0 start_cam = nil timelines.each_with_index do |tl, i| next if i < start_tl next unless tl[:visoes] && tl[:visoes].length >= 2 sorted = tl[:visoes].sort_by { |v| v[:time] } first_v = (i == start_tl && start_vision > 0 && start_vision < sorted.length) ? start_vision : 0 start_cam = sorted[first_v] if i == start_tl && start_cam.nil? if first_v < sorted.length - 1 total_time += sorted.last[:time] - sorted[first_v][:time] total_time += 0.5 end end play_cmd = "startRecordingPlayAll(#{start_tl}, #{start_vision})" executar_gravacao_ffmpeg_with_duration(total_time, use_easing, rect, filename, play_cmd, start_cam) end def self.executar_gravacao_ffmpeg(json_data, use_easing, rect, start_index, filename) camera_keys = JSON.parse(json_data, symbolize_names: true) camera_keys.sort_by! { |v| v[:time] } start_cam = camera_keys[start_index] total_time = 0 if start_index < camera_keys.length - 1 relevant_keys = camera_keys[start_index..-1] relevant_keys.each_cons(2) { |c, n| total_time += (n[:time] - c[:time]).abs } end executar_gravacao_ffmpeg_with_duration(total_time, use_easing, rect, filename, "triggerSpaceFromRuby()", start_cam) end def self.executar_gravacao_ffmpeg_with_duration(total_time, use_easing, rect, filename, play_command, start_cam = nil) folder = UI.select_directory(title: obter_texto(:selecionar_pasta)) return unless folder output_path = File.join(folder, "#{filename}.mp4") is_win = Sketchup.platform == :platform_win ffmpeg_path = File.join(PLUGIN_DIR, 'ffmpeg', is_win ? 'ffmpeg.exe' : 'ffmpeg') unless File.exist?(ffmpeg_path) UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:ffmpeg_nao_encontrado)) return end # Posicionar câmera na visão inicial antes de iniciar a gravação if start_cam begin cam = Sketchup::Camera.new(start_cam[:eye], start_cam[:target], start_cam[:up], start_cam[:perspective]) cam.fov = start_cam[:fov] Sketchup.active_model.active_view.camera = cam sleep(0.5) rescue => e puts "Erro ao posicionar câmera inicial: #{e.message}" end end duration_padding = 4.0 recording_duration = total_time + duration_padding input_format = is_win ? 'gdigrab' : 'avfoundation' input_source = is_win ? 'desktop' : '1:none' cmd_array = [ "\"#{ffmpeg_path}\"", '-y', '-f', input_format, '-framerate', '30', '-t', recording_duration.to_s ] if is_win cmd_array.concat([ '-draw_mouse', '0', '-offset_x', rect[:x].to_s, '-offset_y', rect[:y].to_s, '-video_size', "#{rect[:w]}x#{rect[:h]}", '-i', input_source ]) else cmd_array.concat([ '-i', input_source, '-vf', "crop=#{rect[:w]}:#{rect[:h]}:#{rect[:x]}:#{rect[:y]}" ]) end cmd_array.concat([ '-c:v', 'libx264', '-preset', 'ultrafast', '-pix_fmt', 'yuv420p', "\"#{output_path}\"" ]) cmd = cmd_array.join(' ') # Esconder janelas sobrepostas e colocar SketchUp no topo antes de gravar WindowUtils.prepare_for_recording(rect) begin if is_win WIN32OLE.new('WScript.Shell').Run(cmd, 0, false) else pid = spawn(cmd) Process.detach(pid) end rescue => e WindowUtils.restore_after_recording UI.messagebox("#{obter_texto(:erro_gravador)}#{e.message}") return end sleep(1.5) @dialog.execute_script("showRecordingIndicator()") @dialog.execute_script(play_command) UI.start_timer(recording_duration + 1.0, false) do WindowUtils.restore_after_recording @dialog.execute_script("hideRecordingIndicator()") UI.messagebox("#{obter_texto(:gravacao_finalizada)}#{output_path}") @dialog.execute_script("resetPlayButton(); resetPlayAll();") end end def self.start_ui current_hotkey = GlobalKey.key_code hotkey_ctrl = GlobalKey.ctrl ? 'true' : 'false' hotkey_alt = GlobalKey.alt ? 'true' : 'false' hotkey_shift = GlobalKey.shift ? 'true' : 'false' ffmpeg_path = File.join(PLUGIN_DIR, 'ffmpeg', Sketchup.platform == :platform_win ? 'ffmpeg.exe' : 'ffmpeg') has_ffmpeg = File.exist?(ffmpeg_path) view = Sketchup.active_model.active_view vp_width = view.vpwidth vp_height = view.vpheight js_i18n_hash = {} IDIOMAS[IDIOMAS.key?(Sketchup.get_locale) ? Sketchup.get_locale : 'en-US'].each { |k, v| js_i18n_hash[k] = v } js_i18n_json = js_i18n_hash.to_json html = <<-HTML #{obter_texto(:titulo)}

#{obter_texto(:titulo)}

#{obter_texto(:subtitulo)}
0.0s
s

#{obter_texto(:visoes_salvas)}

▼

#{obter_texto(:gerenciar_timeline)}

▼

#{obter_texto(:exportar_video)}

▼
#{obter_texto(:viewport_atual)} #{vp_width} x #{vp_height} px
x px
#{obter_texto(:gravando)}

#{obter_texto(:ffmpeg_necessario)}

#{obter_texto(:nome_arquivo)}

#{obter_texto(:extensao_mp4)}

HTML @dialog ||= UI::HtmlDialog.new({ :dialog_title => obter_texto(:titulo_dialogo), :preferences_key => "com.example.tour", :scrollable => true, :resizable => true, :width => 430, :height => 790, :style => UI::HtmlDialog::STYLE_DIALOG }) @dialog.set_html(html) start_space_timer @dialog.add_action_callback("set_hotkey") do |_, key_code, ctrl, alt, shift| GlobalKey.set_hotkey(key_code.to_i, ctrl, alt, shift) Sketchup.write_default("TourVirtual", "Hotkey", key_code.to_i) Sketchup.write_default("TourVirtual", "HotkeyCtrl", ctrl ? true : false) Sketchup.write_default("TourVirtual", "HotkeyAlt", alt ? true : false) Sketchup.write_default("TourVirtual", "HotkeyShift", shift ? true : false) end @dialog.add_action_callback("capture_camera") do |_, time_code| cam = Sketchup.active_model.active_view.camera thumb = capture_thumbnail camera_data = { time: time_code.to_f, eye: cam.eye.to_a, target: cam.target.to_a, up: cam.up.to_a, fov: cam.fov, perspective: cam.perspective?, thumb: thumb, anchor: false } json_str = camera_data.to_json.gsub('"', '\"') @dialog.execute_script("captureVisionFromRuby(\"#{json_str}\")") end @dialog.add_action_callback("goto_camera") do |_, cam_json| cam_data = JSON.parse(cam_json, symbolize_names: true) cam = Sketchup::Camera.new(cam_data[:eye], cam_data[:target], cam_data[:up], cam_data[:perspective]) cam.fov = cam_data[:fov] Sketchup.active_model.active_view.camera = cam end @dialog.add_action_callback("play_tour") do |_, json_data, loop_enabled, inverse_mode, use_easing, start_index| @camera_keys = JSON.parse(json_data, symbolize_names: true) view = Sketchup.active_model.active_view return if @camera_keys.length < 2 @camera_keys.sort_by! { |v| v[:time] } @index = start_index.to_i @direction = 1 @ping_pong = loop_enabled && inverse_mode define_singleton_method(:ease_in_out_quad) do |t| t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t end define_singleton_method(:catmull_rom) do |p0, p1, p2, p3, t| t2 = t * t t3 = t2 * t [ 0.5 * ((2 * p1[0]) + (-p0[0] + p2[0]) * t + (2*p0[0] - 5*p1[0] + 4*p2[0] - p3[0]) * t2 + (-p0[0] + 3*p1[0] - 3*p2[0] + p3[0]) * t3), 0.5 * ((2 * p1[1]) + (-p0[1] + p2[1]) * t + (2*p0[1] - 5*p1[1] + 4*p2[1] - p3[1]) * t2 + (-p0[1] + 3*p1[1] - 3*p2[1] + p3[1]) * t3), 0.5 * ((2 * p1[2]) + (-p0[2] + p2[2]) * t + (2*p0[2] - 5*p1[2] + 4*p2[2] - p3[2]) * t2 + (-p0[2] + 3*p1[2] - 3*p2[2] + p3[2]) * t3) ] end define_singleton_method(:catmull_rom_1d) do |p0, p1, p2, p3, t| t2 = t * t t3 = t2 * t 0.5 * ((2 * p1) + (-p0 + p2) * t + (2*p0 - 5*p1 + 4*p2 - p3) * t2 + (-p0 + 3*p1 - 3*p2 + p3) * t3) end define_singleton_method(:play_transition) do current = @camera_keys[@index] next_index = @index + @direction if next_index >= @camera_keys.size || next_index < 0 if loop_enabled @index = 0 UI.start_timer(0.01) { play_transition } return else @dialog.execute_script("pauseAtIndex(0)") return end end next_cam = @camera_keys[next_index] duration = (next_cam[:time] - current[:time]).abs t_start = Time.now p0 = @camera_keys[[@index - 1, 0].max] p1 = current p2 = next_cam p3 = @camera_keys[[@index + 2, @camera_keys.size - 1].min] @walk_shake = { z_phase: rand * Math::PI * 2, x_phase: rand * Math::PI * 2, z_amp: 0.8 + rand * 0.4, x_amp: 0.3 + rand * 0.4 } playhead_counter = 0 @timer_id = UI.start_timer(0.03, true) do t_elapsed = Time.now - t_start t = duration.zero? ? 1.0 : [t_elapsed / duration, 1.0].min t = use_easing ? ease_in_out_quad(t) : t # Atualizar playhead na timeline (~a cada 0.09s) playhead_counter += 1 if playhead_counter % 3 == 0 interpolated_time = current[:time] + t * (next_cam[:time] - current[:time]) @dialog.execute_script("updatePlayhead(#{interpolated_time.round(1)})") end eye = catmull_rom(p0[:eye], p1[:eye], p2[:eye], p3[:eye], t) target = catmull_rom(p0[:target], p1[:target], p2[:target], p3[:target], t) up = catmull_rom(p0[:up], p1[:up], p2[:up], p3[:up], t) # Interpolação Catmull-Rom para o FOV: suavidade total acompanhando a curva da câmera fov = catmull_rom_1d(p0[:fov], p1[:fov], p2[:fov], p3[:fov], t) if current[:walk] eye[2] += Math.sin(t * Math::PI * 6 + @walk_shake[:z_phase]) * @walk_shake[:z_amp] eye[0] += Math.sin(t * Math::PI * 3 + @walk_shake[:x_phase]) * @walk_shake[:x_amp] end cam = Sketchup::Camera.new(eye, target, up, current[:perspective]) cam.fov = fov view.camera = cam view.refresh if t >= 1.0 UI.stop_timer(@timer_id) @index = next_index if @camera_keys[@index][:anchor] && @index > 0 @dialog.execute_script("pauseAtIndex(#{@index})") else play_transition end end end end play_transition end # Callback de exportação com presets de resolução @dialog.add_action_callback("start_export_process") do |_, json_data, use_easing, start_index, width, height, filename| iniciar_processo_exportacao(json_data, use_easing, start_index, width.to_i, height.to_i, filename.to_s) end @dialog.add_action_callback("start_export_project") do |_, all_timelines_json, use_easing, active_tl_index, start_vision_index, width, height, filename| iniciar_processo_exportacao_projeto(all_timelines_json, use_easing, active_tl_index.to_i, start_vision_index.to_i, width.to_i, height.to_i, filename.to_s) end @dialog.add_action_callback("install_ffmpeg") do |_| eval(FFMPEG_INSTALL_SCRIPT) UI.messagebox(obter_texto(:ffmpeg_instalado)) end @dialog.add_action_callback("stop_tour") do |_| UI.stop_timer(@timer_id) if @timer_id @dialog.execute_script("resetPlayButton()") end @dialog.add_action_callback("show_export_preview") do |_, width, height| @preview_tool = ExportPreviewTool.new(width.to_i, height.to_i) Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(@preview_tool) end @dialog.add_action_callback("hide_export_preview") do |_| Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil) @preview_tool = nil end @dialog.set_on_closed { UI.stop_timer(@timer_id) if defined?(@timer_id) && @timer_id stop_space_timer if @preview_tool Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil) @preview_tool = nil end } @dialog.show end end end def self.executar TourPlugin::CameraTimeline.start_ui end end # module TourVirtual end # module ScriptUpComunidade ScriptUpComunidade::TourVirtual.executar

description.pt:
Este script analisa e reduz em massa a resolução de texturas muito grandes no SketchUp, otimizando drasticamente o consumo de memória de vídeo (VRAM) e o desempenho geral do modelo. É a ferramenta ideal para arquitetos e modeladores que lidam com arquivos pesados e travamentos causados pela importação de materiais de altíssima resolução.

Principais Funcionalidades:
- Redução em Lote: Permite aplicar o redimensionamento a múltiplas texturas simultaneamente, limitando-as a uma resolução máxima definida pelo usuário.
- Monitoramento Ativo (Observador): Identifica automaticamente a adição de novos materiais pesados ao modelo e exibe uma notificação sugerindo a redução imediata.
- Painel Analítico Completo: Interface interativa que lista todas as texturas, calcula o peso individual na memória (VRAM) e estima a economia possível após a redução.
- Redimensionamento Inteligente: Altera o tamanho das imagens mantendo a proporção original (aspect ratio) e preservando o mapeamento visual no modelo 3D.

Acesso no SketchUp: Menu Extensões > Gerenciador de Texturas.
description.en:
This script analyzes and bulk reduces the resolution of very large textures in SketchUp, dramatically optimizing video memory (VRAM) consumption and overall model performance. It's the ideal tool for architects and modelers dealing with heavy files and crashes caused by importing very high-resolution materials.

Key Features:
- Batch Reduction: Allows resizing to be applied to multiple textures simultaneously, limiting them to a maximum resolution defined by the user.
- Active Monitoring (Observer): Automatically identifies the addition of new heavy materials to the model and displays a notification suggesting immediate reduction.
- Complete Analytics Panel: Interactive interface that lists all textures, calculates the individual weight in memory (VRAM), and estimates the possible savings after reduction.
- Intelligent Resizing: Changes the size of images while maintaining the original aspect ratio and preserving the visual mapping in the 3D model.

Access in SketchUp: Extensions Menu > Texture Manager.
description.es:
Este script analiza y reduce la resolución de texturas muy grandes en SketchUp, optimizando drásticamente el consumo de memoria de vídeo (VRAM) y el rendimiento general del modelo. Es la herramienta ideal para arquitectos y modeladores que trabajan con archivos pesados ​​y sufren fallos al importar materiales de muy alta resolución.

Características principales:
- Reducción por lotes: Permite redimensionar varias texturas simultáneamente, limitándolas a una resolución máxima definida por el usuario.

- Monitorización activa (Observador): Identifica automáticamente la adición de nuevos materiales pesados ​​al modelo y muestra una notificación sugiriendo su reducción inmediata.

- Panel de análisis completo: Interfaz interactiva que muestra todas las texturas, calcula su peso individual en memoria (VRAM) y estima el ahorro potencial tras la reducción.

- Redimensionamiento inteligente: Cambia el tamaño de las imágenes manteniendo la relación de aspecto original y conservando el mapeo visual en el modelo 3D.

Acceso en SketchUp: Menú Extensiones > Gestor de texturas.
